Lots of fleshy blackberry jam and black plum preserves on the palate and finish. Pair this fortified wine with Black Forest Cake or chocolate cheesecake.

name: Fonseca Terra Prima Reserve Port 750ml
description: Port / 20 % ABV / Portugal A wonderfully rich, concentrated Port with great flavour and texture. It has an opulent black fruit nose which is followed through on the palate showing layers of intense berry, plum and cherry fruit flavours supported by firm, but well integrated tannins. This is a deliciously textured Reserve Port which is velvety, smooth, succulent and plump.

name: Fonseca Tawny Port 750ml
description: Port / 20 % ABV / Portugal This fine port is a blend of young ports selected for their easy drinking styles.

name: Fonseca Bin #27 Port 750ml
description: Port / 20 % ABV / Portugal The Fonseca Bin #27 Porto is fresh and grapey, with plenty of grip and power behind dark plum, chocolate and berry flavors that feature slate and pepper notes.

name: Fonseca White Port 750ml
description: Port / 20 % ABV / Portugal This wine is russet with brilliant crimson highlights and ripe black fruit and butterscotch aromas. A smooth, silky texture and subtle oak nuances with fresh acidity and smooth tannins culminate in a long, elegant finish.

name: Fonseca Tawny Port 10 Year 750ml
description: Port / 20 % ABV / Portugal This wine is russet with brilliant crimson highlights and ripe black fruit and butterscotch aromas. A smooth, silky texture and subtle oak nuances with fresh acidity and smooth tannins culminate in a long, elegant finish.

name: Taylor Fladgate Tawny Port 40 Year 750ml
description: Port / 20 % ABV / Portugal 95 Points, Wine Spectator - "Alluring, with a warm date and gently mulled fig and peach core gliding through, while light alder, bitter almond and candied ginger notes add sparkle and texture along the edges."

name: Taylor Fladgate Tawny Port 30 Yea
description: Dessert Wine / 20 % ABV / Portugal Taylorâ€™s is one of the few remaining houses to produce a 30 Year Old aged tawny Port. Selected red Ports produced in the eastern areas of the Douro Valley are matured in seasoned oak casks in Taylorâ€™s cellars in Vila Nova de Gaia. Here, the cool and damp coastal climate encourages a slow and gentle ageing process, producing aromas of great complexity and finesse. Only every two or three years is a reserve of Port with sufficient structure, fruit and power to age is laid aside to age in oak casks. Those that have reached their peak after thirty years are then blended together for balance and finesse, and to ensure consistency of quality and style. The 30 year old tawny is one such wine.

name: Black Sage Pipe Red Dessert Wine 500ml
description: Red Blend / 19.5 % ABV / Canada We have chosen the name â€œPipeâ€ to reflect the time-honoured tradition of Port producers and the quality of this fine wine. The wine is a blend of Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot and Cabernet Franc. Partway through fermentation, the process is stopped by adding high-alcohol grain spirits, bringing the alcohol up to 19-20% and leaving behind residual sugar..

name: Adega Vila Real 10 Year Tawny Port 750ml
description: Red Blend /20% ABV Of amber color auburn, is a Port of excellent quality, elegant, alive and intense. The aging in wood gave it a fine and very complex aroma, with nuances of nuts, caramel and spices.

name: Taylor Fladgate 10 Year Old Tawny 750ml
description: Red Blend / Oporto, Douro, Portugal An exceptionally fine old tawny blend, aged for 10 years in oak casks. Elegant and smooth, combining delicate wood notes and rich mellow fruit, it is bottled for immediate drinking. A superb dessert wine, particularly with dishes made with chocolate, coffee or almonds, Taylor's 10 Year Old Tawny may also be served at the end of the meal in the same way as Vintage Port.

name: Taylor Fladgate 20 Year Old Tawny 750ml
description: Dessert Wine / 20 % ABV / Portugal Taylorâ€™s is one of the most highly respected producers of aged tawny Port wines. 20 Year Old Tawny Port is fully matured in seasoned oak casks each holding about 630 litres of wine. Here, over many years of ageing, the Port wine gradually takes on its characteristic amber â€˜tawnyâ€™ colour, slowly developing the complex mellow flavours and the smooth luscious palate which are the hallmarks of this style of port.

name: Taylor Fladgate Vargellas Vintage Port 750ml
description: Port / 15 % ABV / Oporto, Douro, Portugal Inky, purple color. Powerful, intense, black fruit and cherry aromas with lovely fragrant aromatic notes. On the mouth this wine is in perfect harmony with beautifully balanced fruit and tannins. Rich, elegant, luscious black fruit flavors. Enormous concentration with again this attractive scented quality coming through. Long rich finish. Very stylish.

name: Ravenswood Vintners Blend Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.5% ABV / California, USA With excitingly big, bold flavors and incredible structure, the 2016 vintage is a perfect antipode to the understated Chards the other guys are peddling. Ripe peach, apricot, and citrus aromas along with enormous toasted oak and spice flavors will leave you begging for more.

name: Ravenswood Vinters Blend Zinfandel 750ml
description: Zinfandel / 14% ABV / California, USA This full bodied Zin from the North Coast of California delights the palate with flavors of bleckberry, black currant and spices.

name: Ravenswood Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 14% ABV / California, USA "Bedrock fruit has very pretty aromatics and high-intensity spice," says Joel Peterson, Ravenswood's founder. Hints of black currant and cassis, with a touch of mineral and cedar. On the palate, a spicy cherry, with subtle rose, tobacco notes, black cherry, and fresh herbs make this the perfect wine to pair with roast leg of lamb.

name: 1000 Stories Bourbon Barrel Aged Zinfandel 750ml
description: Zinfandel / 15.6% ABV / Mendocino, USA 1,000 Stories is a unique wine aged in new bourbon barrels - a reflection of our winemakersâ€™ pioneering spirits.

name: Tom Gore Vineyards Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir / 14% ABV / California, USA Aromas of red and black cherries, raspberries, and blackberries, with a subtle touch of oak and spice. On the palate, flavours of red fruits and candied cherries are followed by soft and very fine tannins and a smooth finish.

name: Josh Cellars Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.9% ABV / California, USA Our Cabernet Sauvignon was the first wine we made. This is the wine that started it all, setting the exacting standards that we hold ourselves to for all of our varietals. Round and juicy, our Cabernet Sauvignon has flavors of blackberry, toasted hazelnut and cinnamon, complemented by hints of vanilla and toasted oak.

name: Longshot Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / California, USA This full-throttle bottle is a true Longshot original. Bringing together a carefully selected collection of California grapes, winemaker Beth Liston has found a way to balance big fruit flavors with deep, dry, mouthwatering notes. An instant hit, our Cab loves any party or holiday gathering where thereâ€™s a chance to mingle with all kinds of tastes.

name: Longshot Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 13% ABV / California, USA One of the most popular wines in America finally gets the Longshot treatment. Winemaker Beth Liston has selected her favourite California grapes and artfully blended them to create a refreshingly light quencher that everybody wants to chill with. This easy-to-sip wine is famous for its endless pair-ability, making it the universal contribution to dinner parties, celebrations, and any occasion that needs a splash of character.

name: Longshot RosÃ© 750ml
description: RosÃ© / 13.5% ABV / California, USA A blend of Grenache, Barbera, Pinot Grigio, Tempranillo and Zinfandel. Don't let the pale pink fool you, this wine's only blushing from all the attention. Most bottles of RosÃ© are imported or created as small batch offerings, that means a premium price tag. Fortunately, Longshot winemaker, Beth Liston, decided to take summer by the grapes and create a fruit-forward, Provence-style RosÃ© that pairs perfectly with sunshine and backyard budgets. Think RosÃ© canâ€™t hang at a backyard BBQ? Think again. Longshot RosÃ© sips amazingly well with chips and dips, and will bring your smoky burger to a new level of 'nom

name: Bear Flag Smooth Red Blend 750ml
description: Red / 12% ABV / California, USA Ruby red colour; cherry, berry and vanilla aromas; medium bodied and dry; berry, and vanilla flavours with a touch of sweet oak spice to finish

name: Bear Flag Soft White Blend 750ml
description: White / 10% ABV / California, USA Pale lemon colour; subtle aromas of pear, honey and melon; off-dry, light-bodied, mild acidity; flavours of honey, peach, melon and citrus; medium-long finish.

name: Hahn Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir / 14.5% ABV / California, USA The Hahn Pinot Noirâ€™s bouquet charms with scents of vibrant red cherry, red plum and hint of spices with slightly toasty notes. On the palate, medium silky tannins with a soft, round mouthfeel and notes of earthiness.

name: Gallo Family Vineyards Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13% ABV / Sonoma County, USA Our Chardonnay is a real people-pleaser. And it keeps those people on their toes with delightfully unexpected notes: citrus, rich fruit, vanilla, and a dash of oak. When it's seafood night, our Chardonnay is ready for the pour. But don't stop at buttery salmon and seafood salads. This medium-bodied wine â€“ and its lush texture â€“ complements poultry and cream sauces too.

name: Manischewitz Concord Grape 750ml
description: Red / 11% ABV / New York, USA A sweet but balanced wine with a generous mouth feel. The distinct aroma and flavor of fresh Concord grapes.

name: Layer Cake Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / California, USA The Cabernet Sauvignon jumps from the glass with aromas of ripe Bing cherries and blackberries plus cedar and dark, rich layers of maduro tobacco. Deep flavors of spice-infused plums, toasty oak, and espresso fill the mouth, with a rich, creamy layered texture, and powerful structure. Flavors of chocolate and black currant continue through the long, lingering finish.

name: Layer Cake Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 14.1% ABV / California, USA The nose is reminiscent of Meyer lemons, preserved then diced up later in the year for seasoning in a meal, wet stones and Kaffir lime blossoms waft in and out as well. The wine builds in body and texture as it sits in your mouth. Layers of Kaffir lime, guava, and pineapple pour in at first, and then the light creamy texture of whipped lemon curd fills in the flavor palette. The finish is clean and crisp, lingering enough to make you want another sip... go ahead, we'll make more next year, don't worry.

name: Carnivor Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.8% ABV / California, USA Big and bold in style, Carnivor Cabernet Sauvignon offers intense, dark fruit aromas and deep, inky color. A plush, velvety mouthfeel frames rich flavors of dark berries, coffee, mocha and toasted oak, all backed by a distinctive smoothness and a lingering, silky finish.

name: J Vineyards & Winery Pinot Gris 750ml
description: Pinot Gris / 13.8% ABV / California, USA J California Pinot Gris delights with notes of candied pineapple, lemongrass, white peach and jasmine. This wine is fruit forward with ripe flavors of Anjou pear, yellow apple and lime. The palate is complex with notes of orange blossom and a sliver of minerality.

name: Mirassou Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir / 13.5% ABV / California, USA California is known for its Pinot Noir, a fact we take special pride in, as we were the first winemakers to bring the varietal to America. The rest, as they say, is historyâ€”and today our Pinot is a favorite. Opening with notes of ripe red and black cherry, its lush layers of fresh raspberry, strawberry jam and pomegranate are balanced with hints of oak and vanilla. Light-bodied and bright, itâ€™s rich in heritage and easy-drinking deliciousness.

name: Mirassou Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 13% ABV / California, USA In a word: crisp. Never ones to mess with a good thing, our winemakers let the Pinot Grigio grape be the star of this California classic. Unoaked for maximum flavor, it opens with notes of citrus fruit and mellows into a juicy bouquet of white peach, fresh pear and green apple. By the bottle or by the case, this is a year-round dazzler at a price point that makes it easy to stock up for a sunny day.

name: Joel Gott Zinfandel 750ml
description: Zinfandel / 14.3% ABV / California, USA The California Zinfandel has aromas of roasted plum and blackberry jam with hints of sweet spices. On the palate, the wineâ€™s bright red fruit flavors and acidity are complemented by a soft, round mouth feel and a long finish.

name: Joel Gott 815 Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.9% ABV / California, USA The Joel Gott 815 Cabernet Sauvignon has aromatics of mocha, roasted blue fruits, plums, and cherry spice. The wine enters sweet on the palate, well-structured and with firm tannins mid-palate, followed by a long, balanced finish.

name: Joel Gott Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.9% ABV / USA After harvest, fruit from each vineyard is whole cluster pressed to retain delicate fruit flavors before being fermented and aged in mainly stainless-steel tanks to preserve the bright acidity and fruit flavors. A small amount of 1-year-old French oak barrels are used to add to the aging process.

name: Beringer Founders' Estate Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.9% ABV / California, USA Beringer has been making wines in the Napa Valley since 1875. This chardonnay is made from fruit sourced in cool coastal and warmer interior vineyards, creating an ideal balance. Medium-bodied, with ripe fig, smoke, vanilla and pear flavours. Spicy and vanilla notes grace a lengthy finish. Serve with asparagus risotto.

name: Beringer Founders' Estate Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.8% ABV / California, USA Deep color with bright cassis, green tea, black olive and sweet vanilla spice aromas that lead into a fleshy mouth. Black fruit, cassis, and spice flavors are supported into a long finish by fine-grained, assertive tannins.

name: Beringer Founders Estate Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 13.9% ABV / California,USA It has bright citrus and green apple aromas with honeydew and apple flavors. The balanced acidity gives it a great refreshing and crisp quality, with just a touch of minerality.

name: Cline Zinfandel Ancient Vines 750ml
description: Zinfandel / 15% ABV / California, USA A deep purple color and luscious flavors of black cherry, strawberry, and dark chocolate lead to a medium finish. Accompany with slow cooked BBQ pork, chicken mole, or spinach mushroom casserole.

name: La Crema Monterey Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir / 13.5% ABV / Monterey, USA Aromas of black plum, cherry, rhubard and hints of earth and loam. Flavors of red plum, raspberry and blood orange are underpinned by distinctive riverstone minerality and savory umami character. Plush and richly textured with juicy yet balanced acidity and integrated toasty barrel spice.

name: Kendall-Jackson Avant Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.5% ABV / California, USA This refreshing wine is cold fermented in stainless steel tanks to create a pure expression of this exceptional grape. Showcasing crisp green apple, citrus and tropical fruit notes, the resulting wine is youthful and lively, providing a superb affinity for food. For over three decades, Kendall-Jackson has remained relentlessly committed to producing only the finest quality wines from grapes grown in Californiaâ€™s cool, coastal vineyards. We carefully match climates and soil types for each grape varietal, and then guide each vineyard lot throughout the entire winemaking process. Our proprietary approach to winemaking has earned us our world-renowned reputation for wines that consistently exhibit our signature rich layers of flavor, combined with delicate balance.

name: Bonterra Viognier 750ml
description: Viognier / 14% ABV / Mendocino, USA A brilliant yellow hue heralds engaging aromas of stone fruit, spice and orange blossom in the glass. On the palate, a harmonious medley of apricot, juicy mango and honeysuckle coalesce around a viscous mid-palate. At once crisp and rich, the 2018 Viognier is an elegant, balanced wine with uplifting acidity and a lingering finish.

name: Bonterra Organic Zinfandel 750ml
description: Zinfandel / 14.5% ABV / Mendocino, USA Dense purple-black with inky middle. Currants and blueberry jam in the concentrated nose, chocolate cherries and cinnamon plums behind. Powerful palate with soft tannins and good Merlot reclining extract, warming up and bouffant in the velvety acting center, again ripe black and blue fruit, complex and enormous reserves showing nutty pflaumiges finale, a long finish. The Biodynamic flagship Bonterra. Is clearly one of the best wines in the United States.

name: Bonterra Organic Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 14% ABV / Mendocino, USA This Cabernet offers aromas of bright cherry, currant, and raspberry with notes of toasted oak and vanilla. In the glass, you will and flavors of cherry and currant and a lingering and thoughtful finish. Good structure, a moderate weight, polished tannins and a balanced acidity promise an ever more pleasing wine to come.

name: Bonterra Organic Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.5% ABV / Mendocino, USA Organic. Aromas of honey and lightly toasted almonds, followed by tropical aromas of pineapple, citrusy lemon and crÃ¨me brulee. The wine is refreshing on the palate, with a minerality that is both bright and clean, drawing you into a vibrant tartness and lemon zest that is absolutely, positively Bonterra Chardonnay, vintage after vintage

name: Seghesio Sonoma Zinfandel 750ml
description: Zinfandel / 14.8% ABV / Sonoma County, USA Every vintage, we harvest multiple diverse lots of Zinfandel that span the entire Sonoma County Zinfandel landscape. Each of these lots is produced under the careful eyes of winemaker Andy Robinson. The best of these lots are selected to make Sonoma Zinfandel. A small amount of Petite Sirah is added to honor century-old traditions and to provide color and structure. The result is a wine that offers tantalizing raspberry, blueberry, classic briary and spicy flavors with a balance of components for which Seghesio wines are known.

name: Carlo Rossi California White 3L
description: White / 10.5% ABV / California, USA Pale straw colour; pleasantly floral with a pear drop candy note; clean poached pear, honey and cantaloupe flavours.

name: Carlo Rossi California White 1.5L
description: White / 10.5% ABV / California, USA Pale straw colour; pleasantly floral with a pear drop candy note; clean poached pear, honey and cantaloupe flavours.

name: Carlo Rossi California Blush 1.5L
description: RosÃ© / 10.5% ABV / California, USA Pale onion skin colour; soft watermelon, berry compote, spice and pear aromas and flavours; soft medium finish.

name: Carlo Rossi California Red 3L
description: Red / 12% ABV / California, USA Pale ruby colour; mildly fruity nose displaying candied plum, floral and watermelon notes; light to medium body with crisp berry flavours

name: Carlo Rossi California Red 1.5L
description: Red / 12% ABV / California, USA Pale ruby colour; mildly fruity nose displaying candied plum, floral and watermelon notes; light to medium body with crisp berry flavours

name: Gallo Family Vineyards Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir / 12.5% ABV / California, USA You can never go wrong by serving a bottle of our Pinot Noir. This medium bodied wine provides a smooth and light finish with aromas of cherry and sweet fruit flavors.

name: Gallo Family Vineyards Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 11.5% ABV / California, USA Our Pinot Grigio brings together more than just the family. It brings together the refreshing crisp flavors of fresh green apple, white peach and citrus. Bright citrus notes are perfect for fresh salads, rich seafood and grilled poultry, and pair well with other acidic foods like tomatoes and lemon.

name: Gallo Family Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13% ABV / California, USA This wine showcases aromas of fresh dark fruit, such as black cherry framed with brown spices and dark toast notes.

name: Gallo Family Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13% ABV / California, USA Our Sauvignon Blanc balances the fruit flavors of honeydew melon, citrus and ripe apple, providing a light and crisp finish.

name: Gallo Family Vineyards White Zinfandel 1.5L
description: White Zinfandel / 8.5% ABV / California, USA Our White Zinfandel combines crisp refreshment with bright fruit. Youâ€™ll taste flavors of fresh strawberry and hints of sweet, white peach. Itâ€™s sure to please someone at every family gathering.

name: Gallo Family Vineyards White Zinfandel 750ml
description: White Zinfandel / 8.5% ABV / California, USA Our White Zinfandel combines crisp refreshment with bright fruit. Youâ€™ll taste flavors of fresh strawberry and hints of sweet, white peach. Itâ€™s sure to please someone at every family gathering.

name: Dreaming Tree Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / California, USA The Dreaming Tree Cabernet Sauvignon Red Wine, part of an exciting collaboration between musician Dave Matthews and winemaker Sean McKenzie, has good rhythm in its aromas and flavors, resulting in an easy-drinking cabernet sauvignon wine with lots of character. With classic aromas of blackberry, plum and cassis wrapped in rich flavors of toasted caramel and dark chocolate, this delicious red wine is ready for your dinner table. Aged for 18 months in oak barrels, this red wine blend is a harmony of cabernet sauvignon, malbec, merlot, tannat and petit verdot grapes harvested from the central and northern coasts of California. That harvesting and aging process leaves this California wine with well-preserved flavors and aromas. Each sip of this red wine blend features tannins that lend well to this wine's elegant and supple structure. Pair it with beef flank steak or grilled onion burgers for a beautiful duet. To keep those flavors singing, store this cabernet sauvignon wine at room temperature, then chill for 30 minutes before serving.

name: Bread & Butter Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir / 13.5% ABV / Napa Valley, USA Bread & Butter Pinot Noir is all about that juicy red fruit. Think cherries and raspberries with a touch of cassis. Delicate hints of cedar, smoke, and bay leaf cut the sweetness of the fruit, creating a nicely balanced bouquet. That luscious fruit bouquet continues onto the palate, where itâ€™s joined by soft flavors of oak and savory notes. With a long and beautifully smooth finish, this Pinot Noir will melt in your mouth.

name: William Hill North Coast Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.9% ABV / California, USA Our North Coast Cabernet Sauvignon displays a rich palate of dark fruit flavors, with subtle hints of caramel and cocoa.

name: Chateu Souverain Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.9% ABV / Sonoma County, USA Chateau Souverain Cabernet Sauvignon is a deep plum color and offers intense aromas of toasted vanilla, mocha and subtle baking spices. Elegant layers of blackberry and ripe cherry are complemented by balanced acidity and smooth tannins, leading into a juicy, lasting finish.

name: Apothic Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / California, USA Immerse your senses in this smooth Cab. Apothic Cabernet Sauvignon has hints of jammy dark fruit and vanilla that blend with a silky smooth texture that boldly lingers on the palate. From the makers of Apothic wines, this alluring twist on Cabernet Sauvignon pairs with your nightâ€”wherever it takes you. Get this limited release before it's gone.

name: Apothic Crush 750ml
description: Red / 14.5% ABV / California, USA Made with passion, Apothic Crush is a decadent Red Blend that brings together soft, red fruit flavors and hints of caramel for a luscious, memorable wine experience.

name: Apothic Dark 750ml
description: Red / 13.5% ABV / California, USA Thereâ€™s a romance in darkness. It draws our curiosity and beckons a desire to taste the unknown. Apothic Dark includes seven dark grape varieties, each adding distinct tenors and qualities. Together they slowly reveal rich layers of flavor and texture. Vintage offers black cherry and blackberry that seamlessly meld with espresso and dark chocolate. The smooth mouthfeel creates a full finish that haunts the palate.

name: Apothic White 750ml
description: White / 11.9% ABV / California, USA Apothic White blends Chardonnay, Riesling and Pinot Grigio to create a lively, medium-bodied wine with layers of vibrant flavor. Riesling lends the wine its floral notes and energizing acidity while Chardonnay adds texture and body. Finally, Pinot Grigio contributes refreshing flavors of juicy pineapple, peach, pear and apricot. Together they are an invigorating balance of flavors and freshness that wrap with a crisp, balanced finish.

name: Apothic Red 750ml
description: Red / 13.5% ABV / California, USA Apothic Red is the bold and intriguing red blend that launched the Apothic legacy, featuring a mix of merlot, cabernet sauvignon, syrah, and zinfandel wine grapes. This California wine indulges the senses with notes of black cherry, vanilla and mocha and a character all its own. This smooth and rich red blend is medium bodied and pairs with wherever the night may take you. Apothic Red is best enjoyed with plenty of wine glasses to share.

name: Columbia Winery Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.7% ABV / Washington, United States A firm structure with a soft, juicy finish. Ripe blackberry and black currant flavors are complimented by notes of mocha and toffee.

name: Columbia Winery Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.8% ABV / Washington, USA Across the Columbia Valley, a rich mixture of soil types, slope and aspect permits an exciting range of wine styles and varieties to prosper. This diversity has given rise to 12 official AVAs, each containing numerous further mesoclimates. You can expect this Chardonnay to offer suggestions of apple, peach and cream, with a complex, lavish texture. A good option for grilled chicken or pork.

name: Bridlewood Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.9% ABV / Paso Robles, USA Notes of spicy clove, nutmeg and cinnamon, which complement the bright blackberry and plum flavors. Round tannins lead to a sweet, smooth finish.

name: Edna Valley Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.9% ABV / Edna Valley, Spain For three decades, weâ€™ve crafted flavorful Chardonnay grapes from the Edna Valley into award-winning wine. Layers of white peach and apricot intertwine with notes of pineapple and brown spice. A lively acidity and supple, generous mouthfeel.

name: Louis M. Martini Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.8% ABV / Sonoma County, USA The Louis M. Martini Sonoma County Cabernet Sauvignon wine reflects the best of the warm, narrow Dry Creek Valley and the hot yet wind-cooled Alexander Valley. Together, these unique features create a rich, superbly balanced Cabernet Sauvignon with copious yet supple tannins. Those tannins make the young wine approachable but will still give it enough texture to age gracefully. This vintage had a long, calm growing season, helping create elevated and concentrated flavors that include wild berries, plum, licorice and mocha. The full-bodied and mouth-coating feel on the palate leads to a long, graceful finish with tones of intense fruit, dried herbs and cedar inside firm structure.

name: Dancing Bull Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 12.3% ABV / California, USA Dancing Bull Sauvignon Blanc has crisp, fruity flavors of lime, kiwi, mango and citrus. One sip conjures memories of fresh-squeezed lemonade on a hot summer day. Vibrant citrus flavors and a touch of that traditional Sauvignon Blanc grassiness give this wine a crisp, inviting acidity. This wine bottle comes with an easy to open screw cap.

name: Dancing Bull Zinfandel 750ml
description: Zinfandel / 13.5% ABV / California, USA No shortage of flavor here. Blackberry, black cherry and raspberry mix with spicy notes of pepper and vanilla, making our Dancing Bull Zinfandel one of the best things to ever happen to barbeque. Originally introduced under the Rancho Zabaco label, our Zin remains a fan favorite for its bold, award-winning style. Pair this smooth, spicy wine with braised pork ribs and burgers, or try it with pasta in a rich tomato sauce.

name: Ghost Pines Zinfandel 750ml
description: Zinfandel / 14.5% ABV / Sonoma Valley, USA Ghost Pines knows no boundaries. Without the restriction of traditional winegrowing boundaries, the grapes for Ghost Pines wines are chosen from Californiaâ€™s best regions solely for their quality and flavor. This philosophy delivers wines of consistent quality and a distinct combination of richness, smoothness and balance that could never be mistaken for ordinary. Named for the indigenous Gray Pines dotting Northern Californiaâ€™s hillsides, Ghost Pines embodies the progressive spirit of California winemaking and inspires a sense of individuality.

name: Ghost Pines Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 14.2% ABV / California, USA Bold and intensely flavored, our Ghost Pines Cabernet Sauvignon was crafted with grapes from Sonoma and Napa. The blend of these two regions creates an expansive palate that offers dark fruit flavors, round tannins and an enduring finish. Sweet vanilla nuances and the occasional savory note make this Cabernet a truly unique wine.

name: Ghost Pines Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.5% ABV / Monterey County, United States Selected from three of California's most recognized Chardonnay appellations, Sonoma, Monterey and Napa, our Ghost Pines Chardonnay offers expressive, fruit-forward characteristics. The artful combination of these three regions delivers baked apple, pear and lemon cream flavors, accented by an elegant finish of sweet vanilla.

name: Ghost Pines Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 14.5% ABV / California, USA Viticulture Notes Each lot for our Ghost Pines Merlot was fermented under a unique set of conditions designed to get the most out of the fruit. Some lots were cold soaked to amplify the fresh fruit flavors while others were fermented at higher temperatures to add structure and jammy characteristics. We blended a touch of Petite Sirah to highlight notes of spice and blueberry. Taste Profile Our Merlot is a culmination of the best that Napa and Sonoma have to offer. This wine opens with aromas and flavors of plum, dried cherry and blackberry. On the palate, hints of nutmeg, clove, new leather and toasted bread create an expressive, full-bodied wine.

name: Rancho Zabaco Heritage Zinfandel 750ml
description: Zinfandel / 14.8% ABV / Sonoma County, USA Rancho Zabaco was one of the original Mexican land grands in Northern Sonoma, speaking not only to California's winemaking hertiage but California's as well. Made mostly from fruit from Sonoma's Dry Creek Valley, this is a ruby red Zin with lots of black fruit and spice, with fine tannins and mouthcoating texture. This is barbecue wine, through and through.

name: MacMurray Estate Russian River Valley Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir / 14.2% ABV / Sonoma County, USA Characterized by suave, dark-fruited aromas, the wine delivers tremendous complexity on the palate in the form of layered notes of pomegranates, cherries, boysenberry and lavender. Maturation in French oak from a variety of coopers gave the wine a smooth, rich character and hints of baking spice.

name: MacMurray Estate Russian River Valley Pinot Gris 750ml
description: Pinot Gris / 14% ABV / Sonoma County, USA Our MacMurray Estate Vineyards Russian River Valley Pinot Gris boasts expressive, perfumed aromas and layers of white flowers, Asian pear and baked apple. Refreshing acidity appears on the palate, complemented by signature white peach, ginger and dried fig notes. The lingering finish is polished by satin-like texture in a wine that will enhance with age.

name: Coromina EmpordÃ  750ml
description: Grenache / 14.5% ABV / Spain Carignan and Grenache, Boutique wine of a cherry hue with bright red tints, it revels intense aromas of fruit compote along with licorices, cinnamon and nutmeg. On the palate it shows smooth, perfectly structures tannins with a long finish.

name: AntaÃ±o Rioja Crianza 750ml
description: Red / 13% ABV / Spain Bodegas AntaÃ±o is located in Spainâ€™s famed Rioja region, among the worldâ€™s greatest wine-growing districts and home to the noble Tempranillo grape. Our Crianza, a Tempranillo-based blend aged for a year in oak barrels, offers toasted berry and cherry aromas and fresh raspberry, spice and vanilla flavors. Itâ€™s a great match for roast chicken, grilled meats and savory stews.

name: Radio Boca Tempranillo 750ml
description: Tempranillo / 13% ABV / Valencia, Spain Radio Boca Tempranillo is 100% Tempranillo sourced from mature 25 to 50 year old vines in Valencia on the eastern coast of Spain. This is a project put together by an international group of winemakers creating a wine for the American market. The color is ruby red with black highlights. The nose is strawberry and cocoa powder, a little smoke from the backyard grill and a late hit of blackberry and violets, the scents do not jump out at you, but you will be rewarded if you take the time to sniff them out. There is a nice lush mouthfeel, it is more fruit forward than the usual Tempranillo from Spain. Rich, dark berries upfront, then licorice followed by Nestle chocolate chips. This Tempranillo is very smooth, there are no sharp edges from tannins, itâ€™s all fruit and candy. The finish is light, but does last an acceptable time.

name: Navarro LÃ³pez Crianza Old Vine Tempranillo 750ml
description: Tempranillo / 13% ABV / Spain Aromas of tomato, spiced cherry, leather and fresh herbs are clean and appealing. A standard, balanced mouthfeel is medium in body, with dry, woody flavors of peppery plum and berry fruits. Minty and darker on the finish.

name: Liberado Cabernet Sauvignon Tempranillo 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon Tempranillo / 13.5% ABV / Spain This red boasts a medium nose exuding spicy, floral and fruity aromas. This medium bodied wine expresses refreshing acidity and offers a broad texture and fleshy tannins.

name: Graham's Tawny Port 10 Year 750ml
description: Port / 20 % ABV / Oporto, Douro, Portugal "10 Years" indicates and average age â€“ this Aged Tawny Port is a blend of older wines, which offer complexity and younger wines, which bring fresh fruit flavors and vibrancy. During their long maturing period in oak casks, Aged Tawnies undergo subtle color changes: the deep red hue which characterizes Port's youth gradually gives way to a paler reddish amber color. Graham's is known for its rich, elegant house style. This 10 Year has a full, nutty bouquet, the classic Graham's richness and a soft lingering finish.

name: Graham's Six Grapes Port 750ml
description: Port / Oporto, Douro, Portugal Graham's Six Grapes Port has always been the quintessential port, the one that people start with and the one they keep going back to. When I first tasted it I was astonished to find such a deliciously sweet yet balanced wine with so much concentration. As the years went on and I became more familiar with the port category I have grown to appreciate all the styles from vintage to tawny and colheita, but I keep coming back to Six Grapes. It offers pure hedonistic pleasure and there are times when wine doesn't need to command 100% of the attention in the room. Six Grapes is never flashy, trying to grab too much attention but it's a wonderful demure and comforting companion in any setting.

name: Osborne Seven Red Blend 750ml
description: Red / 14% ABV / Spain Remarkable berry aromas, with spicy notes and dark chocolate overtones. Its natural sweetness gives a velvety sensation to the wine and a very pleasant aftertaste.

name: Castillo de Almansa Reserva 750ml
description: Red / 14% ABV / Spain An intense deep ruby colour, the nose leads with wild plums, raisins and roasted bell peppers. A lively and elegant wine on the palate, with good structure and well balanced acid, the tannins are firm and polished. Great body with a persistent silky sensation

name: Castano Lujuria Monastrell 750ml
description: Monastrell / 13.5% ABV / Spain Blackberry, cherry and raspberry are imbued with sweet peppercorns, cedar bark and orange peel. Slightly chunky and rustic grip on the finish. Bright, simple, authentic and honest, and an ideal mid-week value red.

name: Sauza Gold Tequila 200ml
description: Gold Tequila / 40 % ABV / Mexico According to legend, when the Spanish conquistadors ran out of the brandy they brought from Europe, they began to distill a local agave drink, which became North Americaâ€™s first indigenous distilled spirit. In 1873, this golden beverage was dubbed â€œtequilaâ€ by Don Cenobio Sauza, who founded La Perseverancia Distillery in Tequila, Mexico. He became the first to export tequila to the rest of the world, and today, Sauza offers a full line of tequila. SauzaÂ® Gold, one of the pioneer spirits from the brand, is double distilled in copper pot stills at low proof to retain the full agave flavor. It offers sweet aromas of caramel and cooked agave with a lightly astringent, sweet finish. Ideal for margaritas.

name: Don Julio Reposado Tequila 375ml
description: Reposado Tequila / 40 % ABV / Mexico Don Julio Reposado Tequila is the very essence of the perfect barrel-aged tequila. With a mellow, elegant flavor and inviting aroma, the hints of dark chocolate and cinnamon lead into a rich, smooth finish. Aged for 8 months in American white-oak barrels, our amber-colored tequila is made with 100% Blue Weber Agave and is perfect for any celebration. Simply mix with grapefruit juice, fresh lime juice and agave nectar and pour over ice for a refreshing tasting Don Julio Paloma. Don Julio tequila is produced in the Highlands of Jalisco, Mexico, one of the countryâ€™s most fertile agave-growing regions. The microclimate and mineral-rich clay soil allow the blue agave plant to flourish. Each bottle of Don Julio tequila is produced here and features our NOM number â€” our seal of authenticity â€” signifying where the tequila was made. Unlike many other distilleries, La Primavera only produces our ultra-premium tequila that is crafted with the same attention to detail and passion that founder Don Julio GonzÃ¡lez embodied. Please drink responsibly.

name: 1800 Silver Tequila 375ml
description: Silver / Blanco Tequila / 40 % ABV / Mexico The best-selling 100% agave premium tequila, 1800Â® Silver follows the original formula created in the year 1800. 1800Â® Silver is crystal clear with blond highlights. Its aroma is soft, sweet, floral with fruit, spice, black peppercorns and agave notes. The smooth, clean and balanced flavor has hints of sweet prune and roasted pepper. 1800Â® Silver has a medium finish with fruity pepper fade. Best served straight, chilled or on the rocks. Garnish with a slice of lime.

name: Patron Silver Tequila 750ml
description: Silver / Blanco Tequila / 40 % ABV / Mexico The worldâ€™s first ultra-premium tequila, PatrÃ³n Silver should be savored starting with the very first sip - from the delicate aroma of fruits and citrus to the sweet and smooth taste with a light pepper finish. Itâ€™s made using a handcrafted process unique to PatrÃ³n, which gives it the perfect balance of fresh agave flavor with baked agave undertones â€“ core influencer notes youâ€™ll find in all PatrÃ³n Tequilas.

name: Patron Reposado Tequila 750ml
description: Reposado Tequila / 40 % ABV / Mexico PatrÃ³n Reposado is aged for at least two months in a combination of new and used American, French and Hungarian oak barrels. This is done to maintain the fresh agave flavors unique to PatrÃ³n that mingle in perfect harmony with hints of light oak. Finally, subtle sweet smokiness from the aging process adds yet another dimension to this incredibly smooth aged tequila.

name: BOMBAY SAPPHIREÂ® Gin 200ml
description: London Dry Gin / 47 % ABV / England, United Kingdom BOMBAY SAPPHIRE Gin is made with a unique combination of 10 hand-selected exotic botanicals from around the world. BOMBAY SAPPHIRE has an extraordinary smoothness and perfectly balanced taste. Inspiring the imagination of bartenders the world over, the aromatic flavors and crisp yet delicate finish create versatility unmatched by other gins. It can be savored in inventive long drinks or perfectly balanced martinis; in classic or contemporary cocktails.

name: BOMBAY SAPPHIREÂ® Gin 50ml
description: London Dry Gin / 47 % ABV / England, United Kingdom BOMBAY SAPPHIRE Gin is made with a unique combination of 10 hand-selected exotic botanicals from around the world. BOMBAY SAPPHIRE has an extraordinary smoothness and perfectly balanced taste. Inspiring the imagination of bartenders the world over, the aromatic flavors and crisp yet delicate finish create versatility unmatched by other gins. It can be savored in inventive long drinks or perfectly balanced martinis; in classic or contemporary cocktails.

name: Inniskillin Vidal Ice Wine 50ml
description: Ice Wine / Eiswein / 9.5 % ABV / Canada This unique Canadian product was harvested at the height of Canadaâ€™s crisp winter. Naturally frozen on the vine and then picked when the temperature drops to a frigid -10ÂºC. Only a small amount of concentrated nectar can be squeezed from each bunch. The juice is then slowly fermented at an average temperature of 15ÂºC to achieve a rich, specialty wine know as Icewine. Aromatics of tropical fruit including mango and orange dominate, on the palate fruit flavours including peach, nectarine and lemon are balanced by crisp, lively acidity.

name: Castillo de Monseran Garnacha 750ml
description: Grenache / 12.5% ABV / Spain Dark red black color. Intense plum, damson aromas almost blackberry. Soft lush palate, rich flavors of dark fruit. The tannins are present without being firm. A great wine for tomato based pasta dishes, cold cut platters and mixed tapas. Can be enjoyed chilled or not.

name: Montecillo Reserve 750ml
description: Red / 13.5% ABV / Spain Montecillo Reserva is an extraordinarily well crafted and honest Rioja wine that combines sublime intensity and aromatic finesse with an opulent body. All the wines are crafted to enjoy a long bottle life; they continue bottle ageing longer than those from other wineries in the region. Montecillo is also renowned for its female winemaker, oenologist Mercedes Garcia. Her love and passion for wine is evident in the care and quality that goes into making her wines.

name: Les Vins Bonhomme El Petit Bonhomme 750ml
description: Monastrell / 14% ABV / Jumilla, Spain Some very spicy and creamy berry-pastry aromas of ripe fruit and sweetly fragrant oak. The palate has a fresh array of rich summer berries with a plush, lithe and juicy feel.

name: Vega Sindoa Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / Spain Expressive, deep ruby color. Aromatics of white chocolate and minerality. Medium bodied with supple tannins and abundant fruit.

name: Garnacha Del Fuego 750ml
description: Grenache / 14.5% ABV / Spain Garnacha de Fuego is a young, fruit forward, authentic expression of the oldest clones of Garnacha in the world. Considered by many to be one of the finest values in the world.

name: Glorioso Crianza 750ml
description: Tempranillo / 14% ABV / Spain Glorioso Crianza is a red wine from the Rioja made by Bodegas Palacio. The Glorioso line was created in 1928 and is Bodegas Palacio's most popular brand. It includes wines made according to the traditional categories in the Rioja (Crianza, Reserva, Gran Reserva), but its ageing in French oak barrels provides the elegance and refinement that the brand is known for.

name: Tarima Monastrell 750ml
description: Monastrell / 14.5% ABV / Spain Monastrellâ€™s intensity of fruit shows throughout the wine; red plums, black cherries, and raisins, and the toasty barrel power lingers as well. There are a few green, herbal notes, and the wine finishes with a lingering warmth and toast. Drink now or in the next five years

name: Lopez de Haro Rioja Reserva 750ml
description: Red / 13% ABV / Spain Medium-high depth wine, ruby red colour with roof tile rim, which denotes its long barrel ageing and its peaceful bottle ageing. Powerful on the nose with primary aromas of ripe fruit accompanied by complex spicy and balsamic notes and a slight touch of vanilla. Balanced on the palate, it is a round and unctuous wine with ripe and sweet tannins, providing the wine with a long aftertaste: an elegant Rioja classic.

name: Juan Gil Jumilla Blue Label 750ml
description: Red / 15.5% ABV / Jumilla, Spain Mainly produced with grapes from very old Monastrell vineyards of low yield, as the Cabernet-Sauvignon and Syrah vines planted at about 700 meters of altitude, this is a very concentrated, complex and elegant wine, kept for 18 months in French and American oak barrels

name: Atteca Garnacha 750ml
description: Grenache / 15% ABV / Catalunya, Spain Rich morello cherry and plum flavors are accented by mint, orange peel and sassafras notes in this expressive red, which has soft tannins, juicy acidity and smoky finish.

name: Torres De Casta Rosado 750ml
description: RosÃ© / 13.5% ABV / Catalunya, Spain Raspberry color with subtle orangey highlights. Exciting floral (confected rose) and fruit (pomegranate, raspberry) aromas culminating in a sensual, flavorful and elegantly persistent palate.

name: Torres Vina Esmeralda Catalunya 750ml
description: Wine / 11.5% ABV / Catalunya, Spain Off-dry and intensely aromatic, this white blend offers vibrant notes of salted lime sorbet, lychee, green apple and rosewater.

name: Torres Coronas Tempranillo 750ml
description: Tempranillo / 13.5% ABV / Catalunya, Spain The Torres Coronas Tempranillo exudes a unique quality with a blend of Tempranillo and Cabernet Sauvignon grapes, the latter ingeniously planted by Miguel in his home soil over 100 years ago whilst his peers persisted solely with local varieties.

name: Torres Sangre De Toro Garnacha 750ml
description: Grenache / 14% ABV / Catalunya, Spain Familia Torres is one of the world's most admired wine brands. Sangre De Toro is deep ruby in colour, with flavours of blackberry, cherry, raspberry and plum accented by hints of roasted coffee, chocolate and vanilla spice. Serve with braised lamb, steak and kidney pie or mild curries.

name: Castano Monastrell Tinto 750ml
description: Monastrell / 14% ABV / Spain This family-owned winery is known for making top quality wines, like this one which is made with the monastrell grape. Medium ruby in colour, with lovely upfront aromas and flavours of prune, honey, dried fig and licorice. Medium-bodied and smooth, with a long finish and silky tannins, this is great for grilled flank steak.

name: MarquÃ©s De CÃ¡ceres Crianza Rioja 750ml
description: Red Blend / 13.5% ABV / Spain Attractive color with luminous highlights. Soft spice and refined oak on the nose with a depth of jammy red berry fruits. Luscious and intense on tasting with pleasant tannins that mingle with fresh and mature fruit. Finishes with delicious, long-lasting flavors.

name: Senorio de Valdesneros Roble Tempranillo 750ml
description: Tempranillo / 13% ABV / Spain It is presented with a ripe fruit (plum) and an oak present, but without excesses. In the mouth it has good acidity, it is tasty, with the tannin present and a pleasant mineral nuance.

name: Jose Cuervo Especial Gold 750ml
description: Gold Tequila / 40 % ABV / Mexico The #1 tequila brand in the world, Jose Cuervo EspecialÂ® Gold is a golden blend of reposado and younger tequilas. Its light gold color and sweet aroma has pleasant agave notes. With a sweet, subtle agave flavor and hints of oak and vanilla, EspecialÂ® Gold boasts a well-balanced, short, smooth finish.

name: Jose Cuervo Golden Margarita 750ml
description: Margarita Ready-to-Drink / 12.7 % ABV / Mexico Made with Jose CuervoÂ® Gold tequila, Grand MarnierÂ® liqueur and lime, the Cuervo Golden MargaritaÂ® is the most authentic premium ready-to-serve margarita. Its flavor profile is tart key limes and custardy lemon up front, fading into a mix of tequila and the complex orange cognac of Grand Mariner. Just chill, pour and serve, or blend with ice!

name: 1800 Silver Coconut Tequila 750ml
description: Silver / Blanco Tequila / 35 % ABV / Mexico Our signature double-distilled 1800Â® Silver Tequila infused with natural, ripe coconut flavor. With its slightly-sweet and medium-bodied tropical taste, this versatile spirit is delicious on the rocks and also tastes great mixed with pineapple juice.

name: Skinnygirl Margarita 750ml
description: Margarita Ready-to-Drink / 12.7 % ABV / Illinois, United States Skinnygirl Margarita is one of the most popular pre-made margarita drinks you'll find. Not only will you get an outstanding flavor, you'll consume fewer calories than other margaritas. This margarita is made from sweetened agave nectar, blue agave silver tequila and delicious flavors to give you a classic margarita with fewer than 100 calories per serving. The flavor is a bit tangy, making your taste buds dance. It offers a 12.7 percent alcohol content, which is a great option for an evening with the girls.

name: Olmeca Blanco Tequila 750ml
description: Silver / Blanco Tequila / 40 % ABV / Mexico Olmeca Blanco rules the night with a shot friendly flavor that rings through the ages. Directly from Los Altos highlands of Jalisco, Mexico, it carries a naturally sweet flavor that is ready to explode in any colossal moment.

name: Olmeca Gold Tequila 750ml
description: Tequila / 40 % ABV / Mexico This tequila has a fruity, sweet, slight citrus aroma with a touch of smoke and slightly woody scent. Sweet with slight honey flavour and smoky, black pepper nuances, it is clean and balanced!

name: El Jimador Reposado Tequila 375ml
description: Reposado Tequila / 40 % ABV / Mexico El Jimador Reposado is made with 100% hand-harvested Blue Weber agave, naturally fermented and double-distilled. Then it rests for two months in our own handmade American oak barrels. It has a moderately smoky flavor with lingering hint of caramel.

name: Herencia De Plata 100% Agave Reposado Tequila 750ml
description: Reposado Tequila / 40 % ABV / Mexico Clear straw color. Attractive aromas of caramelized agave, candied orange, vanilla bean, brown butter, and candied yams with a soft, dry-yet-fruity light-to-medium body and a tingling, medium-length chocolate milkshake, black licorice, and charred pineapple finish. A solid, easy-sipping reposado that will be a great go-to for cocktails.

name: Hornitos Reposado Tequila 750ml
description: Reposado Tequila / 40 % ABV / Mexico One of the oldest reposado tequilas on the market, Hornitos Reposado has been the center of the party since 1950. It was originally made to celebrate the anniversary of Mexican independence, before reposado was even a thing. The rest is history, and more than six decades later, Hornitos Reposado is beloved by shot takers and margarita lovers around the globe.

name: Camarena Reposado Tequila 750ml
description: Reposado Tequila / 40 % ABV / Mexico Familia Camarena Tequila Reposado is an award winning tequila that is incredibly smooth. Distilled exclusively in Jalisco, Mexico with 100% blue weber agave, this tequila delivers a flavor that is unmatched. Soft and smooth on the palate, this reposado tequila is best enjoyed straight or mixed in a margarita or paloma. This Reposado is aged in oak barrels for 60 days, imparting flavors of vanilla and caramel onto Camarena's natural agave sweetness.

name: Cazadores Reposado Tequila 750ml
description: Reposado Tequila / 40 % ABV / Mexico Cazadores Reposado hails from Arandas in the Mexican state of Jalisco, where the Cazadores distillery has been producing tequila since 1922. For almost a century, Cazadores has built its tequila empire on tradition, keeping its production and classic recipes a secret. In fact, as the legend goes, founder Don JosÃ© Maria perfected his recipe, wrote it down and then promptly locked it up in a box and hid it.

name: Sierra Silver Tequila 750ml
description: Tequila /38 % ABV / Azul Sierra Tequila Silver is a rested, clear Tequila. Its full, fruity, fresh aroma thatâ€™s dominated by a slight chilli note reflects both the tequilana weber azul agave, as well as slight notes of green apple and young pineapple. Nuances of pepper give Sierra Tequila Silver that certain something and make it a Tequila with personality.

name: Milagro Reposado Tequila 750ml
description: Reposado Tequila / 40 % ABV / Mexico Milagro Reposado is rested in American oak barrels for 2-4 months to achieve a perfect balance of robust flavor with front-and-center agave taste and world-class smoothness. Try it in the Paloma Rosada made with Milagro, pink grapefruit soda and fresh lime juice garnished with a grapefruit wheel.

name: Whitley Neill Original Gin 750ml
description: London Dry Gin / 43% ABV / England, United Kingdom Whitley Neill Gin is slightly softer and much smoother than traditional Gins, with rich notes of juniper and citrus, pot pourri and exotic spices. The finish is a long one, with a subtle fade of herbs, cocoa and candied lemon peels, while the nose is both citrus-sweet and peppery, with a distinctive floral aroma.

name: Beefeater London Dry Gin 375ml
description: London Dry Gin / 44 % ABV / United Kingdom Named after the Tower of London ceremonial guards, Beefeater Gin is bottled and distributed by the company James Burrough in the United Kingdom. The Beefeater distillery is one of only nine still operating in London itself. Beefeater London Dry Gin contains a lovely array of botanicals, including angelica root and seeds, juniper, coriander seeds, almonds, licorice, Seville oranges, lemon peel and orris root. The production process involves steeping these botanicals for a full 24 hours before distillation to fully extract the flavors.

name: Beefeater London Dry Gin 750ml
description: London Dry Gin / 44 % ABV / United Kingdom Named after the Tower of London ceremonial guards, Beefeater Gin is bottled and distributed by the company James Burrough in the United Kingdom. name: Las Rocas Garnacha 750ml
description: Grenache / 15.2% ABV / Calatayud, Spain Our Garnacha is a beautiful, intense red color and is filled with vibrant aromas and rich flavors of blackberry and dark cherry. These luscious fruit flavors meld with notes of oak and round tannins, creating a balanced, well-structured wine that delivers a full body and lasting finish.

name: Bodegas Volver 750ml
description: Tempranillo / 15.4% ABV / Spain The grapes for this wine come from a 72-acre vineyard called "Finca Los Juncares," which was planted in 1957. Only after very careful vineyard selections, the best vines of Tempranillo grapes are hand-harvested in small boxes to prevent bruising. Malolactic fermentation occurs in barrel, and the wine is aged in new French oak barrels for 14 months and then bottled unfiltered.

name: Mas Donis Negre 750ml
description: Red / 14% ABV / Catalunya, Spain Made from Garnacha with Tempranillo, Merlot, Cabernet and Samsao...this wine expresses fragrant blueberry and black raspberry, pretty violet notes, licorice and vanilla. It is supple and delicious, generous purple fruit and sarsaparilla roll across the palate. Fleshy and juicy it has a long fresh finish and is entirely quaffable.

name: Garland Crest Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 13% ABV / Spain Carefully selected grapes from the sun-drenched rolling Spanish hills create this excellent wine. Richly fruity with fresh blackcurrant and cherry, hints of black pepper and a lingering fruity finish. Enjoy with red meats and mature cheeses.

name: Castano Hecula Monastrell 750ml
description: Monastrell / 14% ABV / Spain Intense and shiny cherry red colour. On the nose, it blooms pleasant ripe red fruit aromas, sweet spices. It has very elegant and integrated wooden notes that do not cover its intense fruitiness.

description: 6 x 355ml cans / Seltzer / 5% ABV / USA White Claw is a refreshing hard seltzer with 5% alcohol. With only 100 calories, 2 g of carbs, and all-natural flavors in every can, White Claw is the pure refreshment for your balanced, active lifestyle. Each sip features a blend of pure seltzer water, their proprietary BrewPure alcohol, and just a hint of natural flavors. With only 100 calories, 2 g of carbs, and all-natural flavors in every can, White Claw is the pure refreshment for your balanced, active lifestyle. Each sip features a blend of pure seltzer water, their proprietary BrewPure alcohol, and just a hint of natural flavors. That's right: you won't find any preservatives, dietary fiber or crystalline fructose added to this beverage. You'll just enjoy a pure, naturally gluten-free beverage, made for any occasion. White Claw's name comes from the legendary waves formed when multiple crests join to form a singularly impressive surge, speaking to the perfect combination of flavor and fizz in every can

name: Don Simon Sangria 1.5L
description: Speciality Wine / 7 % ABV / Spain Sangria is the traditional drink of Spain, made from red wine and natural fruit extracts without preservatives and dyes. Enjoy chilled, over ice, with a slice of lemon or orange, as the ultimate summer drink.

name: Bacardi Orange Smoothie Breezer (Single)
description: 1L / Cooler / 4.6% ABV / Canada Reminiscent of orange creamsicles, the Tropical Orange Smoothie delivers flavours of sweet candied orange, creamy vanilla and a hint of coconut. Serve with grilled sausages or hot dogs, pretzels or potato chips.

name: Boone's Farm Strawberry Daiquiri 750ml
description: Speciality Wine /3.2 % ABV / California, USA Booneâ€™s Farm Strawberry Daiquiri is a flavored malt beverage that originated as an apple wine product bottled in California. Booneâ€™s Farm comes in a variety of fruit flavors. Strawberry Daiquiri has the smooth, sweet taste of Booneâ€™s Farm with the rich flavors of red berries. Itâ€™s the perfect way to satisfy your craving for something sweet and refreshing.

name: Budweiser (6 Pk)
description: 6 x 341ml bottles / Lager / 5% ABV / USA Budweiser beer is a medium-bodied, American-style lager beer. Brewed with high quality barley malt, a blend of premium hop varieties, fresh rice and filtered water, this American beer is crisp and full of flavour. Budweiser beer has 5% ABV and contains 145 calories and zero grams of fat per serving. Every occasion calls for a Budweiser; enjoy a cold beer while watching the game or grab a pack when your barbecues or social gatherings need refreshing drinks. This lager beer is the perfect companion to pizza, burgers and fried chicken, but don't let the pairings stop there. The cans and package make this beer easy to transport wherever Budweiser is needed.

name: Colt 45 (Single)
description: 710ml / Lager / 8% ABV / USA Slightly sweet and super smooth, COLT 45 is the malt liquor that works every time.

name: Old Milwaukee (15 Pk)
description: 15 x 355ml cans / Lager / 4.6% ABV / USA Old MilwaukeeÂ® is a traditional American lager beer. It was first brewed in 1849 in Milwaukee, the home of American beer, by immigrants seeking to blend local brews with the outstanding characteristics of German light lager beer. The result was a lager beer with a pleasantly light body and plenty of fizz. This slow-brewed lager beer has an enjoyable bready or doughy flavor and a pleasant aroma. Its moderate alcohol level and slightly sweet taste make this American-style lager an ideal choice for cooling off or relaxing. It's a good companion when fishing, hunting or playing a sport. It serves best chilled.
