name: Yellow Tail Sangria 750ml
description: Sangria / 11.5% ABV / Australia A delicious mix of citrus and red wine with orange rind, citrus and red berry notes that splash onto the palate with a soft sweet-citrus flavor and a hint of spirit. The finish is clean, light and delightfully refreshing. Enjoy on its own or over ice.

name: Yellow Tail Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 13.5% ABV / Australia Medium ruby red colour; candied fruit, vanilla, light spice aromas and flavours; not quite dry, medium bodied, with sweet fruit centre and a soft, lush finish.

name: Yellow Tail Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.5% ABV / Australia A blend of selected parcels of fruit from some of Australia's best growing areas, this wine reveals citrus and honeydew flavors nuanced by subtle oak aromas. The palate is soft yet fresh, with balanced acidity and a smooth, creamy finish. A great party wine.

name: Yellow Tail Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / Australia This Cabernet offers easy drinking early but will cellar with confidence. Expect cassis, violets, crushed herbs and a long, soft finish with enough concentration and texture to make the wine feel more serious.

name: Yellow Tail Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 11.5% ABV / Australia A crisp and clean wine displaying lovely aromas of passionfruit, lime, upfront fruit flavors and a refreshing finish that is simple and clean. This versatile wine is sure to please almost any crowd.

name: Yellow Tail Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 13.5% ABV / Australia Ripe Cherries and strawberries, spice, and vanilla aromas. Yellow Tail Shiraz is bold and well balanced, with earthy tones and lingering fruit on the tongue.

name: Yellow Tail Big Bold Red 750ml
description: Red / 13.5% ABV / Australia With just a touch of spice this wine is bursting with ripe dark fruits and rich, bold oak that inspired the name.

name: Batch X Sangiovese 750ml
description: Sangiovese / 14.5% ABV / Australia A full flavoured and well-rounded Sangiovese exhibiting all the hallmarks of this classic variety; dark cherry, plum and strawberry with notes of dried roses, thyme and oregano. A vibrant and complex wine showing juicy red fruit flavours with layers of soft and savoury tannins.

name: McGuigan Private Bin Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 12.5% ABV / Australia Intense rich scarlet color. Aromas of delightful dark cherry and plum aromas integrated with some smoky vanillin characters and cinnamon from the oak influence. On the palate, the flavours that are suggested by the nose come to life along with some peppery spice. The wine is smooth yet full bodied with a good mouth presence exhibiting both cherry and plum flavours as well as prominent toasty oak . An attractive firm tannin grip completes the wine.

name: McGuigan Private Bin Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 11% ABV / Australia This Chardonnay features a rich, smooth and creamy palate with sweet tropical fruit and melon flavours. It is a nicely balanced wine with a touch of caramel oak integrated with tropical melon and rich stone fruit flavours. The finish is clean and crisp with a delicate lingering presence.

name: Mallee Rock Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12.2% ABV / Australia 87% Pinot Grigio, 6% Riesling, 5% Sauvignon Blanc In order to yield their unique varietal characteristics, our grapes are sourced from a single grower along the Murray River in South East Australia. The Murray and Darling Rivers moderate temperatures of this warmer growing area, creating conditions that are ideal for a Pinot Grigio. We owe our distinct flavour to the land, but like to take a little credit in their refinement. Meticulous cool harvesting and gentle pressing, result in our fresh taste. We chill our grapes in stainless steel tanks to preserve their character and add a small percentage of Sauvignon Blanc to enhance freshness. The result â€“ a crisp white wine with standout quality of a Pinot Grigio. Prepare to savour delicious notes of green apple, fresh citrus and grapefruit. Itâ€™s an easy-drinking, medium-bodied white with a touch of minerality and a smooth finish. Perfectly food friendly and fit for raising a cheeky glass with your mates.

name: Mallee Rock Shiraz Cabernet Sauvignon Blend 750ml
description: Shiraz Cabernet Sauvignon / 14.5% ABV / Australia Grapes that bask in one of the world's best climates in selected vineyards along the renowned Limestone Coast of S.E. Australia are meticulously harvested at their peak of ripeness. This gives the Shiraz Cabernet Sauvignon bold, full bodied flavours of ripe blackberry and plum with a long, smooth finish. Perfect for food, friends or just raising a glass.

name: Oxford Landing Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 13.5% ABV / Australia A sublime Shiraz. Deep purple red in colour, it has lifted aromas of plums and black cherries with hints of violets and white pepper. The generous palate has flavours of blackberry and plum, complimented by soft, supple tannins with hints of chocolate and spice, and subtle oak influence.

name: Jacobs Creek Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.1% ABV / Australia A modern Australian Chardonnay that is complex yet easy to drink and showcases a range of varietal flavours.

name: Wolf Blass Yellow Label Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / Australia Wolf Blass Yellow Label Cabernet Sauvignon is a smooth red wine with rich flavours of dark plum, blackberry and cassis, with a hint of leafy Cabernet character adding freshness to the palate, and subtle savoury oak giving a long, structured finish. Cabernet Sauvignon pairs well with red meats, hearty pasta dishes, Cheddar cheese, broccoli, fennel, rosemary and mint. Yellow Label Cabernet Sauvignon is great with chargrilled steak with fat chips, or beef Stroganoff.

name: Wolf Blass Yellow Label Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 13.5% ABV / Australia Shiraz from the Barossa is selected for its intense aromas of blueberries, Satsuma plums and highlights of star anise, spice and chicory root. The palate is rich yet elegant, with vibrant purity of fruit and a supple, smooth and silky texture. Voluptuous fruit and subtle spicy oak are supported by a backbone of fine, structural tannin and a long, seamless finish.

name: Yalumba Organic Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.5% ABV / Australia This fully certified organic Chardonnay showcases true varietal flavours and is made in a riper and richer style without oak.

name: Yalumba Organic Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 14.5% ABV / Australia Founded in 1849, Yalumba is one of the founding members of Australia's First Families of Wine. You can expect a wine of great depth with plenty of ripe, pepper-spiced fruit and bright acidity. Look for this organically farmed and organically produced Shiraz to deliver intense plum, blackberry, black pepper, mint and violet. A fine choice for lamb with mint and coriander.

name: Nugan Estate Scruffy's Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 14% ABV / Australia Dense crimson in colour with youthful garnet hues. Aromas of blood plum and red berries entwined with hints of spice and vanillin. A full flavoured palate laden with juicy upfront fruit characters of plum and blackberry. Ripe, silky tannins with traces of black pepper and oak complete the palate.

name: Nugan Estate Drover's Hut Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.5% ABV / Australia This wine is pale straw in appearance, with lively aromas of peach and nectarine with a touch of oak in the background. Followed by a bright fruit driven palate of stone fruit, citrus and lightly toasted oak. We regard this wine for its balance, while it maintains a crisp acidity on the finish.

name: Nugan Estate Stompers Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 14% ABV / Australia The nose has good lift offering up black currant and blackberry fruit with a touch of the varietal's leafiness and a light mint element. Concentrated, yet quite lively in the palate with an abundance of ripe black fruits, there's noted vibrancy from a nice undercurrent of acidity, while riper tannins add just the right amount of tension on the backend. Supple textured and bright with impressive fruit intensity and freshness on its medium fuller frame, this has good length on its fruit driven finish. Working this for three days the wine gained more flesh and mid palate breadth without losing any vibrancy and freshness. This is impressive and represents excellent value.

name: Wolf Blass Red Label Cabernet Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / Australia Deep ruby purple colour; extra dry and medium-bodied with medium tannins; lifted aromas and flavours of coffee with cream, black plum reduction, honey and herbs; long finish.

name: Wolf Blass Red Label Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13% ABV / Australia From fresh and unoaked to the sophisticated complexity of elegant, barrel fermented styles, Chardonnay is one of the world's most loved varieties. With an array of fruit flavours from citrus to orchard and stone fruits, Chardonnay is a delight served with rich creamy pasta, seafood, chicken, roast turkey or pork.

name: Y Series Viognier 750ml
description: Viognier / 13.5% ABV / Australia This award-winning Viognier is on the fresher, lighter end of the Viognier spectrum. It shows all the unique characteristics of this exotic variety, without being too rich on the palate.

name: Y Series Shiraz Viognier 750ml
description: Shiraz Viognier / 13.5% ABV / Australia An exotic turkish delight twist on Australia's favourite grape variety. The Y Series Shiraz Viognier will intrigue the curious palate with its pretty and exotic aromatics.

name: Y Series Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 14% ABV / Australia Sublime varietal, drinking our Y Series Cabernet Sauvignon is a pure and satisfying experience. Not weighed down by excessive oak, the fruit and sense of place shines through.

name: Small Gully The Formula Robert's Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 15.9% ABV / Australia Formula for success: (three passionate partners + 40-year-old vines + estate vineyards) x a single-minded focus on quality = a powerful and savoury Shiraz with rich dark fruit, chocolate, woodsmoke and big, ripe tannins. Perfect for roasted or grilled meats.

name: Sans + Pareil 100 Million% Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 13.5% ABV / Australia Our Cabernet Merlot displays bright crimson hues. Offering red berry notes combined with dark fruit flavours. A Sicilian olive aroma stimulates the nose followed by a touch of mocha. The palate is balanced by an abundance of silky tannins for a smooth finish.

name: Jacobs Creek Moscato 750ml
description: Moscato / 7.5% ABV / Australia Jacob's Creek Moscato is light and refreshing with cool sherbet balanced by soft fruits. Tropical white peach aromas with hints of honeysuckle and lemon. Ideal for drinking with friends on a hot summer's day with a fresh fruit salad.

name: Jacobs Creek Moscato RosÃ© 750ml
description: Moscato / 11.5% ABV / Australia A fresh, fragrant and delicious, low alcohol rosÃ©. It shows perfumed aromas and flavours of ripe pear, nuts, jammy and candied fruit with watermelon sherbet notes. The palate is medium sweet and fresh with a cleansing spritz and vibrant pear and melon on the finish. Sip on its own, with fresh fruit, soft cheese or bbq.

name: Lindemans Bin 40 Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 13.5% ABV / Australia Ruby red colour; black cherry and spice on the nose; soft, round plummy flavours with a herbal notes in the finish.

name: Lindemans Bin 95 Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 12% ABV / Australia Pale straw colour; upfront aromas of grapefruit and passion fruit, with nutty and minty elements; flavour follows nose, round acidity balances nicely the wine's fresh fruit character.

name: Lindemans Bin 45 Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 14% ABV / Australia Deep garnet red colour; floral aromas of black plum and licorice with savory and honey notes; medium-bodied with plum, spice and honey flavours.

name: Lindemans Bin 65 Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.5% ABV / Australia Lindeman's is one of Australia's leading wine brands, and the ever-popular Bin 65 remains one of their flagship wines. Enjoy upfront aromas and flavours of tropical fruit, pear and a nicely balanced note of nutty oak. Light to medium bodied, with a fresh, clean finish; a perfect partner for seafood, chicken or pasta.

name: Lindeman's Bin 90 Moscato 750ml
description: Moscato / 13.5% ABV / Australia Lindeman's Bin 90 Moscato combines refreshing citrus flavors with a vibrant finish. Enjoy this Bin 90 Moscato on its own or with mild cheese, fresh fruit, pistachios or light desserts.

name: Jacobs Creek Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 14% ABV / Australia Deep ruby red colour; rich, vanilla and coating dark fruit, lifted plummy, black cherry aromas with spice accents; dry, medium bodied, with moderate tannins and light berry fruit flavours.

name: Jacobs Creek Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.7% ABV / Australia Fresh blackcurrant and dark berry fruit aromas are apparent on the nose exuding typical Coonawarra characteristics. Hints of black olive and licorice are balanced with nuances of cedar and vanilla from fine grain French oak. The palate exudes generous ripe cassis flavours with tobacco leaf, supported by subtle integration of oak leading to a rich, smooth finish.

name: Jacob's Creek Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 13.9% ABV / Australia Velvety and spicy with red currant, black cherry, and fresh mulberry.

name: Jacobs Creek Shiraz Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Shiraz Cabernet Sauvignon / 13% ABV / Australia This medium-bodied blend of Shiraz and Cabernet Sauvignon boasts flavours of blackberry and plum, with hints of pepper, smooth tannins and subtle oak.

name: Wyndham Estate Bin555 Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 14.3% ABV / Australia A medium to full bodied traditional Shiraz with distinct, rich plum and pepper characters. Parcels of the ripe fruit flavors are complexed by oak tannins, as a result of maturation in oak hogs heads for up to fifteen months, leaving a smooth, lasting finish.

name: Wyndham Estate Bin444 Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.9% ABV / Australia A fine example of the Cabernet Sauvignon variety with deep, rich colour and full berry fruit and minty flavors. The varietal fruit flavors coupled with maturation in French and American Oak has given the wine integrated structure and balance.

name: Wyndham Bin222 Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.5% ABV / Australia Distinctive varietal fruit flavors with excellent structure and length. Fresh melon and peach fruit aromas with subtle yeast and oak complexity lead to a full, soft palate highlighted, by attractive fruit flavors and a creamy, rich texture as a result of partial oak maturation.

name: Nugan Estate Durif Manuka Grove 750ml
description: Red / 14.5% ABV / Australia Durif is a rich and robust red grape variety that revels in the warm and dry conditions of the familyâ€™s Manuka Grove Vineyard at Hanwood in the Riverina. This great wine is best enjoyed with seared lamp rump or rich, caramelised veal shanks with Polenta or aged cheddar cheese. Winemaker Notes Dense inky red in appearance with a youthful crimson hue. Aromas of ripe blackberry, blood plum and cherry over aniseed and all-spice. Rich and intense flavours of black cherry, plum pudding melded with earth, chocolate and spicy vanillin undertones. Great length with ripe lingering tannins.

name: Nugan Estate 3rd Gen Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13% ABV / Australia A lovely fruit driven style. Rich and concentrated flavors of juicy mixed berries, spice and supple tannins with toasty oak nuances. Enjoy with a wide range of dishes including red meat, poultry and pasta.

name: Rosemount Diamond Label Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / Australia Rosemount continue to innovate. Their Cabernet offers bright varietal aromas of blackcurrant with a touch of oak in the background. Supple and seamless in texture.

name: Rosemount Estate Diamond Label Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 13.5% ABV / Australia The Rosemount Diamond Series Shiraz exhibits black fruit and a perky palate; juicy and easy-to-drink on the finish.

name: Rosemount Diamond Label Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.5% ABV / Australia The Rosemount Diamond Label Chardonnay has concentrated mouth-filling flavours of peachy tropical fruit and melon with a hint of fresh, lively citrus and subtle oak influence.

name: Rosemount Shiraz Cabernet 750ml
description: Shiraz Cabernet Sauvignon / 13% ABV / Australia Deep purple red; dark rye bread, blood orange and dark berry fruit character with hint of chocolate; mid-framed and bold with a spicy finish.

name: Wolf Blass Makersâ€™ Project Pink Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 13.5% ABV / Australia Markerâ€™s Project Pink Pinot Grigio is a refreshing drop that will tantalise the taste buds. Made by fermenting free run juice, and enhancing the natural pink colour of the Pinot Grigio skins, this is a light-bodied style with a crisp, dry finish, thatâ€™s packed with flavour.

name: Sans + Pareil 100 Million Percent Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 13.5% ABV / Australia This generous Shiraz offers an infusion of dark berry fruits and subtle hints of black pepper and tobacco followed by an aromatic spice, with good length.

name: Nugan Alfredo Dried Grape Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 14.5% ABV / Australia Attractive aromas of cherry and plum with dark chocolate, earth and herbaceous notes, followed by a long and complex palate of black cherry with savoury nuances and smooth velvety tannins.

name: Nugan Estate Alfredo "Second Pass" Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 14% ABV / Australia Attractive aromas of rhubarb and cherry with tobacco, dark chocolate and earth are followed by long and complex palate of ripe raspberries with dark chocolate and velvety tannins.

name: Zontes Footstep Lake Doctor Shiraz
description: Shiraz / 14.45% ABV / Australia Named after the house-cooling breeze of our â€˜Lake Doctorâ€™. These winds arrive from the Great Southern Ocean direct from Antarctica reviving our vines and vignerons alike in the peak of summer heat. Drink with anything off the grill (preferably charcoal that is), and especially a second glass. Not just about the fruit, itâ€™s earthy too and what we have always loved about Langhorne Creek is they produce cracker wines â€“ consistently! The result is a fabulously stylish Shiraz, one which offers Five Spice, juicy Plum Pudding flavour with rolling soft, fine-grained Cedar tannin.

name: Pirramimma Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 14.7% ABV / Australia Sourced from vines in excess of 30 years of age, the White Label Shiraz is a real powerhouse example of the fine Shiraz for which the McLaren Vale is so renowned. This will have the velvety texture and dense black fruit that define the region, accented with smoke, leather, coffee and spice notes. Versatile, concentrated and complex, this will be an exciting addition to your table, especially alongside grilled lamb or ribs.

name: D'Arenberg Stump Jump Grenache Shiraz 750ml
description: Grenache Shiraz / 14.1% ABV / Australia This wine screams value. A rich ruby red appearance with a fragrant nose of raspberry, a hint of dark cherry and spice. Silky texture on the palate, but with a juicy fruit core that shows plum, red berries, and a savoury finish. There are lovely soft tannins and some slight acidity. The fruit weight and silkyness means this wine can be enjoyed now, but it will keep developing over time. with minimal disease pressure and above average crop levels.

name: Hugo Grenache Shiraz 750ml
description: Grenache Shiraz / 15% ABV / Mclaren Vale, Australia clear, ruby/garnet of medium intensity. fragrant and lifted aromas of mixed toasted spice and gingerbread combine with the berry and cherry fruit to provide lovely complexity. the spicy flavours flow to the palate with some savoury notes as well as dark ripe brooding fruit characters. the flavour lingers with silky and rounded tannins.

name: Banrock Station Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 13% ABV / Australia A soft medium bodied wine exhibiting rich plum and strawberry fruit flavours balanced against a subtle oak background.

name: Carnivor Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 14.5% ABV / Australia Medium bodied wine with flavours of black & red fruit, spice and a hint of pepper.

name: Hardys Stamp Shiraz Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Shiraz Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / Australia Black cherry colour with floral, plumy and vanilla aromas and notes of toasted oak and herbs; medium body, plum and vanilla flavours with a hint of toast in the finish.

name: Hardy's Stamp Riesling GewÃ¼rztraminer 750ml
description: Riesling GewÃ¼rztraminer / 11% ABV / Australia This off-dry wine is medium bodied with aromatic citrus and offers apple, delicate tropical notes and spicy hints with a crisp, clean finish. This is a terrific value for hosting your big holiday dinner and excellent with turkey and all the trimmings. A good white wine to have on hand!

name: Wallaroo Trail Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 13.5% ABV / Australia An easy drinking wine with ripe fruit flavours. Ideal with pizza, pasta, grilled steak or a mild cheese.

name: Wallaroo Trail Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 12% ABV / Australia Wallaroo Trail Chardonnay BIN 313 is a bright yellow wine offering apricot and tropical fruit flavors such as pineapple with a hint of vanilla.

name: Oscar's Estate Shiraz Viognier 750ml
description: Shiraz Viognier / 15.9% ABV / Australia Like the dark hero on a romance novel: take me now! Brooding, full-bodied, muscular and well, you know, seductive. Black fruit aromas, savoury flavours with a long finish (most importantly). Again please, and again.

name: Oscar's Estate Vineyard Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 15% ABV / Australia Smooth and succulent and wonderfully robust with intense blackberry fruit, caramel, cocoa and shows good acid. This wine is polished in texture, glowing with plum, sage cream and spice flavors. The palate is dry, with nice fruit and a plush texture. Finishes long and lithe. The palate is dry, with nice fruit and a plush texture.

name: Penfolds Rawsons Retreat Shiraz Cabernet 750ml
description: Shiraz Cabernet / 13.5% ABV / Australia Penfolds Rawson's Retreat range was launched in 1995 as the brand's 'entry level' selection, to offer consumers Penfolds quality at affordable prices. Named in honour of the company's founder, Dr Christopher Rawson Penfold, Rawson's Retreat is easy drinking and full-flavoured, with drink-now appeal. True to Penfolds' multi-region, multi-vineyard blending policy, Rawson's Retreat is made with premium fruit sourced from a range of South Australian districts. This policy reduces the impact of vintage variation, helping winemakers produce consistent wines year after year. Colour: Bright purple-red. Nose: Spicy and savoury aromas give way to reveal dark berry, 'summer pudding' fruits. Notes of stewed beetroot and liquorice, with a whiff of oak. Palate: Fruit driven yet well structured, with approachable tannins and subtle oak underlay. Hallmark mid-palate richness and a lovely mouthfeel. Satsuma plum flavours laced with four-spice and black pepper.

name: Penfolds Rawsons Retreat Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13% ABV / Australia Rawsonâ€™s Retreat Chardonnay is made from carefully selected fruit grown across southeast Australia. It displays the expected Australian chardonnay characteristics of rock-melon and peach flavors, balanced with some pithy grapefruit notes.

name: 19 Crimes Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 16% ABV / Australia This is a bold expression of Chardonnay in the 19 Crimes lineup. Butterscotch and oak hold their own with ripe fruit layers. A great value for a popular wine from Australia.

name: 19 Crimes Shiraz Durif 750ml
description: Shiraz / 14% ABV / Australia Criminally intense vanilla aromatics are balanced with ripe raspberry and plum fruits. Full and round bright-red wine with crimson hues that give way to subtle sweetness on the palate.

name: 19 Crimes Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / Australia A conversation starter. A Cabernet Sauvignon as intense as its Australian homeland, this wine breaks out rich vanilla and red berry flavors. Firm tannins and a bold body make this a pair with grilled red meats.

name: Hogshead Old Vine Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 13.5% ABV / Australia Hogshead is an extension of the partnership between South Australian winegrower Jim Zerella and Nicholas Crampton. Hogshead Shiraz is an opulently flavoured and full bodied Shiraz, classically South Australian, and perfectly suited to barbecued red meats and other big flavours. Sourced from a combination of established, dry-grown vineyards in central South Australia and low-yielding McLaren Vale and Barossa Valley vineyards. Wines are made and matured by Jim Zerella in McLaren Vale. 54% Lower Murray, 33% McLaren Vale, 13% Barossa Valley

name: Lindemans Gentleman's Collection Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 12% ABV / Australia This vibrant ruby red wine offers pronounced aromas of dark fruit, toast, dried fig, spice and cedar. The palate is rich and medium to full with moderate acid and medium tannins carrying flavours of dark fruit and berries, toast, spice and cedar followed by a soft finish.

name: Penfolds Koonunga Hill Shiraz Cabernet 750ml
description: Shiraz Cabernet / 13.5% ABV / Australia First produced in 1978, this classic Australian blend is named after Penfoldâ€™s renowned Barossa Valley vineyard. The 62% Shiraz shines through, with rich and spicy aromas and flavors of red and black fruits. Pure, generous and well made. Always a reliable weekday red.

name: Penfolds Koonunga Hill Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13% ABV / Australia Koonunga Hill Chardonnay reflects Penfolds' multi-region, multi-vineyard blending policy, which enables winemakers to source the best parcels of fruit to produce consistently high quality wines from each vintage. A light to medium bodied Chardonnay with distinctive primary fruit characters, sustained intensity and a subtle underlay of moderate oak.

name: Black Chook Shiraz Viognier 750ml
description: Shiraz Viognier / 14.5% ABV / Australia The Black Chook is another fantastic 'big fruit' style from Ben Riggs. The nose is complex with aromas of black cherries and violets and the palate is rich and spicy with great mouth feel and excellent length.

name: Thomas Goss Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 14.5% ABV / Australia The Shiraz grapes used to make this wine have been sourced from select vineyards in McLaren Vale including those planted on the original Goss property. With dominant winter rainfall, warm, dry summers that are tempered by the proximity to the Gulf St. Vincent and low humidity, McLaren Vale has one of the most consistent climates in which to grow premium wine grapes, particularly Shiraz. The wine made by Ben Riggs and his winemaking team, this wine has a long, soft and juicy palate and lush mouthfeel, bursting with blackberry, blueberry jam and liquorice. This wine guarantees a true Australian Shiraz experience best enjoyed over the next 7 years.

name: 19 Crimes Shiraz Grenache Mataro 750ml
description: Shiraz Grenache / 14.5% ABV / Australia Nineteen crimes turned criminals into colonists. Upon conviction British rogues guilty of a least one of the 19 crimes were sentenced to live in Australia, rather than death. This punishment by "transportation" began in 1783 and many of the lawless died at sea. For the rough-hewn prisoners who made it to shore, a new world awaited. As pioneers in a frontier penal colony, they forged a new country and new lives, brick by brick. This wine celebrates the rules they broke and the culture they built.

name: Peter Lehmann Futures Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 14.5% ABV / Australia On the palate, an outstanding quality, classic Barossa Shiraz. Features powerful mouth-filling velvety fruit characters on the middle palate, and finishes long with soft tannins and beautifully integrated oak. Excellent with braised lamb shanks, rare beef, and richly flavoured casseroles.

name: Peter Lehmann Portrait Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 14.5% ABV / Australia Deep red/black color with a rich bouquet of chocolate and black forest fruits. This is a full bodied wine with soft, velvet tannins and a long finish.

name: Layer Cake Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 14.9% ABV / Australia 2011 was an unusual year in South Australia. The 2010 drought finally ended, leading into a cooler than average growing season. For Shiraz, slower development means deep, rich, concentrated flavors while still maintaining great balance and acidity. The aromas of cocoa, warm spice and dark fruit are very powerful from the first sniff. In the mouth, the wine is layered with rich blackberry, dark cherries and hints of dark, creamy chocolate ganache. The finish lingers on, hanging on your palette while the fruit and spice flavors slowly change and fade.

name: Barossa Valley Estate Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / Australia Barossa Valley Estate wines are a contemporary expression of the wines that made the Barossa Valley great. They capture the distinctive elegance, finesse and vibrant fruit flavors of one of the world's most celebrated wine regions. Cabernet Sauvignon is regarded as the King of red wines and itâ€™s not hard to see why. In the Barossa Valley itâ€™s very much a commanding style of wine, but also highly expressive and wonderfully complex. Always the center of attention. Barossa Valley Estate Cabernet Sauvignon has expressive dark plum with a seductive blackcurrant richness.

name: Wirra Wirra Church Block Cabernet Sauvignon Shiraz Merlot 750ml
description: Red / 14.5% ABV / Australia Rich, generous palate with plush sweet fruit. The wine is full with juicy plums and dark cherries, supported by lingering textural tannins. Oak plays a minor yet complimentary role supporting the wine with cedary complexity and a structural backbone leading to a long lingering fruit finish. Pair with pan fried fillet steak with shallot, mushroom and Madeira sauce.

name: Wynns Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 13.5% ABV / Australia Since 1952 this wine has long upheld Wynns Coonawarra Estateâ€™s reputation as a producer of premium Coonawarra Shiraz. Typically, the Wynns Coonawarra Estate Shiraz has aromas reminiscent of ground black pepper, mulberry and raspberry, with blackberry at the riper end of the spectrum. Oak is used increase the wineâ€™s complexity, without dominating its distinctive, cool-climate character. A medium-bodied wine with a lengthy finish that will age gracefully in the tradition of the original Wynns 'Hermitage' wine.

name: Angus The Bull Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 14% ABV / Australia When it comes to winemaking, our philosophy is to make the absolute, hands-down perfect accompaniment for a prime piece of beef. Every year we work with our growers across Central Victoria with this in mind, hand selecting premium parcels of Cabernet Sauvignon grapes. This multi-vineyard approach allows us to deliver our signature style. This creates the best possible blend for that satisfying moment when Angus the Bull meets red meat in your mouth.

name: Peller Family Vineyards RosÃ© 4L
description: RosÃ© / 11.5% ABV / Canada A light-bodied wine with sweet strawberry on the palate and a refreshingly crisp finish.

name: Peller Family Vineyards Pinot Grigio 4L

name: Peller Family Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc 4L
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 12% ABV / Canada A refreshing white wine with plenty of citrus and apple flavours.

name: Cono Sur Tocornal Cabernet Sauvignon Merlot 3L
description: Red / 12% ABV / Chile Deep purple ruby colour; dry, soft red fruit character with a hint of cedar; extra dry and medium bodied with balanced acidity and ripe, supportive tannins.

name: Apothic Red 3L

This smooth and rich red blend is medium bodied and pairs with wherever the night may take you. Apothic Red is best enjoyed with plenty of wine glasses to share.

name: Lindeman's Bin 85 Pinot Grigio 3L
description: Pinot Grigio / 12.5% ABV / Australia Pale straw colour, melon, soft tangerine and citrus aromas. Dry, medium body, apricot and citrus flavour with clean, refreshing finish.

name: Lindeman's Bin 50 Shiraz 3L

This is superb value and taste for the price.

name: Bodacious Red 4L
description: Red Blend / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Medium ruby in colour; aromas of sweet black cherry, strawberry and candied fruit; off-dry with the same flavours as detected on the nose.

name: Bodacious White 4L
description: White Blend / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada Pale straw colour; aromatic floral nose; off-dry and fruity with floral and peach notes on the palate.

name: Jackson-Triggs Shiraz 4L

name: Jackson-Triggs Sauvignon Blanc 4L

Try this wine with grilled swordfish, Thai green curry, fresh salads with goats cheese and feta, asparagus, avocado, grilled red peppers, fennel, mango or papaya.

name: Jackson Triggs Chardonnay 4L
description: Chardonnay / 11.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Our Chardonnay is dry and full-bodied with fragrant aromas of ripe apples and pears. A hint of oak and butter combine for a lingering, complex finish.

name: Jackson-Triggs Merlot 4L
description: Merlot / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada A delicious medium bodied red wine, with notes of oak, vanilla, cherry and plum both on the nose and the palate

name: The Ned Pinot Noir 750ml

This vibrant fruit core is underpinned by savoury notes of green tea, spice and a delicious French oak toast. Beautiful fruit concentration on the palate complemented by fine tannin and balanced acidity ensure a deliciously long finish.

name: The Ned Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

name: Whitehaven Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir / 13.5% ABV / New Zealand A medium bodied wine with a silky texture and a supple tannin structure. The red fruit flavours and oak spice flavours linger on the long finish.

name: Whitehaven Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

Each glass boasts the long, clean finish of classic Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc.

name: Babich Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

Fruit salad entry over a base of apple, nice herbals again with mineral and citrus on the finish. Creamy mid-palate. This is a classic Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc which is consistently produced in a fuller, riper, softer style that develops well. Clean, fresh and tropical, with fruit from several vineyards situated throughout Marlborough.

name: Oyster Bay Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 12.5% ABV / Marlborough, New Zealand The philosophy of Oyster Bay is to produce fine, distinctively regional wines that are elegant and assertive with glorious fruit flavors. From the famed home of cool climate flavor intensity, Oyster Bay Marlborough Chardonnay is a delightful breath of fresh air and displays a style of its own. Its assertive and refreshing flavors are captured and partnered with subtle oak, bringing a delicate texture to the wine. Oyster Bay Chardonnay is one of the worldâ€™s great Chardonnay styles with elegantly fragrant white peach, vibrant citrus and a delightful creamy texture.

name: Prophecy Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 12% ABV / Marlborough, New Zealand Our Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc hails from New Zealand and is crisp like the cool sea air of the South Island. This wine is refreshing and light bodied with layers of grapefruit, lychee and Meyer Lemon with a crisp clean finish. Pairs with grilled seafood and vegetables, light fish, light pastas and salads.

name: Stoneleigh Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13% ABV / New Zealand Looking for something to please everyone? This famed New Zealand white has classic sauvignon blanc bright aromas and flavours of citrus, gooseberry, herbs and tropical fruit. It's excellent with scallop-and-chorizo bites.

name: Matua RosÃ© 750ml
description: RosÃ© / 13% ABV / Marlborough, New Zealand Escape the everyday. This bottle elevates superb dry rosÃ©: vibrant acidity and fresh fruit flavors. Refreshing to sip by the pool or pair with small bites or fresh salads.

name: Matua Sauvignon BlancÂ 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13% ABV / Marlborough, New Zealand Perfect for a fun, uplifting get-together. Explore the pioneer in New Zealand Sauvignon Blanc, a balanced mouthfeel packed with crisp citrus notes and a hint of vibrant passionfruit and basil.

name: Monkey Bay Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 14% ABV / Marlborough, New Zealand Monkey Bay Sauvignon Blanc White Wine is a fresh, lively, approachable wine overflowing with notes of grapefruit, lemon, and passionfruit, and infused with a delicate, herbaceous character. Made with New Zealand grapes that enjoy a long, even ripening season, Monkey Bay Sauvignon Blanc offers lovely fresh fruit flavors. Each sip of this New Zealand white wine transports you to paradise with aromas of vibrant grapefruit, kiwi, and pineapple along with a hint of freshly cut grass. Enjoy a glass of this white wine on its own or pair it with chicken, sea bass, or shellfish. Monkey Bay wines are full of easy-drinking style and charm that reflect New Zealandâ€™s laid-back lifestyle; theyâ€™re perfect for any social occasion. Varietal: 100% sauvignon blanc. Please enjoy our wines responsibly.

name: Cupcake Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13% ABV / Marlborough, New Zealand Cupcake Vineyards' Sauvignon Blanc is a vibrant, crisp wine that comes from vineyards in the South Island of New Zealand, where the cool growing season allows our grapes to mature slowly and gain character and complexity. We work with growers in the Wairau and Awatere Valleys to explore the different soil profiles of the region for maximum complexity. The grapes are then harvested at night and promptly pressed to undergo cool fermentation in 100% stainless steel tanks. An extended fermentation sur lie adds richness, complementing the fruitâ€™s natural zest and acidity. This bright wine has flavors of Meyer lemon, white nectarine and Key lime that integrate with subtle hints of grapefruit, gooseberry and citrus, culminating into a long, balanced finish. Pair oysters on the half shell, creamy lobster risotto or a picnic in the park.

name: Oyster Bay Sauvignon BlancÂ 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13% ABV / Marlborough, New Zealand The philosophy of Oyster Bay is to produce fine, distinctively regional wines that are elegant and assertive with glorious fruit flavors. Oyster Bay Sauvignon Blanc is the wine that started it all. Which happened to win the best Sauvignon Blanc in the world. Its brilliant clarity, extraordinary aromatic flavors and refreshing zest are both thrilling and enthralling. Flavors that are uniquely Marlborough, and undeniably Oyster Bay. Enticing citrus notes and tropical flavors â€“ youthful, elegant and fresh with a lingering, zesty finish. Oyster Bay Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc is ideal as an aperitif or perfectly matched with raw and grilled seafood such as salmon and tuna, calamari, crab cakes, Cajun and spicy dishes, and fresh Asian flavors.

name: Oyster Bay Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir / 13.5% ABV / Marlborough, New Zealand The philosophy of Oyster Bay is to produce fine, distinctively regional wines that are elegant and assertive with glorious fruit flavors. Oyster Bay Marlborough Pinot Noir is elegant, cool climate Pinot Noir at its best â€“ sublime, stylish, and silky-smooth. Aromatic cherry, bright red berry, and juicy black plum, with a lingering, smooth, and seductive texture. Oyster Bay Marlborough Pinot Noir is ideal as an aperitif or perfectly matched with red meats, ribs and game, grilled salmon, tuna and game fish, Asian flavors, smoky flavors such as bacon, fruit sauces and rich jus, and soft and hard cheeses.

name: Oyster Bay Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12.5% ABV / New Zealand The philosophy of Oyster Bay is to produce fine, distinctively regional wines that are elegant and assertive with glorious fruit flavors. With flavor intensity and hallmark aromatic characteristics, Oyster Bay Hawkeâ€™s Bay Pinot Gris captures the delicate aromatic flavors of Pinot Gris while retaining its natural vibrancy and purity. Its perfumed notes and soft hints of ginger introduce a soft yet, delicate style with fresh citrus vitality that dances across your tongue. A unique cool climate expression of this wonderful varietal. Delicately scented pear and nectarine, a graceful stonefruit and floral backdrop with lively crisp apple freshness.

name: Kim Crawford Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.5% ABV / Marlborough, New Zealand Kim Crawford Chardonnay White Wine is an approachable and full-bodied white wine that shows great length and persistence. It has a medium weight with aromas of ripe tropical fruit, including pineapple and ripe melon. This chardonnay wine offers a creamy texture and hints of butterscotch, lemon meringue pie, ripe stone fruit and citrus. Kim Crawford Chardonnay contains grapes grown in selected vineyards in Marlborough and Hawkeâ€™s Bay on the East Coast of New Zealand. Exposed to plenty of sunlight and carefully selected, these grapes create an approachable, fruit-forward chardonnay wine. Secondary malolactic fermentation during the winemaking process gives nuttiness and generous mouthfeel. Serve this bottle of wine with a tasty salmon dish or other white meat favorites. This delicious table white wine is also an ideal choice for your next wine and cheese party. Serve chilled for optimal taste. Making it Amazing with Kim Crawford wine. Please enjoy our wines responsibly.

name: Kim Crawford Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13% ABV / Marlborough, New Zealand Kim Crawford Sauvignon Blanc White Wine is fresh and juicy with ripe, tropical flavors of passion fruit, melon, and stone fruit. Each sip of wine reveals classic Marlborough sauvignon blanc aromas of lifted citrus, tropical fruit, and crushed herbs, along with vibrant acidity and plenty of weight and length on the palate. This New Zealand sauvignon blanc is made with grapes specially selected from vineyards in Marlborough's Wairau Valley and the neighboring Awatere Valley. The climate and fast-draining soil in this region offer winemakers a selection of grapes that deliver the consistently flavorful wine for which Kim Crawford is known. Pair this Kim Crawford white wine with fresh oysters, asparagus, lobster, or a light salad. For optimal taste, refrigerate this sauvignon blanc wine for at least two hours then serve chilled. Make it Amazing with Kim Crawford wine. Please enjoy our wines responsibly. Â© 2020 Constellation Imports, Rutherford, CA USA

name: Kim Crawford Pinot Gris 750ml
description: Pinot Gris / 13% ABV / Marlborough, New Zealand Kim Crawford Pinot Gris White Wine brings you a crisp, fresh wine with vibrant, fruity flavors. This pinot gris introduces the delicious flavor of Braeburn apples with wonderfully lifted tree fruit aromatics of ripe pear, alongside honey and floral notes. Grown in the wine-making region of Marlborough, New Zealand, this Kim Crawford wine starts with pinot gris grapes crushed and direct pressed utilizing minimal skin contact. The clarified juice is then cool fermented to bring out the flavor and intensity of this white wine. Using five different yeasts, the taste of Braeburn apples becomes more pronounced. The final result is a pinot gris wine that's full-bodied and has a clean, fresh finish. Pair this wine with antipasto, fresh seafood or rack of lamb, or enjoy on its own. To enjoy this pinot gris wine at its absolute freshest, refrigerate for at least two hours and serve chilled. Make it Amazing with Kim Crawford wine. Please enjoy our wines responsibly. name: CousiÃ±o-Macul Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 14% ABV / Chile These good value wines will delight your palate and let you explore the world of Bordeaux inexpensively.

name: Copper Moon Malbec 4L
description: Malbec / 14% ABV / B.C, Canada An appealing red colour and a bouquet of vanilla, chocolate and field berries is complimented by cherry and black currant. Copper Moon Malbec has a smooth medium body with a complex flavour profile encompassing dark red berries, cherry and black currant. Light oak notes and a bit of spice linger on the finish. Pairs with steak, ribs and other richly flavored foods.

name: Copper Moon Sauvignon Blanc 4L
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Pale yellow colour with a fresh aroma of green apple, citrus, grass and gooseberry. Copper Moon Sauvignon Blanc is a light bodied wine with refreshing flavours of apple, peach and citrus, which also lingers on the finish. Pairs well with grilled pork, chicken with herbs and mixed salads.

name: Copper Moon Cabernet Sauvignon 4L
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13% ABV / B.C, Canada Garnet colour with a bouquet of red berries, cherry, spice and a touch of smoke. description: Merlot / 12% ABV / Chile Native from Bordeaux, France, is elegant by nature. Flexible, of soft tannins, expresses freshness and sweetness. name: PKNT Merlot 750ml

name: PKNT Carmenere 750ml

name: CousiÃ±o-Macul Sauvignon Gris 750ml
description: Sauvignon Gris / 13.3% ABV / Chile Isidora Sauvignon Gris presents a bright and clean yellowish color. In nose we can perceive aromas that remind us of peach, fresh pineapple and floral notes. It has a high acidity in mouth and peach notes are confirmed. It is a fresh wine with a long lasting mouthfeel.

name: CousiÃ±o-Macul Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 14% ABV / Chile An intense deep ruby red color, clear and bright, the 2010 vintage presents itself with a marked bouquet of ripe berries typical of the Maipo valley. The aromas then give way to mature plums and spice. In mouth, it is fresh, with good acidity and firm, velvety tannins and light notes of black fruits, typical of the variety. This is an ideal wine to accompany all types of red meats, such as beef or pork ribs, as well as cold cuts and dishes with medium to spicy seasoning.

name: Montes Alpha Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 14.5% ABV / Colchagua Valley, Chile This Cabernet Sauvignon is sourced primarily from Montes' Finca Apalta Estate vineyard with some additions from their MarchigÃ¼e Estate vineyard. A ruby red, deep-colored wine. On the nose its an elegant, complex and intense wine with violets and red fruits evocations of blackberry, chocolate, black pepper and cigar box aromas while its affinity with oak lends vanilla and coffee notes, producing a wine in perfect balance of real finesse and class, a really outstanding Cabernet Sauvignon.

name: Errazuriz Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 13.5% ABV / Chile A range of fruity aromas, such as plums, on the nose. Once the wine opens in the glass, it expands into soft toasty oak mingled with fruity notes of sweet cranberries and aromas that evoke a freshly baked cherry pie.

name: Errazuriz CarmenÃ¨reÂ 750ml
description: CarmenÃ¨re / 13.5% ABV / Chile Superb growing season characterized by its cool conditions, particulary in the northern and coastal areas of Chile. Spring was marked by cool temperatures and rains concentrated in the month of October that recharged the soils and provides enough water for the plants to grow well early on. Elegance and balance are the key descriptors of this season, with fine grain tannins, great colors and long finish. CarmenÃ¨re stands out for its spicy notes and elegance.

name: Errazuriz Cabernet SauvignonÂ 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 14% ABV / Chile The grapes for our 2013 Cabernet Sauvignon Reserva come from our vineyards located in the Maipo and Aconcagua valleys. The Maipo Valley is known for the fresh morning breezes that blow from the mountains, and for the moderate day temperatures that allow the grapes to reach perfect ripeness preserving their acidity and freshness. One of the main factors that allow obtaining intense colours in the wines from this area is the large temperature oscillation. The alluvial soils are moderately fertile and have a stony profile that provides excellent drainage, producing a perfect balance of vegetative growth and fruit load. The Aconcagua Valley, on the other hand, is well known for its Mediterranean climate, with moderately warm summer days and fresh evening breezes, producing a daily temperature oscillation of around 20ÂºC in the weeks prior to harvest. This triggers high concentrations of polyphenols â€“anthocyanins- creating wines with great colour intensity. The soils of the vineyard are mainly of alluvial origin, formed by the Aconcagua River, and are generally well known for their good drainage

name: Errazuriz Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13.5% ABV / Chile Our Casablanca Single Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc has a pale yellow colour with greenish hues. Expressive and delicately intense on the nose, it offers notes of citric and tropical fruits such as grapefruit and passion fruit entwined with aromas of tomato leaves and green chili peppers. Of medium body, this expressive and elegant Sauvignon Blanc replicates the same aromas on the palate combining them with a balanced acidity in its long, and persistent ending.

name: Santa Rita Reserva Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 14% ABV / Chile From the Maipo Valley. Intense, ruby-red in colour, this wine has a bouquet dominated by fresh ripe fruits, such as berries and spicy notes from the oak barrels. medium-bodied, very silky, and well-balanced with good acidity, the wine is long and pleasing on the finish. Pair with stews and casseroles, paellas, pastas, and soft cheeses.

name: Santa Rita Reserva Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13.5% ABV / Chile This wine has a brilliant yellow color with green hues. Its intense aroma is a fragrant blend of citrus fruit and maracuya with a herbaceous backdrop typical of this variety. On the palate, it is concentrated, with a pleasant acidity that highlights its freshness, firm structure and excellent persistence.

name: Santa Rita Secret Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / Chile Color: Intense ruby red. Bouquet: Ripe black fruit, plums and fine herbs, gracefully combined with vanilla, cloves and fragrant spices. Taste: Complex body mingles soft tannins with a rich texture. Serving Suggestions: Ideal with red meats, pork, pasta and assorted cheeses.

name: Santa Rita 120 Cabernet SauvignonÂ 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / Chile Deep ruby purple color; forward aromas and flavours of coffee, cassis, licorice and smoke; extra dry, medium bodied, with supportive medium tannin and balanced acidity; long finish.

name: Carmen Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml

name: Carmen Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13.5% ABV / Valle Central, Chile A fruity white wine with an intense and lingering bouquet, featuring balanced natural acidity; refreshing on the palate, and a fresh and elegant aroma.

name: Santa Rita 'Medalla Real' Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / Maipo Valley, Chile A fresh and nicely detailed cabernet with a wealth of fresh, ripe red berries and plums that lead to a palate that has a very nicely crafted tannin texture. Good depth of flavor, too. Drink or hold

name: Emiliana Coyam 750ml
description: Red / 14.5% ABV / Colchagua Valley, Chile Emiliana, the largest organic winery in the world, strives to evoke the purest possible expressions of their terroir. Named for the oak forests in Colchagua, this blend is mostly Syrah and CarmenÃ¨re but can include up to seven other varietals such as Cabernet Sauvignon, MourvÃ¨dre and Petit Verdot. Look for spicy dark berry fruit tinged with smoky herbs.

name: Carmen Gran Reserva Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13.5% ABV / Chile This is a fruity white with an intense and lingering bouquet, with a good structure in the mouth, featuring balanced natural acidity; refreshing on the palate, and a fresh and elegant aroma.

name: Carmen Merlot Gran Reserva 750ml
description: Merlot / 14% ABV / Chile This Gran Reserva Merlot has an intense deep dark ruby colour. The nose is dominated by blackberry, ripe plums, liquorice and soft roasted coffee hints. Our Gran Reserva Merlot has lots of flesh, round tannins and good structure. The wine has good depth and a vibrant finish with lots of varietal character.

name: Carmen Cabernet Sauvignon Gran Reserve 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 14% ABV / Maipo Valley, Chile Clear, deep ruby colour; upfront aromas of smoke, cassis and chocolate; extra dry and medium to full bodied with rich flavours of smoky cassis and plum that lead to a long finish.

name: Carmen Gran Reserva Carmenere 750ml
description: Carmenere / 14.3% ABV / Chile A red wine with an intense, violet-ruby colour. The bouquet is fruity with strong plum, cherry, and mulberry notes. The aroma also has a vegetable edge of ripe red pepper, and the flavour is complex, with jams, spinach, and chocolate. Barrel aging lends this wine pleasant smoky and toast notes, bringing out its spices; texture is soft, with rounded tannins and medium body.

name: Vina Leyda Reserva Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir / 13.5% ABV / Chile This beautiful Pinot Noir is bright ruby red in colour, with a bouquet of fresh strawberries and cherry aromas, and juicy full ripe berry flavours with a hint of minerality on the palate.

name: Santa Carolina Cabernet Sauvignon Reserva 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 14% ABV / Colchagua Valley, Chile The grapes used in this wine are sourced from our vineyards in Miraflores and Los Lingues estates in the Colchagua valley. The mild Mediterranean climate of this valley features warm and dry summers with rainfall occurring mostly during winter. These conditions are most favorable for the production of healthy grapes with excellent ripeness and concentration that result in flavorful and refined wines.

name: Santa Carolina Reserva Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13% ABV / Chile This Sauvignon Blanc is sourced from our vineyards in the Leyda Valley. Cool sea breezes from the Pacific Ocean blow through this newly discovered wine region to counter-balance its otherwise dry climate. Its rolling hillsides are as close as 5 km (3 mi.) from the salty waters, and it is separated by the Coastal Range in the west, which leaves it isolated and makes it a unique place for viticulture. The cool conditions and long ripening periods make it an ideal place for Sauvignon Blanc, yielding wines with crisp and lean acidity.

name: Santa Carolina Merlot Reserva 750ml
description: Merlot / 14% ABV / Chile The grapes that make up this wine comes from Miraflores and Los Lingues Estates, both located in Andes foothills in the Colchagua Valley. Hardly known a decade ago, Colchagua is now becoming one of the most celebrated regions in Chile. The combination of deep rocky soils and a warm, dry climate cooled by mountain breezes make it ideal for producing a ripe and mature Merlot.

name: Emiliana Adobe Chardonnay  750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.6% ABV / Chile A clear, pale yellow wine with refreshing citrus aromas of grapefruit and lime. These mix beautifully with the subtle tropical fruit aromas, especially pineapple. Balanced, fresh and fruity on the palate, its finish is long and persistent.

name: Veramonte Organic Reserva Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13.5% ABV / Chile This 100% Sauvignon Blanc is produced in the Casablanca valley from organic grapes. Vibrant and aromatic, with citrus aromas of lime and tangerine, blended with subtle floral notes. Smooth and fresh, this wine has a great mouthfeel and a long finish.Perfect with oysters, white fish and salads. Serve well chilled.

name: La Playa Estate Series Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13% ABV / Chile A delicate pale gold. On the nose, aromas of lemon, fresh pineapple with hints of lavender. It is a bright well balanced wine with a clean minerality on the finish.

name: La Playa Estate Series Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 13.1% ABV / Chile A pleasant garnet color. On the nose, plums, blackberries with hints of toasted oak. The palate has pronounced blueberry with good balance and a soft finish.

name: Manso de Velasco Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml

name: Las Mulas Merlot Reserva Organic 750ml
description: Merlot / 13.5% ABV / Central Valley, Chile Deep ruby with purple highlights; the nose offers upfront aromas of cassis, herbs and spices; the velvety palate is dry, light to medium-bodied with moderate acidity and tannins with concentrated flavours of cassis and herbs followed by a medium finish.

name: Miguel Torres Las Mulas Cabernet Sauvignon Reserve 750ml

name: Miguel Torres Las Mulas Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13% ABV / Central Valley, Chile Pale yellow, with aromas reminiscent of ripe tropical fruits with touches of citrus. Silky palate with good acidity and a long finish. Enjoy as an aperitif or with fish dishes.

name: Miguel Torres Las Mulas Cabernet Sauvignon Rose 750ml
description: RosÃ© / 13.5% ABV / Chile Delicious with sushi or summer berry salads!

name: Tinga Merlot Reserve 750ml

name: Novas Gran Reserva CarmÃ©nÃ¨re Cab Sauvignon Organic 750ml
description: Red / 14.5% ABV / Colchagua Valley, Chile Deep ruby colour; bursting with aromas of chocolate, cassis, licorice and smoky oak; extra-dry, medium to full-bodied; predominant flavours of chocolate, cassis, spice and smoke; ripe, coating tannins and a warm lasting finish.

name: Strathcona Spirits Barrel Aged Gin 750ml
description: Aged Gin / 40 % ABV / Canada Aged in virgin American white oak whiskey barrels, this smokin', oaken gin is a whiskey drinker's botanical dream. Ten lovely botanicals include wild-foraged juniper from the Alberta Badlands and rogue-picked Seaberry from the streets of Edmonton. Slow distilled, then blessed with the Midas touch by time, fire and oak. Enjoy on its own, or in a gin or whiskey cocktail.

name: Tanqueray Flor de Sevilla Gin 750ml
description: Modern Gin / 41.3 % ABV / England, United Kingdom Charles Tanqueray created Flor De Sevilla after a journey to the orange groves of Spain. Bittersweet Seville oranges augment Tanqueray gin and its core four botanicals and deliver a spirit that evokes the Mediterranean. Aromas and flavours of oranges, grapefruit and juniper taper to a long, warming finish. Enjoy with tonic.

name: Gato Negro Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13% ABV / Chile Garnet red with browning edge; Sweet blackberry jam, mint and leather aromas; Dry, light-medium body, soft fruit and soft tannin; mature dry wine with fruity, moderate finish.

name: Tanqueray Malacca Gin 700ml
description: Modern Gin / 40 % ABV / England, United Kingdom Embark on a flavor expedition as we take gin into uncharted territory with Tanquerayâ„¢ Malacca Gin. Our 82.6 proof gin is made with a mix of exotic botanicals, such as peppercorn, rose and cloves. With floral notes of lavender and jasmine, this Malaysian-inspired gin is mixed with a distinctive depth of spice for a mischievously complex and flavorful gin. Simply mix with sweet vermouth and Italian aperitif bitters in a lowball glass and garnish with an orange twist for a refreshing tasting Tanquerayâ„¢ Negroni. Includes one 82.6 proof 1 L bottle of Tanquerayâ„¢ Malacca Gin. Tanqueray was developed over 180 years ago by Charles Tanqueray, a clergyman's son who chose not to follow the family calling and instead opened a distillery in Bloomsbury, London. Not afraid to mix up brave ideas in his own unique style, he invented a gin which is still celebrated to this day. Please drink responsibly.

name: Tanqueray London Dry Gin 1.14L

Its nose is mineral and citric, with herbal hints and notes of white flowers and melon, which anticipate a balanced and refreshing mouth that culminates in a long, mineral finish. Overall, this is an expressive, delicate, juicy and balanced Sauvignon Blanc.

name: Cono Sur Bicicleta Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir / 13.5% ABV / Chile Our â€œPinot Noir projectâ€ started in 1999, with the aim of producing the best Pinot Noir in Chile: unique, expressive and proud of its New World roots, while vinified according to the Burgundian tradition. name: Hendrick's Gin 750ml
description: Modern Gin / 44 % ABV / Scotland Hendrick's is the result of combining two different spirits from rare and unusual stills: the Bennet still and the Carter-Head still. The exceptionally smooth gin features a nice balance of subtle flavors, which include wonderful notes of flowers, fruits, roots and seeds from across the world. In fact, the Wall Street Journal has described Hendrick's as the "Best Gin in the World."

name: Cono Sur Bicicleta Viognier 750ml
description: Viognier / 13.5% ABV / Chile A bright Viognier with apricot, peach and orange aromas together with a fresh stone fruit palate.

name: Hayman's London Dry Gin 750ml
description: London Dry Gin / 40 % ABV / England, United Kingdom Crafting spirits since 1863, Hayman's has used the same family recipe since day one. This gin pours clear and has aromas and flavours of citrus, juniper, spice, coriander and white flower. Medium-bodied and fruity, with a refreshingly crisp finish, this is ideal to pair with smoked salmon or use it in gin-based cocktails.

name: Cono Sur Bicicleta Merlot 750ml

name: Calina Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5% ABV / Chile Cabernet is dark red in color, dense and ripe with notes of cherries, blackberries, cedar, spice and cola. These complex full bodied flavors and soft tannins create a long, elegant finish.

name: Calina CarmenÃ¨re 750ml

name: Vino De Eyzaguirre Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13% ABV / Colchagua Valley, Chile Rich, deep burgundy. Aromatic profile features red apples and raspberries. On the palate, bright fresh cherries with toasty elements and just a hint of pepper.

name: Tarapaca Gran Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml

name: Revelstoke Gin Series No. 6 Raspberry 700ml
description: Gin /37.5 % ABV / Canada Bathtub gin is a term from 1920â€™s American Prohibition, when bathtubs were used to steep alcohol and various botanicals. From these rough origins is borne a truly premium product. Our bathtub gins form part of the Revelstoke Gin Series, a family of locally-made spirits. This series has been handcrafted using ingredients from all over the world. By carefully combining international with local we have created something unique. This is the true spirit of Revelstoke.

name: Gordon's London Dry Gin 750ml
description: London Dry Gin / 40 % ABV / England, United Kingdom The bold juniper flavor jumps out with each sip of Gordonâ€™s. This London dry gin is incredibly versatile and can lend a helping hand in an array of mixed drinks. The aromatics of orange peel and anise blend with the scent of juniper to create a well-balanced and tasty gin. Gordonâ€™s gin is a brilliant example of London dry gin.

name: Concha y Toro Casillero Del Diablo Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

name: Concha y Toro Casillero Del Diablo Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml

This classic, well structured, perfectly balanced Cabernet Sauvignon goes well with the heartiest cuisine, including roasts, stews, game, piquant pasta dishes and robust cheeses.

name: Bacardi Superior White Rum 3L
description: White Rum / 40% ABV / Puerto Rico Bacardi Superior is Bacardi's flagship rum and the one that started it all way back in 1862. In this year, founder Don Facundo Bacardi purchased the land in Cuba that would become the distillery that changed the way the world drank rum. By pioneering charcoal filtration and purposeful aging, Bacardi created Bacardi white rum, which set the standard for flavor and balance. However, it wasn't without hardship. The Cuban Revolution forced Bacardi from Cuba, and today, the Cathedral of Rum is in Puerto Rico. Crystal Head Vodka is filtered seven times, three of which are through Herkimer diamond crystals. There are no binders, glycerin, citrus oil or any others added which makes Crystal Head an exceptionally pure vodka. The taste is clean and snappy with a slight sweetness and a hint of vanilla. Try this chilled or in a tasty cocktail.

name: Polar Ice Vodka 750ml

name: Dr Loosen "L" Riesling 750ml
description: Riesling / 8.5% ABV / Mosel, Germany This entry-level Dr. Loosen Riesling embodies the elegant and racy characteristics of steep, slate-soil Mosel vineyards at a very reasonable price. It is a bright, vibrant, fruit-driven wine made with grapes from contracted growers throughout the Mosel River valley who work very closely with brothers Ernst and Thomas Loosen to achieve excellent quality and superb concentration in every vintage. With its bright fruit, cleansing acidity, low alcohol (just 8.5%) and affordable price, the Dr. L Riesling is the ideal welcome wine for every gathering, and great for just about every course in a meal.

name: Banff Ice Vodka 750ml
description: Vodka / 40 % ABV / Canada Banff Ice is made from the finest grains and is triple distilled using Canadian glacier born Rock Mountain water. name: Ciroc Vodka 750ml
description: Vodka / 40 % ABV / France Vodka lovers, you've never sipped an ultra-premium spirit like this before. After an innovative cold fermentation process, CÃ®roc is distilled five times to produce an amazingly smooth vodka. One of the most distinct vodkas on the market, CÃ®roc is sure to stick with you. CÃ®roc may be distilled from grapes, but when you sip this vodka, you'll taste some lightly fruity notes rather than a full-on grape flavor. Look for notes of orange and anise and enjoy the crisp finish of this luxurious spirit.

name: Andreas Bender I Love Mosel Riesling 750ml
description: Riesling / 10.5% ABV / Mosel, Germany "I Love Mosel!" And why not! Andreas Bender makes this wine for the locals. When you are drinking this wine, you are tasting Mosel. Tropical and lime fruit. Off-dry but not a blousy wine. Loads of acidity and freshness brings this wine together and puts some structure to it. Ends in honeyed fruit with loads of freshness. Andreas made this wine from a single parcel of red slate in the Premier Cru vineyard Schweicher Annaberg site. Hand-harvested and spontaneously fermented in large old oak barrels, before a temperature-controlled ferment, resting on lees for three months in stainless steel tanks.

Dilution with purified water from Belvedere's own artisan wells is essential, enabling the character of the rye to shine. Perfect on the rocks, in a martini or breathing character to any cocktail. Belvedere represents the pinnacle of vodka making tradition. Zero additives, gluten free, naturally smooth.

name: Ketel One Vodka 750ml

Our 80 proof vodka is carefully crafted using exclusively 100% non-GMO European wheat for smoothness and neutrality. Perfect on its own or added with your favorite cocktail, simply mix with club soda, a cucumber ribbon and garnish with a sprig of mint for a refreshing tasting Soda with Cucumber Mint cocktail. For over 11 generations, since our family distillery was founded in 1691, we have been dedicated to crafting the finest spirits, allowing us to unlock the secret of creating a vodka of exceptional smoothness. Ketel One Family Made Vodka is crafted with 100% non-GMO grain. It owes its distinctive quality to a combination of modern distilling techniques and the magic of traditional copper stills - including our 'Pot Still #1.' Come visit us in Schiedam! description: Vodka / 40 % ABV / United States Founded in 1864, the Smirnoff brand traveled from Russia to the rest of the world due to our award-winning quality and smooth liquid. We pride ourselves on bringing our famous beverage to connoisseurs and newcomers alike, assuring the consistently great taste and quality expected from our traditionally distilled vodka. Please drink responsibly.

name: Grey Goose Vodka 50ml
description: Vodka / 40 % ABV / France Grey GooseÂ® Vodka is a premium vodka, born of an extraordinary passion for spirit-making. It is created using only the finest French ingredients â€“ the highest-grade wheat and pristine limestone-filtered spring water. It is a spirit of uncommon brilliance, unrivaled craftsmanship and signature smoothness and is an excellent choice as a gift. Grey GooseÂ® Vodka has an exquisite clear, fresh and elegantly aromatic taste. This is a premium vodka of unparalleled smoothness and exceptional taste, with subtle hints of almond and a long, satisfying finish.

name: Ruffino Orvieto Classico 750ml
description: White / 12% ABV / Umbria, Italy Ruffino Orvieto Classico White Wine has a fruity and floral bouquet reminiscent of green apples and meadow flowers. This Italian wine's smooth, refreshing flavors balance beautifully with its structure and acidity. Orvieto Classico offers a unique mineral character that comes from the chalky limestone soil called tufa. The finish of this white wine is long and fragrant, with hints of almond. The grapes sourced for this Ruffino wine come from the well-known DOCG winegrowing regions of Orvieto Classico. Ruffino's traditional winemaking process, combined with a brief aging in stainless steel vats, delivers an Italian wine that reveals itself without coaxing or manipulation. Enjoy this refreshing white wine as an aperitif, or pair a glass with crostini, grilled vegetables, soup or grilled fish.

name: Santa Cristina "Casasole" Orvieto 750ml
description: White / 10% ABV / Umbria, Italy Santa Cristina wines combine Tuscan traditions with modern flavors, resulting in extremely versatile wines - perfect for everyday enjoyment. Live Italian, Drink Italian with Santa Cristina. The wine, a straw yellow in color, shows intense and elegant aromas with notes of citrus fruit and acacia

name: Cavaliere D'oro Promessa Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12% ABV / Italy The Gabbiano Pinot Grigio is a sunny straw-yellow color. Floral notes caress the nose, with nuances of pear and honeydew melon. Citrus flavors are evident on the palate delivering complex flavors of green apple, orange and faint lemon. The mouth feel is lively and full in structure created by the excellent harmony of fruit and acid. The wine is light-bodied, with a long finish that reveals hints of citrus and almonds.

name: Villa Teresa Organic Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12% ABV / Italy 100% Pinot Grigio, no synthetic fertilizers or pesticides are used, absolutely no GMO Pale straw yellow colour with greenish nuances, intense, delicate aroma and fine flavour. This wine has a well-balanced body and a little acidulous. Excellent with fish appetizers, fish soup, risotto, and shellfish. Recommended also with white meat and eggs.

name: Villa Teresa Organic Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 12% ABV / Veneto, Italy A bright, ruby red wine that is vinous with a slightly herbaceous bouquet.

name: Farnese Fantini Sangiovese 750ml
description: Sangiovese / 12% ABV / Abruzzo, Italy Italy's Fantini Wines is based in Abruzzo's Terre di Chieti foothills, where sangiovese thrives. Modern in style, this velvety wine has floral aromas of toast, licorice, dark fruit and juniper. Its flavours smack of ripe dark fruit, spice and smoke. Pour a glass with your favourite pasta dish or with braised short ribs.

name: Fantini Farnese Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12% ABV / Abruzzo, Italy Dazzling with enticing fruit and fresh herb aromas, a scintillating mouthful of rich peach and grapefruit is evident on the palate. Lemon, lime and a mineral crispness also persist with a gentle spicy finish. The Farnese team add to their already impressive range with an authentic, intensely refreshing Pinot Grigio. Full of crisp, invigorating citrusy flavours, it's sure to be the next Farnese showstopper! The grapes come from one solitary vineyard in the mountainous Molise. It's a thrilling landscape of high, empty spaces and little lost towns. Pinot Grigio is rarely grown here but winemakers Valentino, Flippo and Camillo thought the potential was huge. So they found their spot, grew the vinesâ€¦ and proved their point!

name: Fantini Farnese Numero Uno Primitivo 750ml
description: Zinfandel / 13.5% ABV / Puglia, Italy Primitivo has a very long history that dates back to the times of the Phoenicians and has an lot in common with a more well-known grape variety called Zinfandel. Fantini's version is an intense ruby colour with aromas and flavours of dark berries, cherry, and prune; full and soft with a harmoniously tannic finish.

name: Cavit Roscato Rosso Dolce Red Blend 750 ml
description: Red / 7% ABV / Trentino, Italy Cavit Roscato Rosso Wine is a product of some of the finest grapes in the region of Italy is the epitome of tradition and quality. With a juicy yet dry finish, this wine is a favorite among most. The wine has a fresh, clean fragrance and leaves the palate a very balanced well-rounded flavor. This wine is well-structured and sophisticated, a perfect choice for entertaining as well as a quiet evening at home.

name: Velletri Terre Di Volsci Riserva 750ml
description: Red / 13.5% ABV / Lazio, Italy Ruby red with purple tinge; aromas of licorice, rye bread, nut spread plus spice and floral notes; extra dry, medium-bodied; ripe fruit flavour with good, supportive acidity and soft tannins on the finish.

name: KRIS Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12.5% ABV / Italy KRIS wine takes full advantage of the â€œdelle Venezieâ€ designation by marrying the best fruit from the appellationâ€™s three permitted regions to yield a Pinot Grigio with an unusually expressive flavor profile. Veneto fruit provides the delicate floral notes and the classic almond finish so typical of this region. Grapes sourced from the southwest-facing slopes of the village of Montagna in Alto Adige receive ample sun and contribute ripe yet fresh citrus and pear fruit. The Mulinat estate in Friuli, where the soils are gravelly and well drained produce low-yielding fruit that helps to intensify flavor. The final blend shows depth of flavor in a bold, Northern Italian style.

name: A Mano Primitivo 750ml
description: Zinfandel / 14.5% ABV / Apulia, Italy Called AMano ("hand-made"), and entirely hand-crafted from indigenous Primitivo grapes (the original source of Zinfandel, by the way...), this fruit-packed, food-friendly red expresses the region's quality potential, and the reasons for Mark's Apulian connection. These are best told by Mark himself: "Apulia (or Puglia, as it is known in Italian) is so easy to fall in love with: old, head-trained vineyards, a history of grape-growing in harmony with nature. Everything necessary for top-quality wines. I was compelled to stay. I have not seen another region of the world where the quality potential is so high.

name: Layer Cake Primitivo Zinfandel 750ml
description: Zinfandel / 13.5% ABV / Italy Apulia, Italy- A balance of elegance and power; inky black fruit, spice and white pepper, jammy black cherries, plums, blackberry fruit, truffles, tar, and espresso. Warm and rich in the mouth with a creamy texture; the ripe fruit is well supported by the deep structure of the wine.

name: Masi Possessioni Serego Alighieri Rosso Del Veronese 750ml
description: Red / 13% ABV / Veneto, Italy A Local wine from the Venetian territories tradition, produced in historic estates. Use of local grapes from owned vineyards located in the most prestigious 3 Venezie area. Estates and noble families of the Venetian territories. Maturation in barriques. Wines suitable to all courses, also ideal as an aperitif. Product to be drinked young, with also some with a long ageing potential. The pleasure of discovering Â«old flavoursÂ» from the Venetian territories, thanks to the modern expertise of MASI.

name: Sella & Mosca Riserva Cannonau di Sardegna 750ml
description: Grenache / 13.5% ABV / Sardinia, Italy Cannonau is the Sardinian name for that darling Mediterranean grape, Grenache. This traditional version has complex flavours of plum, wild berries, leather and spice. Enjoy with grilled lamb or beef kebabs, or osso buco.

name: Da Vinci Chianti 750ml
description: Red / 13% ABV / Tuscany, Italy For our Chianti, we source our grapes from south-facing hillside vineyards outside Vinci and Cerreto Guidi in the western part of the Chianti region. Our Chianti is made with 90% Sangiovese grapes and 10% Merlot grapes. The grapes are gently crushed and fermented in stainless steel tanks with temperatures controlled between 70Â°F and 80Â°F. This temperature control allows us to produce a Chianti with balanced tannins and rich fruit aromas and flavors. The wine is then fermented to dry for 8 days. About 15% of the wine is barrel aged for 6 months in new and used American oak barrels to add some complexity to it. DaVinci Chianti is a well-balanced wine of medium weight with jammy flavors of ripe plums, cherries and red fruit. It has a deep crimson color and is a lively wine with a soft mineral finish and round tannins that linger in long, peppery finish. This wine pairs perfectly with all starters, pastas and meat dishes and is best when served slightly below room temperature.

name: Da Vinci Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12% ABV / Italy Rooted in centuries of tradition, DaVinci wines celebrate some of Italy's finest winegrowing regions. Cantine Leonardo Da Vinci works closely with growers in the acclaimed Delle Venezie region to create a crisp Pinot Grigio from Northeast Italy. Our expressive Pinot Grigio has flavors of fresh green apple, juicy citrus and tropical fruit with a hint of minerality. Enjoy the lively acidity and fresh, crisp profile that makes this a wonderfully versatile white wine.

name: Ruffino Chianti 750ml
description: Red / 14% ABV / Tuscany, Italy Chianti DOCG Red Wine combines sangiovese grapes with merlot and cabernet sauvignon to create this top quality red wine blend. This Ruffino wine features deep, fruity plum and intense cherry flavors, accompanied by hints of spice, hazelnut, and delicate violet aromas.

name: Santa Cristina Rosso Toscana 750ml
description: Red / 13% ABV / Tuscany, Italy Santa Cristina wines combine Tuscan traditions with modern flavors, resulting in extremely versatile wines - perfect for everyday enjoyment. Live Italian, Drink Italian with Santa Cristina. Santa Cristina Rosso, the best-selling red wine in Italy, is a soft and full-bodied red wine. An original Tuscan classic that offers great value and everyday enjoyment. Pleasurable and intense, offers fruity notes of cherries, blackberries, and plums fused with aromas of vanilla and coffee.

name: Frescobaldi Remole Toscana 750ml
description: Red / 12% ABV / Tuscany, Italy Frescobaldi embodies the essence of Tuscany, its extraordinary vocation for viticulture and the diversity of its territories. Fescobaldi's uniqueness stems precisely from the representation of this diversity, from its eight estates and from wines which express a kaleidoscope of aromas and sensations, springing from the characteristics of each individual terroir.
