The Castiglioni estate has been a defining symbol of the Frescobaldi familyâ€™s wine-growing tradition since 1300. Production of Tuscan wines, enjoyed by both the papal court and English court of Henry VIII in the 16th century, began here. Villa di Remole, in the heart of Tuscany, is the cradle of the 700 years of history and tradition of the Frescobaldi family. Remole is an intense, soft and fruity wine that will captivate and delight you. Particularly suited for full-flavoured first courses, charcuterie and red meat.

name: Pasqua Passimento White 750ml
description: White / 13% ABV / Veneto, Italy A white wine that, on the nose, reveals intense and decisive aromas, citrus notes and overtones of apricot and peach. On the palate, it is rounded and pleasant, well balanced with an enduring finish.

name: Pasqua Passimento Red 750ml
description: Red / 14% ABV / Veneto, Italy Deep ruby red colour; intense aromas of smoke, licorice, coffee and hints of vanilla and spices. Flavours of smoke, dried fruit and spices, with soft tannins to finish.

name: Dal Cero Tenuta Montecchiesi Sangiovese 750ml
description: Red / 13% ABV / Tuscany, Italy A luminous, bright ruby red. A pronounced, heady bouquet offers fragrant cherry and raspberry, with a hint of spice. On the palate, it is refined and very well-balanced, while the finish is full-flavoured and ultra-appealing. A fine partner with all types of meat, game, and cheeses.

name: San Felice Chianti Classico 750ml
description: Red / 13% ABV / Tuscany, Italy This is a wine to savour with your tortellini and pecorino. A dashing, classical wine of the highest order from the finest spots on the Tuscan hillsides. Dark cherry, raspberry and sweet violets accent the restrained complexity from a particularly talented winemaker, Leonardo Bellaccini. A Chianti Classico that is genuinely a cut above the rest

name: Frescobaldi Chianti Nipozzano Rufina 750ml
description: Red / 13% ABV / Tuscany, Italy The nose is remarkably rich, showing aromas of sour cherry, raspberry and dried plum. In the mouth, a clean vibrant acidity, silky, well integrated tannins which contribute to an impressive elegance.

name: Banfi Centine Toscana 750ml
description: Red Blend / 12.5% ABV / Tuscany, Italy Varietal 60% Sangiovese, 20% Merlot, 20% Cabernet Sauvignon The grapes are vinified with a brief maceration for 7 days. When alcoholic and malolactic fermentation are completed, the wine is aged for a short period in barriques of French oak, followed by moderate bottle aging. Color: Intense ruby red. Bouquet: Fragrant, with dark fruit and floral nuances. Taste: Medium-bodied, with black cherry and plum flavors and hints of spice. Ideal with a wide range of dishes such as roasts, game, pastas and cheese.

name: Ruffino Riserva Ducale Chianti Classico Riserva 750ml
description: Red / 14% ABV / Tuscany, Italy A benchmark Tuscan wine, first released in 1927. Today, it is made with modern techniques, while still respecting the traditions of Chianti Classico. Cherry, plum, spice, and leather notes on the nose; dry, medium to full bodied, tart cherry and plum flavours with hints of cedar. Serve with osso buco or grilled steak.

name: Villa Antinori Toscana 750ml
description: Red / 13.5% ABV / Tuscany, Italy Deep ruby red colour; the aroma is dominated by notes of licoirce, floral lift, nuts and ripe red fruits and berries; the palate is extra-dry, medium-bodied with persistent spice, nuts and red fruit flavours; the tannins are supple and rounded with a long savoury finish.

name: Barone Ricasoli Brolio Chianti-Classico 750ml
description: Red / 13.5% ABV / Tuscany, Italy A very fruity and fresh Chianti Classico that shows lemon and orange rind, in addition to strawberries and spices. Refined and minerally on the palate with a bright sheen of acidity and a taut finish.

name: Donini Trebbiano Chardonnay 1.5L
description: Chardonnay / 12.5% ABV / Emilia-Romagna, Italy This is a blend made with grapes grown in Rubicone area, on the Adriatic coast between Bologna and San Marino. Aromas and flavours of fresh mushrooms, spice and lifted mineral notes - chardonnay contributes presence, and trebbiano lightens the body and aromas. Chill well and serve with grilled fish or light pasta dishes.

name: Folonari Valpolicella Classico 1.5L
description: Red / 12.5% ABV / Veneto, Italy Uniquely Italian, with bold flavors of currants and blackberries finished with notes of vanilla on the palate. A round, polished flavor.

name: Citra Montepulciano D'Abruzzo 1L
description: Red / 12% ABV / Abbruzzi, Italy Medium ruby purple colour; smoke, rye bread, floral note and fig on nose and palate with hints of nuts, plum and spice; balanced acidity, medium-bodied with firm, dry finish.

name: Donini Merlot 1.5L
description: Merlot / 11% ABV / Veneto, Italy Ruby red colour; pastry dough, berry and plum fruit nose with hints of toast and licorice; dry, with light berry and plummy fruit flavours with soft acidity, medium body and a clean finish.

name: Donini Merlot 1L
description: Merlot / 11% ABV / Veneto, Italy Ruby red colour; pastry dough, berry and plum fruit nose with hints of toast and licorice; dry, with light berry and plummy fruit flavours with soft acidity, medium body and a clean finish.

name: Dal Cero Delle Venezie Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12.5% ABV / Veneto, Italy Limpid and clear to the eye, with a distinctive coppery tonality. Fragrant peach predominates on the nose, complemented by impressions of tropical fruit, such as pineapple and heightened by subtle floral notes of spring wildflowers. Elegant and silk-smooth in the mouth, yet firmly-structured and full-bodied. Beautifully crisp, it progresses regally into a lingering finish. An ideal partner with light and vegetarian antipasti, and perfect with fish.

name: Folonari Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12% ABV / Italy The Italian classic! A fragrant bouquet of fresh florals. Dry and crisp with notes of green apples. Clean finish.

name: Folonari Valpolicella Classico 750ml
description: Red / 12.5% ABV / Veneto, Italy Uniquely Italian, with bold flavors of currants and blackberries finished with notes of vanilla on the palate. A round, polished flavor.

name: Tenuta Montecchiesi Vermentino Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 12.5% ABV / Tuscany, Italy Intense straw yellow, with gold highlights. A generous bouquet marries notes of Mediterranean hawthorn blossom and rosemary to crisper impressions, of mandarin orange and pencil lead. On the palate, it exhibits stylish grace and superb balance, concluding with a finish marked by ripe fruit and a tangy vein of mineral. Ideal with antipasti, lighter meats, dishes of fish and shellfish, and vegetarian first courses.

name: Monte Antico Toscano Rosso 750ml
description: Red / 13% ABV / Tuscany, Italy The blend, albeit varying slightly depending on vintage conditions, is 85% Sangiovese, 10% Cabernet Sauvignon, and 5% Merlot. The best selections are blended and aged 1 year in oak (80% in Slavonian barrels, 20% in barrique) and at least 6 months in the bottle, achieving a graceful balance of voluptuous berry tones and flexible yet sturdy backbone. Dark ruby in color, its bouquet of leather, earth, herbs, black cherries, licorice and plums is confirmed on the medium to full-bodied palate â€“ round, spicy, elegant, attractively fruity and extremely versatile with any fare from pasta or risotto, to meat, fowl and cheese.

name: Santa Margherita Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12.5% ABV / Trentino-Alto Adige, Italy The wine is dry with intense aromas and appealing flavors of Golden Delicious apples and citrus with a long, multi-layered finish. Excellent as an aperitif and with a medium body that makes it versatile to pair with everything from salads to chicken or grilled fish. Wonderful pairing ideas include butter lettuce with apples, walnuts and pomegranate seeds, pizza topped with prosciutto and arugula, scallops with tarragon cream, or tagliatelle with Italian olive oil, lemon zest and pine nuts.

name: Santa Margherita Stilrose 750ml
description: RosÃ© / 12.5% ABV / Friuli-Venezia Giuila , Italy Grape varieties: Groppello (predominantly), Barbera, Sangiovese and Marzemino Its delicate pink colour leads you in to floral fragrances of dog rose and fruity notes of orange and fraises des bois, along with hints of lychee and ginger, in a scent profile that is at once elegant and complex. These persuasive aromas are then echoed on the palate in a fresh, succulent flavour, made vibrant by a tanginess that gives added dynamism to its almost crunchy nuances of wild berries and sweet spices

name: Dal Cero Tenuta di Montecchiesi 'Selverello' Cortona Syrah 750ml
description: Syrah / 13.5% ABV / Tuscany, Italy Bright ruby â€‹â€‹red is shown on the nose on fresh red fruits and a spicy note typical of the grape. In the mouth the tannin is soft and enveloping and the finish is pleasantly long.

name: Fontanafredda Barolo del Comune di Serralunga dâ€™Alba 750ml
description: Nebbiolo / 14% ABV / Piedmonte, Italy 100% Nebbiolo. Full bodied and velvety with notes of vanilla, spices, withered roses, and underbrush. Since 1858, the Fontanafredda Estate & Winery has been instrumental to the growth and international awareness of Barolo, while championing sustainability and community engagement in the Langhe region of Piedmont. Under the lead of visionary entrepreneur, Oscar Farinetti, Fontanafredda has built a portfolio of wines that express the depth and diversity of the Langhe, produced from grapes that are farmed from organic and sustainably managed vineyards. Fontanafredda is the largest certified organic company in Piedmont, beginning with their 2019 harvest. The winery is also working with its 400 local grower partners, who bring their grapes to Fontanafredda each year, to help them in converting their farming to organic.

name: Dal Cero Preziosaterra 750ml
description: Red / 14% ABV / Tuscany, Italy An intense ruby red hue and delightful aromas of dark plum and cherry seduce the senses as you pour out a glass of this elegant red. Take a sip and youâ€™ll discover hints of crushed wild berries and baking spice set off by a well-rounded mouthfeel, full body and silky smooth tannins. The opulent fruit character and firm structure of the Dal Cero Preziosaterra make it a handsome partner for roasted game and aged cheeses.

name: Marcarini Ciabot Camerano Barbera d'Alba 750ml
description: Barbera / 13.5% ABV / Piedmont, Italy Its intense garnet red color, its clarity, its dense and warm reflections that turn to ruby, are sure promises of great richness and powerful structure. The bouquet is broad , distinctive, complex and very persistent. The austere and warm flavor highlights its remarkable robustness; balance and great harmony are enhanced by the tannins that turn to the sweet and by a pleasant flavor. It goes well with the great meat dishes of classic and local cuisine; excellent with braised meats, game and aged cheeses. It should be served in large, long-stemmed glasses.

name: Santi Solane Ripasso Valpolicella 750ml
description: Red / 13% ABV / Veneto, Italy Santi Valpolicella Classico Superiore is a "ripasso" method Valpolicella; meaning that following primary fermentation the wine sees a second fermentation with the addition of Amarone grapes and skins, creating a richer, more complex and more exciting final wine.

name: Dal Cero Amarone della Valpolicella 750ml
description: Red / 15.5% ABV / Veneto ,Italy A wine of stunning depth and concentration, both in its rich aromas of ripe fruit and spice as well as on the palate, where its alcohol finds in the acidity and elegant tannins perfect travelling companions. Ideal with roasts, game, and aged cheeses, but also sipped meditatively by itself as a vino da meditazione.

name: Cavit Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio /12% ABV / Delle Venezie, Italy Through the years, savvy wine lovers have come to depend on the CAVIT COLLECTION as their favorite go-to source for stylish, elegant and versatile wines, perfect for any occasion. This stellar range of high-quality, food-friendly wines is produced at the Cavit winery in Trentino, a picturesque landscape of mountains, lakes, apple orchards and medieval castles. Vineyards in this region enjoy the warming effects of the "Ora del Garda," a dry, balmy breeze that sweeps across Lake Garda and protects the fruit from external moisture and disease. Contrastingly cool evenings promote rich, intense aromas and flavors in the grapes. Winemaking is overseen by Anselmo Martini, a 20+ year industry veteran and one of northern Italy's top enologists.

name: Mezzacorona Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12.5% ABV / Trentino, Italy Mezzacorona lies at the foot of the majestic Italian Alps. Its vineyards with pergola trellising, characteristic of the region, run from the Adige Valley to the foothills of the towering Dolomites. A fresh, wild breeze from the lakes and glaciers of the surrounding mountains blows over the vineyards, allowing the grapes to mature to the height of their ripeness. These are the lands of elegant, vivid and crisp wines.

name: Masi Modello Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 12% ABV / Italy Bright ruby red colour. Attractive bouquet thanks to interesting complexity that mixes fruitiness with spices such as cinnamon and vanilla. Simple but rich on the palate; attractive plum and bilberry tastes well integrated with soft tannins and supporting acidity, making the wine very drinkable.

name: Tommasi Arele Venezie 750ml
description: Red / 13% ABV / Veneto, Italy Grape varieties: Corvina, Rondinella, Oseleta, Merlot. The color is intense, deep ruby red. Flavours of crushed black raspberry, black cherry, plum compote, dried herbs and mulling spice. The taste is full body , juicy, spicy red with a riding creamy palate and a long, refined finish.

name: Masi Campofiorin 750ml
description: Red / 13% ABV / Veneto, Italy Rich, smooth and velvety; very approachable and versatile with food. This is Masi's original Supervenetian from 1964 - recognized internationally as the creator of a new category for wines from the Veneto inspired by the technique of making Amarone. Combining simplicity and grace with strength and majesty.

name: Zenato Valpolicella 750ml
description: Valpolicella Blend / 13.5% ABV / Veneto,Italy Zenato Valpolicella is a soft, supple example of this classic wine. Made predominately from Corvina, this wine displays the ripe black cherry flavors for which the grape is known. Ruby red in color, this Valpolicella Superiore offers fleshy aromas of wild berries, black currants, black cherries, and spices, with hints of chocolate. On the palate, the wine is dry and robust with velvety texture. Pair this wine with antipasti, arrabbiata sauces, seared sashimi tuna, or orange-glazed duck.

name: Bolla Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12.5% ABV / Veneto, Italy Pale straw; fresh bread, mushrooms, spice, pear and minerally notes; extra dry, medium-bodied palate with a fresh and clean finish.

name: Tommasi Amarone della Valpolicella Classico 750ml
description: Red / 15% ABV / Veneto, Italy Tommasi Amarone is a wine which can be proudly served on special occasions, particularly with roasted meat, game, and ripe cheeses. It can also be sipped after dinner, before a fireplace, or anywhere as an ideal companion to enjoyable conversation. The Tommasi Amarone ages at least three years in oak barrels and is then bottled. After bottling, the wine ages for at least another year. To produce Amarone means to embrace a labor of love which is not completed at the time of harvest but continues through the winter months. During these months the grapes are reduced in a period of â€œactive lethargyâ€: that is, they seem to be still but changes are taking place that enrich them, giving them new aromas and a deeper flavor, a result of losing about 50% of their weight and concentrating the level of natural sugar. In managing the drying and vinification process it is essential that the winemaker has clearly in mind the wine which he seeks to create.

name: Masi Costasera Amarone 750ml
description: Red / 15% ABV / Veneto, Italy Deep purple ruby colour; rich, ripe, dark fruit aromas and flavours with hints of licorice, toast and chocolate; full-bodied and smooth with a firm, long finish.

name: Bolla Amarone 750ml
description: Red / 15.5% ABV / Veneto, Italy Intense ruby-red with tints of garnet in color. Aromas of spice and dark berry fruit. In the mouth, the wine is well balanced, with flavors of wild berries on the finish.

name: Dal Cero Valpolicella Ripasso 750ml
description: Red / 14.5% ABV / Veneto, Italy A ripe, rich ruby red. On the nose, sweet, succulent fruit combines with smooth spice, followed by delicate notes of pungent spices, creating a full-volumed, enchanting aromatic complex. A tangy acidity beautifully supports the full body, so that the wine is smooth yet surprisingly vibrant as well. Stews and braises with polenta, game, beef strips with porcinis, roast lamb, and medium-aged cheeses.

name: Tommasi Ripasso Valpolicella Classico Superiore 750ml
description: Red / 13% ABV / Veneto, Italy A deep, bright ruby red in color, it is rich and intensely spicy on the nose, with notes of cherry jam, tobacco and black pepper. On the palate it is full-bodied yet elegant, with gentle, silky tannins and a very long finish.

name: Masi Brolo Campofion 750ml
description: Red / 14% ABV / Veneto, Italy Dry, rich, velvety, complex and elegant. Made in the same approachable style as Campofiorin, of which this is a cuvÃ©e version, using the original production method inspired by the technique employed for Amarone. Given extra complexity with the addition to the blend of the special Oseleta grape, rediscovered by Masi, ageing in small oak casks accentuates its international style.

name: Zenato Ripassa Valpolicella 750ml
description: Red / 14% ABV / Veneto, Italy This wine is a blend of 85% Corvina, 10% Rondinella, and 5% Oseleta. As soon as the dried grapes for Zenato's Amarone are fermented, selected batches of Valpolicella wine are â€œre-passedâ€ over the Amarone lees, thus starting a second fermentation that slightly increases the alcohol content and gives the wine deeper color and more complex aromas. Ripassa is refined in tank for six months and then aged in French allier tonneaux for eighteen months. The wine spends an additional six months in bottle before it is released. Deep ruby-red in color, this wine shows intense aromas of blackberries and black currants underscored by aromas of spice pepper, and a hint of leather. On the palate, it is smooth and viscous with well-balanced acidity and alcohol. Pair this wine with risotto, Lyonnaise sauces, beef negimaki, and rabbit ragu.

name: Sawmill Creek Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Pale gold straw colour; aromas of oak, vanilla, pineapple and melon; dry, medium bodied, soft and buttery with a refreshing citrus finish.

name: Sawmill Creek Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Light ruby red colour; clean with stewed fruit and plum aromas; dry, medium bodied, soft and fruity.

name: Sawmill Creek Dry White 1.5L
description: White / 11.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Pale straw colour; aromas of citrus and apple; dry, light-bodied, crisp lemon and pear fruit flavours, with notes of peach and yellow apple.

name: Pelee Island Pinot Noir Reserve 750ml
description: Pinot Noir / 12.5% ABV / Canada Medium ruby red colour; quite perfumed with aromas of cherry fruit and vanilla, with underlying notes of earth and chocolate; dry, medium bodied with cherry fruit, mushroom and herb flavours; welll balanced with moderate to long finish.

name: Pelee Island Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 12.5% ABV / Canada Pelee Island Winery is located in Canada's warmest, oldest and most southerly grape growing region. This wine is dry and light-bodied with crisp acidity and supple tannins. Expect ripe berry fruit flavour with a hint of chocolate on a smooth finish. Serve with barbecued chicken, burgers or grilled vegetables.

name: Pelee Island GewÃ¼ztraminer 750ml
description: GewÃ¼ztraminer / 12.5% ABV / Canada Pale straw/yellow colour; floral, ripe peach, honey and lychee fruit aromas; off-dry, light to medium bodied, softly structured with balanced acidity, flavours of honeysuckle, rose water, pear, citrus and lychee; hints of spice on the finish.

name: NK'Mip Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 14.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Aromas and flavours of black cherry, blueberry, dark plum, cedar and spice. This medium-bodied Merlot is well-structured with a soft entry and finely grained tannins that lead to a lengthy finish

name: Sandhill Cabernet Merlot 750ml
description: Red / 14.5% ABV / B.C, Canada 48% Merlot 23% Cabernet Sauvignon 20% Cabernet Franc Medium to full bodied, rich dark fruit and oak aromas. Great texture on palate.

name: Black Cellar Blend 11 Pinot Grigio Chardonnay 750ml
description: White / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada With our Pinot Grigio Chardonnay, our winemaker experimented with 11 different blends before the ultimate one was achieved. This smooth, refreshingly crisp wine, bearing strong fruit notes of pear and peach, embodies the mystique of the Black Cellar.

name: Black Cellar Blend 13 Malbec Merlot 750ml
description: Red / 13% ABV / B.C, Canada With our Malbec Merlot, our winemaker explored 13 blends before arriving on this smooth, medium bodied wine and aromas of dark red berries and cherry. The combination of the dark skinned Malbec and the juicy Merlot grape creates a luscious blend that embodies the mystique of the Black Cellar.

name: Burrowing Owl Pinot Gris 750ml
description: Pinot Gris / 13.5% ABV / B.C, Canada The Pinot Gris opens on an intense nose of the classic Pinot Gris aromas of pear, peach and honeydew melon along with some more exotic notes of apple blossom, grapefruit and pineapple. The palate is dry with crisp acidity and shows lush, ripe and intense peach, nectarine, baked pear and lots of lemony citrus zest on the long refreshing finish. The richness and ripeness of fruit should pair well with a Thai style Dungeness crab and pomelo salad. Rhys Pender, Master of Wine.

name: Burrowing Owl Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir / 14.5% ABV / B.C, Canada A rich, ripe Burrowing Owl Pinot Noir from the warm 2015 vintage. The nose shows ripe black cherry, dried fig, black forest cake, dark chocolate, vanilla and pretty violet floral notes. The palate is intense and rich with silky tannins and flavours of liqueur chocolate cherries, plum, cocoa and black cherry with some complex liquorice and baking spice. This rich wine pairs well with bacon studded beef bourguignon or with lamb sausages with black cherry jam. Rhys Pender, Master of Wine. The ageing program, based on French and Hungarian oaks enhances aromatics while adding toasted and spicy notes. During ageing, the wine was regularly racked off its lees; it was then bottled unfiltered. 76% French, 15% Hungarian, 5% American, 4% Russian, with 25% new oak and 25% 1-year-old

name: Mission Hill Reserve Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 13.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Our Reserve Shiraz is inky in colour with aromas of dark fruits, violet, and peppercorn. This vintage is full-bodied with flavours of Bing cherries, rosemary, anise, and brambleberry.

name: Mission Hill Reserve Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.5% ABV / B.C, Canada If you haven't yet experienced the dazzling wines of BC's Okanagan Valley, this is a striking introduction. A juicy Chardonnay loaded with flavours of pear, melon and creamy toffee. Sings with pasta alfredo, grilled eggplant sandwiches or baked chicken.

name: The Audacity of Thomas G. Bright Merlot Cabernet 750ml
description: Merlot Cabernet / 14.5% ABV / B.C, Canada A full-bodied red blend from Niagara. The wine was aged in American oak wine barrels from 8 months and finished in whisky barrels for 5 months. The wine has notes of black-fruit, spice and smoke, with and exceptionally smooth finish.

name: Mission Hill Five Vineyards Cabernet Merlot 750ml
description: Cabernet Merlot / 14% ABV / B.C, Canada A spicy, fruit forward wine with currant and dark cherry aromas, laced with subtle notes of sage and lavender. The medium bodied palate shows plenty of dark and red fruits, juicy acidity, and subtle flavors of sage, vanilla and sandalwood.

name: Diabolica White 750ml
description: White Blend / 12.6% ABV / Canada Blend of 32% Pinot Gris, 26% Chardonnay, 22% Riesling, 16% Viognier and 4% Muscat Floral aromatics with a citrusy mouth feel. Oozing with flavours of tropical fruit, musky peach, green apple and orange blossom honey. This wine is crisp and refreshing.

name: Peller Family Vineyards Shiraz 4L
description: Shiraz / 13.1% ABV / B.C, Canada Soft and generous with upfront black plum and licorice flavours supported by a hint of coffee beans on the finish. Shiraz is a great choice for entertaining; serve with barbecued ribs, smoked brisket, burgers with cheese and mushrooms or a charcuterie platter.

name: Peller Family Vineyards Merlot 4L
description: Merlot / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada A smooth, fruity merlot sourced from fine vineyards in Canada and around the world. It's medium ruby in colour. Shows aromas of cassis, floral tone, cadar, licorice and smoke. The palate is medium bodied and dry with ripe cassis character and notes of violets, cedar, spice and smoke. Well suited for any occasion.

name: Black Cellar Shiraz Cab 750ml
description: Shiraz Cabernet / 13% ABV / B.C, Canada A full-bodied, juicy, smooth blend of cabernet and shiraz grapes grown in Canada and internationally. Straight-forward pleasure at a nice price.

name: Naked Grape Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada A fresh, crisp wine with juicy tropical fruit and citrus flavours.

name: Naked Grape Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 12.5% ABV / Ontario, Canada This offering from the popular producer is a food-friendly cabernet sauvignon. Expect lovely aromas and flavours of prune, licorice, chocolate, cedar and a hint of rye bread. Medium-bodied and fruity, with a soft, silky finish, this perfect for grilled burgers and chips or pizza.

name: Naked Grape Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Pale lemon colour; aromas of pear, yellow apple, citrus rind and melon; on the palate it is light bodied and fruity, with flavours of lemon, crisp apple, honeydew melon and a touch of mineral with a clean finish.

name: Naked Grape Merlot 750ml
description: Unoaked. A soft, fruit-driven wine with rich plum and black cherry flavours.

name: The Naked Grape Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada Pale straw colour; aromas of citrus and herb with light floral notes; dry, fresh and lively with a crisp, refreshing finish.

name: Naked Grape Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Clear ruby purple colour; forward aromas of ripe raspberry with floral nuances; mellow, fruity and medium bodied with balanced acidity and soft tannins.

name: Cave Spring Riesling 750ml
description: Riesling / 11% ABV / Ontario, Canada Straw green; apricot, citrus aromas & flavours with floral, mineral notes; off-dry, with refreshing acidity. Straw colour; minerally and quince aromas on nose with mushroom, nuts and pear notes; dry, forward quince/pear flavours with refreshing acidity and a medium-long finish.

name: Quail's Gate Old  VInes Foch 750ml
description: Red / 14% ABV / B.C, Canada This vintage has flavours of ripe black fruits, dark plum, baking spices and its characteristic smoke, earth and meaty notes. On the palate the wine is full-bodied and smooth with juicy black berries, spice and game notes. Try pairing with pepper steak, sausages and blue cheese stuffed burgers and caramelized onions

name: Quail's Gate Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada Founded in 1956 and owned and operated by the Stewart family, Quails' Gate is one of Canada's most important family-owned wineries. This Chardonnay is round and rich, with tropical fruit, citrus, golden apple, pear and mineral. Great with roast chicken, or baked fish in a lemon cream sauce.

name: Quail's Gate Riesling 750ml
description: Riesling / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada The wine begins with aromas of citrus, apple and stone fruit. On the palate, the bright acidity lifts the flavours of lemon. This wine should be cellared until next spring to allow a full flowering of its flavours.

name: Tin Horn Creek Pinot Gris 750ml
description: Pinot Gris / 14.7% ABV / B.C, Canada Ambrosial guava, muskmelon, honey and creamed pear aromas are layered with golden apples and citrus blossoms. An echo of the nose, the palate is ripe, bordering on softened fruit; it has a creamy weight on the palate.

name: Tin Horn Creek Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 14.7% ABV / B.C, Canada Medium-bodied, dry, richly extracted plum and cherry flavours with well-integrated oak, ripe tannins and balancing acidity.

name: Tin Horn Creek Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13% ABV / B.C, Canada Located just south of Oliver B.C., in the famed Golden Mile wine-growing district. As the number one winery destination evoking classic south Okanagan terroir, Tinhorn Creek proudly offers estate grown wines, growing grapes on both the Black Sage and Golden Mile benches. As the first winery in Canada to support carbon neutral measures, Tinhorn Creek continues their commitment to land stewardship, conservation and environmentally sustainable practices. Tinhorn Creek offers an unrivaled visitor experience along with wines that rank among the best in the world.

name: Domaine D'or White 4L
description: White / 11.5% ABV / Canada Pale straw colour; subtle nuttiness with herbal and yellow plum notes, soft dry finish.

name: Peller Proprietor's Reserve Dry White 750ml
description: White / 11.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Pale yellow straw; grapefruit, yellow melon and floral aromas; extra dry with soft round fruit flavours and light tropical fruit notes; easy drinking wine

name: Peller Estates Proprietor's Reserve Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada An easy drinking white wine for casual sipping or light to medium flavoured foods. Light-bodied, and refreshing with flavours of citrus and green apple lingering on the finish.

name: Peller Proprietor's Reserve Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 13% ABV / B.C, Canada An easy drinking red wine for casual sipping or enjoy with medium flavoured foods. Flavours of plum, black currant and spice linger through on the finish.

name: Peller Family Vineyards Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada Chardonnay is the world's most popular white wine, known for its flavours of ripe pear, hazelnuts and vanilla. Smooth and light to medium-bodied, this wine has a hint of spicy oak, and a mellow, balanced finish. Serve with roast chicken, grilled vegetables or salads.

name: Peller Family Vineyards Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada Pair with grilled medium-rare steaks, burgers topped with blue cheese, portobello mushroom stew, prime rib, beef tenderloin, or 2 year old cheddar.

name: Peller Proprietor's Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 14% ABV / B.C, Canada A black garnet colour with an amazing bouquet of black currant, leather, black cherry, black olive, smoke, sweet oak and vanilla. Full-bodied and firm with rich, ripe black fruit flavours accented by notes of tea leaves and cocoa powder. Spiced blackberry, dark chocolate and cherry notes linger on the extra-dry finish.

name: Wayne Gretzky Great White 750ml
description: White / 13% ABV / B.C, Canada Comprised of a blend of 33% Sauvignon Blanc, 31% Riesling, 28% Pinot Gris, 5% Chardonnay and 3% Semillon, all hand-harvested from the vineyards of the Okanagan Valley. Juicy flavours of orange, tropical fruit, melon, peach and lemon develop on the palate, then refreshing notes of sweet citrus, tropical fruit linger through on the finish.

name: Wayne Gretzky Great Red 750ml
description: Red Blend / 13% ABV / B.C, Canada Garnet in colour with an interesting bouquet of dark plum, black cherry, sweet oak, baking spice, red licorice and tobacco. A medium-bodied red with soft tannins and fruit-forward flavours. Juicy fruit flavours of currant, blackberry and plum are accented by spice notes. Red and black berries, and spice linger on the drying finish.

name: Red Rooster Pinot Gris 750ml
description: Pinot Gris / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Clear and bright with a fresh, clean aroma of peach, melon, pear, yellow apple and marzipan. This rooster shows a slightly rich, round fleshy profile with peach, melon and a hint of spice on the palate. Then refreshing notes of orange, tangerine, lemon drop and yellow plum â€˜take flightâ€™ on the finish. Drink while young and fresh.

name: Red Rooster Cabernet Merlot 750ml
description: Cabernet Merlot / 14.5% ABV / B.C, Canada This medium to full-bodied red has soft drying tannins, and fruit-flavours of juicy blackberry and dark cherry, sprinkled with notes of spice. Blackberry, black tea and dark cherry notes linger on the extra-dry finish.

name: Sibling Rivalry White Blend 750ml
description: White Blend / 12% ABV / Ontario, Canada Pale bright straw colour; aromas of citrus, apple, pear and ripe peach with mineral/floral notes and hints of spice; off-dry, medium bodied, with zesty acidity and flavours of apple, lime, pear and peach; refreshing medium to long finish.

name: Henry of Pelham Riesling 750ml
description: Riesling / 10.5% ABV / Ontario, Canada This lovely riesling from the Speck family has the potential for aging. The pale straw colour is followed by a bouquet of peach, apricot, honey and floral notes. On the palate, it's light-bodied with a light spritz and delicate sweetness that is balanced by vibrant acidity from citrus flavours.

name: Henry of Pelham Baco Noir 750ml
description: Red / 12.5% ABV / Ontario, Canada Baco noir's wild berry and smoky notes are deftly handled at Henry of Pelham, where this grape has become a recognized specialty. Deep ruby red colour with purple hints; smoky, prune aromas with spice, floral and chocolate notes. Extra dry and medium-bodied with pronounced chokeberry flavours lingering on a smoky finish.

name: Copper Moon Malbec
description: Malbec / 14% ABV / B.C, Canada An appealing red colour and a bouquet of vanilla, chocolate and field berries is complimented by cherry and black currant. Copper Moon Malbec has a smooth medium body with a complex flavour profile encompassing dark red berries, cherry and black currant. Light oak notes and a bit of spice linger on the finish. Pairs with steak, ribs and other richly flavored foods.

name: Copper Moon Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Pale yellow colour with a fresh aroma of green apple, citrus, grass and gooseberry. Copper Moon Sauvignon Blanc is a light bodied wine with refreshing flavours of apple, peach and citrus, which also lingers on the finish. Pairs well with grilled pork, chicken with herbs and mixed salads.

name: Copper Moon Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 13% ABV / B.C, Canada Notes of black cherry and a hint of spice make it a great match for hearty BBQ ribs and burgers.

name: Copper Moon Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada Pale lemon yellow colour with beautiful aromas of citrus, green apple and ripe pear. Copper Moon Pinot Grigio is light bodied wine with refreshing flavours of citrus and melon. Slight floral notes linger on through the finish. Pairs well with fresh shellfish and pan-seared halibut.

name: Copper Moon Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13% ABV / B.C, Canada Notes of green apple and pear with just a hint of citrus to enhance grilled chicken or turkey and veggie burgers.

name: Copper Moon Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13% ABV / B.C, Canada Garnet colour with a bouquet of red berries, cherry, spice and a touch of smoke. Copper Moon Cabernet Sauvignon is a medium-bodied wine with flavours of plum, blueberry and cherry. Notes of berries and a touch of spice linger on the finish. Pairs well with pizza, red sauce pastas and burgers.

name: Cedar Creek Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.8% ABV / B.C, Canada Notes of lemon, mineral, and stone fruit on the nose. Full on the palate, the bright yellow apple and pear fruit is lightly bracketed with a refreshing lemon pith rinse.

name: Cedar Creek Cabernet Merlot 750ml
description: Cabernet Merlot / 13.6% ABV / B.C,Canada This of blend of Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon, and Cabernet Franc has notes of black cherry, spice, plum and leather. Fine tannins, juicy, and well structured.

name: goslings
description: Pinot Noir / 10.8% ABV / B.C, Canada At Gray Monk, we believe in delivering real value to our discerning customers. Value, to the Gray Monk family, means consistently providing quality, flavourful wines presented in a manner that is welcoming, educational, memorable and competitively priced.

name: Gray Monk Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 12.1% ABV / B.C, Canada The Chardonnay grapes were picked in October from vineyards in both the north and south Okanagan. This Chardonnay was fermented entirely in stainless steel and without malolactic fermentation. Yellow green in hue, this has concentrated, layered floral and tropical aromas, which are strikingly rich. The flavours are packed with tropical fruits, tangerines and melons. The wine is luscious and full on the palate, with a long finish of sweet fruit. Served chilled with seafood or poultry.

name: Gray Monk Latitude 50 750ml
description: White / 11% ABV / B.C, Canada The original Latitude 50! Created in 1990, it is a blend Latitude_50_White.jpgof vinifera grape varieties specifically chosen for their unique characteristics. The result is an easy drinking, refreshing wine that pairs well with many foods and many occasions. Consistently one of the top selling VQA white wines in Western Canada! With a pale lemon hue, this artfully blended wine has rich aromas of mango, lychee, spice and muscatel raisins. The flavours suggest layers of spice and ripe fruit, including sweet grapefruit. The texture is rich and full, with fruit flavours that persist in a long finish. Served chilled, this versatile wine is appealing on its own, in the picnic basket, with salads or poultry or light meat dishes.

name: Blasted Church Hatfields Fuse 750ml
description: White / 13% ABV / B.C, Canada A blend of various white wine grapes. A cornucopia of heavenly flavours; apricots and peaches with lemon and green apple. Pairs best with a sudsy bubble bath to wash away your sins.

name: See Ya Later Ranch Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir / 14.1% ABV / B.C, Canada A bouquet of strawberries, some sour cherries and hints of spice on the nose. The palate is rich and textured with similar flavours of ripe strawberries, baking spices and toastiness. The tannins are firm yet approachable, and the acid is in balance, offering a refreshingly long-lasting finish.

name: Inniskillin Okanagan Dark Horse Vineyard Meritage 750ml
description: Red / 14.5% ABV / B.C , Canada Black fruit and smoke on the nose of this robust BC red wine blend of 60% Merlot, 10% Cabernet Franc and 30% Cabernet Sauvignon. It was aged 12 months in French and American oak. The grapes come from a 22 acre vineyard in the southern Okanagan Valley known as the Golden Mile. Pair with a grilled steak. Meritage food pairings: steak, hamburgers, lamb.

name: Calona Royal White Okanagan Cellers 2L
description: White / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada A balanced, full-bodied, medium dry wine.

name: Calona Royal Red Okanagan Cellars 1L
description: Red/ 14% ABV / Okanagan, Canada A full-bodied, medium dry, red table wine.

name: Calona Royal Red Okanagan Cellars 2L
description: Red/ 14% ABV / Okanagan, Canada A full-bodied, medium dry, red table wine.

name: Bodacious Dark Red Blend 750ml
description: Red Blend / 12.5% ABV / B.C ,Canada With its distinctly smooth and bold taste profile, Bodacious comes in an assortment of blends, varietals and sizes. A new addition to the family, Bodacious Dark brings vibrant blackberry and mocha flavours, with balanced sweetness and a hint of vanilla on the finish. Ripe, fruity and easy to enjoy.

name: Bodacious Bourbon Barrel Aged Red Blend 750ml
description: Red Blend / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada Bodacious wines are gaining a following for their bold, yet smooth character. Enjoy floral and candied red berries aromas and flavours, along with notes of toast contributed by bourbon barrel ageing. The palate is smooth and elegant, followed by a lengthy finish. Enjoy with grilled steak or barbecue ribs.

name: Bodacious Red 750ml
description: Red Blend / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Medium ruby in colour; aromas of sweet black cherry, strawberry and candied fruit; off-dry with the same flavours as detected on the nose.

name: Bodacious White 750ml
description: White Blend / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada Pale straw colour; aromatic floral nose; off-dry and fruity with floral and peach notes on the palate.

name: Bodacious Moscato 750ml
description: Moscato / 11.2% ABV / Ontario, Canada This moscato is lightly effervescent and exotically aromatic in style. Forward aromas and flavours of white fruit - peach, quince - and orange blossom leap from the glass. On the palate, it's soft and medium sweet with a refreshingly light spritz. Perfect on its own and with fruit-based desserts or lightly spiced dishes.

name: Wine O'Clock Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12% ABV / B.C , Canada A mouth-watering Pinot Grigio that displays refreshing peach and apple flavours.

name: Wine O'Clock Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada A fruit-forward Shiraz bursting with flavours of juicy blackberry and black cherry, with a hint of spice. Smooth with a well-balanced finish. Timely pairings include sharp cheese, grilled seasonal veggies and marinated steak.

name: Inniskillin Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot/ 13% ABV / Ontario, Canada Black currant, chocolate, vanilla and toast are evident in this expressive nose. This full bodied Merlot provides harmonious flavours of black cherry, plum and a touch of spice as the finish lingers against fine round tannins.

name: Inniskillin Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir / 12% ABV / Ontario, Canada Ruby red colour; aromas of raspberry, cherry fruit, mineral and earthy with a touch of vanilla and spice; dry medium bodied; shows good varietal character.

name: Inniskillin Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / B.C, Canada Grapes were harvested throughout the Niagara Peninsula for this dual variety wine. Crushed and pressed separately both juices were cold settled overnight before racking and individually fermenting at a cool 15ËšC in stainless steel tanks for 12 days. Both wines were then blended together to integrate their individual unique components before bottling. Citrus aromatics of lemon and lime along with green apple are evident on the nose. The aromas replay in the flavours along with hints of peach that balance a crisp clean finish.

name: Gehringer Brothers Classic Ehrenfelser 750ml
description: White / 12.9% ABV / Canada This fruit-driven wine has vibrant notes of apricot and honey, hints of almond, and a subtle tangy acidity. A touch of sweetness highlights flavours, however unique tannins lead to a dry impression. Ideal as an aperitif, or paired with lightly-spiced dishes. This wine matches well with spiced foods, chicken, turkey, pasta and salads. Great as an aperitif as well.

name: Jackson-Triggs Reserve Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada Overflowing with notes of caramel and vanilla on the nose complemented by highlights of spice, apple, and butter. Similar flavours on the palate are accentuated by a round, creamy texture and a smooth lasting butterscotch finish.

name: Jackson-Triggs Reserve Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 14.2% ABV / B.C, Canada The Grand Reserve Shiraz is full and rich on both the nose and the palate. Red fruit and cherry complement the well integrated oak notes, backed up by chocolate and mocha aromas. On the palate, this wine exhibits bold flavours of cherry and coffee with good weight, rich mouth feel and a lingering finish.

name: Jackson-Triggs Cabernet Shiraz 750ml
description: Cabernet Shiraz / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada This wine has intense aromas of cherry, black currant, white pepper and raisins. The wine has an elegant balance, with fruity flavours and nice round tannins. It is a luxurious and elegant wine.

name: Jackson-Triggs Sauvignon Blanc 1.5L
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Invigorating aromas of lemon grass, lime zest and ripe tropical fruit. Elegant and crisp with impressive balance and fresh acid. Good intensity and weight with flavours of grapefruit, lemon, box tree, and passion fruit, leading to a graceful, structured finish. Try this wine with grilled swordfish, Thai green curry, fresh salads with goats cheese and feta, asparagus, avocado, grilled red peppers, fennel, mango or papaya.

name: Jackson Triggs Cabernet Sauvignon 1.5L
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Our Cabernet Sauvignon is full-bodied with subtle blackcurrant fruit on the nose. It is a dry, well-balanced wine with smooth tannins and a hint of oak on the palate.

name: Jackson Triggs Chardonnay 1.5L
description: Chardonnay / 11.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Our Chardonnay is dry and full-bodied with fragrant aromas of ripe apples and pears. A hint of oak and butter combine for a lingering, complex finish.

name: Jackson-Triggs Merlot 1.5L
description: Merlot / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada A delicious medium bodied red wine, with notes of oak, vanilla, cherry and plum both on the nose and the palate

name: Jackson Triggs Cabernet Merlot 750ml
description: Cabernet Merlot / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada The Delaine Cabernet Merlot is full of wonderfully enticing notes of dark fruit and cassis, with hints of vanilla and baking spice. The palate is restrained and structured offering a velvety texture and lasting finish.

name: Jackson Triggs Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12% ABV / B.C, Canada Vinified in a cool climate style, our Pinot Grigio displays zesty aromas of lime, apple, and pear, balanced with delicate floral notes. Tropical fruit and bright citrus flavours are accentuated by crisp, refreshing acidity.

name: Jackson-Triggs Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz / 13.8% ABV / B.C, Canada Deep garnet in colour, our Shiraz imparts rich aromas of ripe raspberry and blackberry with hints of cracked pepper and a subtle touch of oak. Bold fruit flavours dominate this full-bodied wine while firm tannins complete the finish.

name: Jackson-Triggs Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Invigorating aromas of lemon grass, lime zest and ripe tropical fruit. Elegant and crisp with impressive balance and fresh acid. Good intensity and weight with flavours of grapefruit, lemon, box tree, and passion fruit, leading to a graceful, structured finish. Try this wine with grilled swordfish, Thai green curry, fresh salads with goats cheese and feta, asparagus, avocado, grilled red peppers, fennel, mango or papaya.

name: Jackson Triggs Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Our Cabernet Sauvignon is full-bodied with subtle blackcurrant fruit on the nose. It is a dry, well-balanced wine with smooth tannins and a hint of oak on the palate.

name: Jackson Triggs Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 11.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Our Chardonnay is dry and full-bodied with fragrant aromas of ripe apples and pears. A hint of oak and butter combine for a lingering, complex finish.

name: Jackson-Triggs Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada A delicious medium bodied red wine, with notes of oak, vanilla, cherry and plum both on the nose and the palate

name: Jackson-Triggs Reserve Riesling 750ml
description: Riesling / 11% ABV / B.C, Canada Lovely crispness with a lemon, stone nose and palate. Bone-dry and refreshing yet very packed with citrus flavour. Nice lime lift on the finish. Riesling food pairings: spicy Asian fusion, maple glazed ham, grilled seafood.

name: Jackson-Triggs Reserve Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 13.7% ABV / B.C, Canada Medium ruby red colour; aromas and flavours of black plum, dark berries and light, toasted oak notes; extra dry, medium bodied, low to medium balanced tannins and good acidity on finish.

name: Jackson-Triggs Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.7% ABV / B.C, Canada Medium ruby colour; aromas of red cherry, earth, cracked pepper and toasted oak; on the palate it is dry and medium bodied with flavours of bright red fruit, earth and vanilla with dusty, dry tannins.

name: Sumac Ridge Estate Reserve Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Bright apple and melon aromas carry onto the palette and finish with crisp, clean citrus notes. A great partner with lighter fare, salads or simply on its own with good friends and family.

name: Sumac Ridge Estate Reserve Gewurtztraminer 750ml
description: Gewurtztraminer / 11.5% ABV / B.C, Canada This wine showcases vibrant flavours of lychee and juicy grapefruit complemented by rose petal notes and a hint of sweetness. Enjoy with simple salads to international favourites such as Thai, Indian and Moroccan dishes. Perfect on a sunny day!

name: Sumac Ridge Estate Reserve Pinot Grigio 750ml
description: Pinot Grigio / 12.5% ABV / B.C, Canada Tasting Note: Opens with orchard apple and peach aromas and continues onto the palate, finishing with a bright and vibrant acidity. Food Pairing: This crisp wine is a great match with mild cheeses, antipasto, fresh local greens and grilled veggies.

name: Sumac Ridge Estate Private Reserve Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot / 14.5% ABV / B.C, Canada This wine is well-balanced with dark cherry and blackberry notes and a hint of spice on both the nose and palate. The finish is a smooth, velvety medium weight with great length.

name: Chateau Timberlay Bordeaux Superieur 750ml
description: Bordeaux Blend/ 14% ABV / Bordeaux, France Deep ruby/garnet red colour; complex bouquet of prunes, bell peppers, cedar and smoky notes; rich flavours follow nose, balanced long finish and firm tannins.

name: Chateau Pey La Tour 750ml
description: Bordeaux Blend / 13% ABV / Bordeaux, France The wine is concentrated in appearance and tinged with brightness. Intense on the nose, with magnificent fruit freshness, predominantly red berry fruit, raspberry and wild blackberry aromas. The crunchy, rounded palate is defined by stunning balance.

name: Muton Cadet Bourdeux White 750ml
description: White Blend / 13.5% ABV / Bordeaux, France From France's leading wine family, a wine that has been the world's introduction to the Bordeaux region since 1930. A blend of sauvignon blanc, sÃ©millon and muscadelle showing flavours of quince, vanilla, nuts and green pear with light cantaloupe note. Serve with seafood pasta, shellfish or salads.

name: Mouton Cadet Bordeaux Red 750ml
description: Bordeaux Blend/ 13% ABV / Bordeaux, France From France's leading wine family, a wine that has been the world's introduction to the Bordeaux region since 1930. Merlot is dominant, contributing forward berry fruit. Cabernet sauvignon brings structure and cabernet franc adds elegance and finesse. Serve with pork tenderloin, duck breast or a selection of cheeses.

name: Chateau De Courteillac Bordeaux 750ml
description: Bordeaux / 13% ABV / Bordeaux, France Well priced and well-made Chateau bottled wine from Bordeaux. Bright ruby red colour. Aromas of red currant, cherry, herb and plum with notes of vanilla and spice. Palate is dry, mid-weight and rounded. Its fruity with a herbal edge and flavours of red currant, plum and spice. Finish is well balanced with soft tannins.

name: Domaine de Pellehaut Harmonie de Gascogne Rouge 750ml
description: Red Blend / 12.5% ABV / France 30% Merlot - 10% Syrah - 10% Malbec - 5% Pinot Noir - 25% Cabernet Sauvignon - 20% Tannat Domaine de Pellehaut has been owned and managed by successive generations of the BÃ©raut family for over 300 years. Today, the wines made with passion and dedication by Mathieu and Martin BÃ©raut win systematic praise from the trade and press in France and throughout the world. Pellehaut Harmonie de Gascogne red is remarkably balanced, showing intense fruit flavours married with toasty oak. Very approachable, easy-drinking but with lots of class and depth. A brilliant cherry hue, this wine is redolent of blackcurrant and blackberry, pepped up with peppery notes. Ample and supple as well as fruity, from start to finish. A multifaceted red that will add a special touch to every meal.

name: Roger Neveu Sancerre RosÃ© 750ml
description: RosÃ© /13% ABV/ Loire Valley ,France Lovely light pink salmony hues with red fruit and rose aromas on the nose. This elegant fruity wine shows good balance, smoothness and lovely long lasting aroma. A great refreshment on the patio and it works wonders anytime your spirits need to be uplifted. Enjoy with a variety of ethnic dishes, summer salads, parma ham with melon and grilled fish. Ideal as an aperitif or paired with starters.

name: Roger Neveu Sancerre Clos des Bouffants 750ml
description: White/ 12.5% ABV / Loire Valley, France The Clos des Bouffants, the primary Neveu family Sancerre holding, is a steep, due-south exposed, limestone vineyard located less than a half mile from the Neveu cellar. This storied vineyard was cited in the 1777 history of Sancerre, where the Abbott Poupart, priest of Sancerre, wrote, â€œthe Bouffants hillside is one of the best I know in our Sancerre area.â€

name: Gadais Muscadet de Sevre & Maine Sur Lie 750ml
description: White/ 12% ABV / Loire Valley, France Lemon yellow in the glass, with aromas of Anjou pear, baked apple and pastry. Dry, nicely balance with good acidity and a crisp finish. Flavours of citrus, pear, sourdough, slate and mineral. A great patio wine and good anytime your palate and spirits need to be awakened. Pairs well with oysters, both raw and baked, salads, seafood and grilled white meat. Easy peasy to drink, perfect for a lunch of poached egg on salad.

name: Chateau Cabriac Corbieres Rouge 750ml
description: Red/ 13.5% ABV / France The wine ChÃ¢teau de Cabriac - Tradition is a red wine produced in the Languedoc-Roussillon region in France, by ChÃ¢teau de Cabriac. This 2016 vintage comes from the CorbiÃ¨res appellation

name: Mouton Cadet RÃ©serve Haut-MÃ©doc 750ml
description: Red Blend/ 13% ABV/ Bordeaux, France A marvellously flavoursome, stylish and expressive mÃ©doc of considerable character, displaying seductive blackcurrant and blackberry flavours. A harmonious, round and full-bodied wine that ends on a slightly acidulated finish while keeping plenty of fruit-supported length on the palate.

name: GÃ©rard Bertrand Cote Des Roses Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir /13.5% ABV / Languedoc,France This vintage Cote des Roses celebrates theArt de Vivre Mediterranean. The soil, very varied, is essentially made up of hard limestone from the garrigues, schist soils but also gravel brought by the rivers of Languedoc. The climate, hot and windy ("semi-arid Mediterranean climate with mild winter variations") favours the ripening of the grapes and their good health, while keeping freshness thanks to the altitude and the effect of the sea, which mitigates the high summer temperatures. The bottle has a new rose-shaped bottom, created by a young designer from the Ecole Boulle. It's a wine that offers itself like a bouquet of roses!

name: Pierre Sparr Riesling 750ml
description: Riesling /12% ABV / Alsace, France Alsace has been celebrated for its lovely, dry white wines for centuries. In the heart of Alsaceâ€™s finest district, the Haut-Rhin, Maison Pierre Sparr follows a 300-year-old tradition of winemaking that began in 1680, during the reign of King Louis XIV. Today, the devotion to the land, the attention to the smallest detail and the uncompromising quest for excellence can been seen in every bottle bearing the Sparr crest

name: Pierre Sparr Pinot Gris 750ml
description: Pinot Gris /13.5% ABV / Alsace,France This Pinot Gris is yellow gold. Alluring aromas of juicy apricots and peaches are prominent with subtle undertones of minerals. On the palate it has elegant opulence, freshness and sweetness in a sleek body finished with a touch of smoke and spice.

name: Hugel Gentil Gewurztraminer 750ml
description: Gewurztraminer /13% ABV/ Alsace,France This wine revives an ancient Alsace tradition that wines assembled from noble grape varieties were called "Gentil". Gentil "Hugel" allies the suave, spicy flavour of Gewurztraminer, the body of Pinot Gris, the finesse of Riesling, the grapiness of Muscat and the refreshing character of Sylvaner. The resulting wine is aromatic and floral, but still is fresh and bright with a dry finish.

name: Kuentz Fleur d'Alasace 750ml
description: White/ 12.5% ABV / Alsace,France A blend of gewurztraminer, pinot blanc and sylvaner, Fleur d'Alsace is the ideal wine to accompany your more spicy dishes. Rather short passage of the wine in old oak barrels, we find notes of white flower, rose and spice. Wine with a touch of acidity and a beautiful opulent texture on the palate.

name: Kuhlmann Platz Riesling Reserve 750ml
description: Riesling /12% ABV /Alsace, France With 200 hectares and 130 members, the Cave CoopÃ©rative de Hunawihr offers the full range of seven Alsatian grape varieties. Vinified in the spirit of consumption for any occasion, this Riesling showcases honeyed, fruity and mineral notes.

name: Kuhlmann-Platz Pinot Gris 750ml
description: Pinot Gris / 13% ABV / Alsace, France An open, generous and straightforward wine, offering fresh pear and apricot fruit and a lifted smokiness. Gently off-dry, emphasising the soft, ripe fruit, the palate has a pleasing length. The perfect partner for the classic choucroute garnie, or for ripe soft cheeses

name: Gerard Bertrand Cote des Roses RosÃ© 750ml
description: RosÃ© / 13% ABV / Languedoc, France CÃ´te des Roses celebrates the Mediterranean lifestyle. The Languedoc appellation stretches along the Mediterranean coast from the Spanish border as far as the city of NÃ®mes, along the foothills of the Montagne Noire and the CÃ©vennes. The soils are highly varied, mainly with hard limestone and schist, but also gravel transported by the rivers of the Languedoc region. The warm, windy climate (â€œsemi-arid Mediterranean climate with mild wintersâ€) helps the grapes to ripen in good, healthy condition, while retaining all their fresher qualities thanks to the altitude and the influence of the sea which eases the scorching summer heat. The bottle is original with its base in the shape of a rose, created by a young designer from the Ecole Boulle. A wine to be given in the same way you would offer a bunch of roses!

name: Gerard Bertrand Corbieres 750ml
description: Red Blend / 14% ABV/ Languedoc-Roussillon , France Complex aromas of black fruit and ripe fruit with subtle hints of spices and earth. This is a full wine characteristic of the elegant Corbieres region.

name: ChÃ¢teau Laulerie Malbec Bergerac 750ml
description: Malbec/ 13% ABV / France Malbec the way it was always meant to taste â€“ distinctive aromas of spice and herbs, elegantly structured, memorable.

name: Chateau De Camarsac Bordeaux Superieur 750ml
description: Red blend/ 14.5% ABV / Bordeaux, France "This wine brings concentrated black fruit flavors balanced by tense acidity. The rich tannins are held at bay by the wine's lively, fresh nature."

name: Fat Bastard  Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 14.1% ABV / France A beautiful ruby-red color with rich and opulent aromas of black currant, crushed blackberry, cinnamon and pepper spices. A wine with a tightly woven texture, fine grain tannins and a long, persistent finish, this Cabernet Sauvignon is exceptionally expressive, powerful and smooth all at once.

name: Fat Bastard Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay/ 13% ABV / France To craft the Fat bastard Chardonnay, grapes are sourced from all over the Languedoc-Rousillon, from the banks of the Rhone in the east to Carcassonne in the west, and from the foothills of the Massif Central in the north to the Mediterranean coast in the south. These different origins give the wine the balanced fruit flavor and acidity that have made it a consumer favorite.

name: Fleur de Mer RosÃ© 750ml
description: RosÃ©/ 13% ABV /Cotes Du Provence, France Fleur De Mer is a classic French Provencal RosÃ©. A brilliant coral pink color, this crisp French wine evokes aromas of fresh watermelon, cherry, subtle citrus, lavender and Mediterranean herbs. This blush wine is medium bodied and balanced with refreshing acidity. Bright and beautiful, Fleur de Mer Rose is best enjoyed chilled. Fleur de Mer was made to inspire beauty and allure, bringing Provence to your table. The unique lavender label pays tribute to Provenceâ€™s famed fields of lavender that bask in the warm summer sun.

name: Alsace Willm Pinot Blanc 750ml
description: Pinot Blanc/ 11% ABV / Alsace, France Hints of lemon and green pear on the nose become fully fleshed and expressive on the dry, fresh palate. Bright lemon provides freshness and grip throughout. It's a refreshing wine with a lively, brisk finish

name: Les Traverses de Fontanes Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon/ 13% ABV / France Jefferson would certainly have appreciated this delicious wine from Vin de Pays d'Oc, France. Don't let its blood red color deter you. A nose of freshly furrowed fields of wild flowers and earthy notes complement full-bodied, herbacious flavor with hints of tobacco, oregano and dipping oil. Nice, long finish.

name: La Vieille Ferme Blanc 750ml
description: White Blend /13.5% ABV / Rhone Valley, France The Blanc shows bright yellow color with tints of green. Aromas of green fruit, wheat, hazelnuts. On the palate, soft, delicate, aromatic mouthfeel.

name: La Vieille Ferme Rouge 750ml
description: Red Blend/ 13.5% ABV /Rhone Valley, France The Perrin family selects Grenache, Syrah, Carignan and Cinsault, vinifying in a manner reflecting their ChÃ¢teauneuf tradition. This is a richly fruity and supple wine, ruby-purple colored, with aromas of cassis and herbs, flavors of plum and blackberry on the palate.

name: La Vieille Ferme RosÃ© 750ml
description: RosÃ©/ 13.5% ABV / Rhone Valley, France This rosÃ© comes from the south end of the RhÃ´ne valley in the Ventoux appellation. It is made from a blend of grenache, syrah, and cinsault grapes. The color is darker than other French rosÃ©s, almost a ruby color. The taste is absolutely delicious. Fruity, dry, crisp, and smooth. It pairs great with grilled meats and sunshine - perfect for BBQs or a day at the lake.

name: Louis Bernard Cotes du Rhone 750ml
description: Red Blend/ 13.5% ABV / Rhone Valley, France 80% Grenache and 20% Syrah aged in French oak barrels 12 months. Packed with luscious, spicy fruit flavours and a ripe, complex nose, it carries all the attributes that its famous name implies. Blackcurrant and black pepper come through on the palate with a hint of minerality. Smooth tannins linger on the rich finish.

name: E. Guigal Cotes Du Rhone White
description: White Blend/ 13.5% ABV /Rhone Valley, France Golden yellow color bright and clear. On the nose, the wine is marked with freshness by very distinct aromas of Viognier. Aromas of white flowers, apricot, acacia and white peach. Fruity wine with a lot of fat and wealth. This is a full wine combining elegance, power and balance.

name: E. Guigal Cotes Du Rhone Rouge 750ml
description: Red Blend/ 13.5% ABV / Rhone Valley, France Deep and dark red. Shiny. Aromas of fresh fruits with red berries and spices. Full, round and racy. Rounded and smooth tannins. A full-bodied, rich and intensely aromatic wine.

name: M. Chapoutier Rasteau
description: Grenache /14.5% ABV / Rhone Valley, France Very deep crimson red, fine and powerful. We find numerous ripe fruit aromas. This wine presents a good structure and great potential.

name: M. Chapoutier Belleruche CÃ´tes-du-RhÃ´ne 750ml
description: Grenache /14% ABV / CÃ´tes-du-RhÃ´ne, France Deep red garnet color, this Cotes du Rhone Belleruche shows intense aromas of blackcurrant and raspberry complemented by notes of white pepper. In the mouth, this wine is juicy, powerful, and fruity with red fruits and lovely roasted notes. The mouthfeel is accompanied by silky and delicate tannins.

name: M. Chapoutier Bila-Haut Blanc 750ml
description: White Blend / 13% ABV / Cotes Du Roussillon, France This wine is made from a blend of three different indigenous grapes: Grenache Blanc, Grenache Gris, and Macabeu. The Grenache tends to lend gentle, soft fruit to the blend, while Macabeu adds tropical aromatics and florality. The wine was fermented and aged in stainless steel as to not cloud the fruity personality of the grapes. It is bottled quite quickly after the wine is finished, and is released as an early drinking wine.

name: Perrin RÃ©serve Cotes du Rhone Rouge 750ml
description: Red Blend/ 13.5% ABV / Cotes du Rhone, France Famille Perrin Reserve Cotes du Rhone Rouge has a pretty deep color. The nose offers a beautiful aromatic complexity, marked by Grenache and a hint of blackcurrant brought by the ripe Syrah. On the palate, it shows complexity with tannins still present, but with finesse and elegance, and a beautiful freshness. Pairs well with beef, lamb and poultry.

name: Louis Bernard ChÃ¢teauneuf-du-Pape 750ml
description: Grenache /14% ABV / Rhone Valley, France Deep garnet red color. This expressive wine opens up with blueberries, passion fruits, garrigue and mint. A full-bodied wine, creamy and lush on the palate. The finish is long with notes of mocha and black tea.

name: Georges Duboeuf MÃ¢con-Villages 750ml
description: Chardonnay /12.5% ABV / Burgundy, France A brilliant pale gold colour with green tints. Intense white blossom aromas delicately enhanced by hints of lemon. The palate confirms this delightful bouquet, offering a whole range of fruit and floral aromas. Superbly full-bodied. A seductive wine.

name: Felix & Lucie Cabernet-Syrah 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon/ Syrah/ 13.5% ABV / France France's Languedoc region possesses a warm, dry climate that's ideal for growing ripe, rich versions of cabernet sauvignon and syrah. This cab/syrah blend delivers upfront aromas and flavours of black olive, smoke, prune and toast. Given its light to medium body and ripe flavours, pair with beef brisket or stews.

name: Georges Duboeuf Beaujolais-Villages 750ml
description: Gamay /13% ABV / Burgundy, France An intense bright ruby colour; shows fragrant aromas of dark fruit and spice with earthy/minerally notes; extra dry, soft yet structured palate, delightfully fresh and bright with chewy tannins, shows forward flavours of dark fruit, nutmeg and herbs.

name: Georges Duboeuf Beaujolais 750ml
description: Beaujolais/ 12.5% ABV / Burgundy, France Dark ruby colour; young berry fruit & cherry aromas; soft fruit flavour; easy drinking style.

name: Drouhin Bourgogne Chardonnay La Foret 750ml
description: Chardonnay /13% ABV /Burgundy, France LaforÃªt Bourgogne Chardonnay is made with the Chardonnay grape coming from the whole of Burgundy. It is often the entry level wine leading to the great white Burgundies: to drink it provides the simple pleasures of a classic Burgundy.

name: Gautheron Chablis 750ml
description: Chardonnay /12.5% ABV / Burgundy, France Chablis in its classic form, pure and steely, smooth and clean, is still among wineâ€™s great pleasures; and it is on this style of wine that the Domaine Gautheron focuses.

name: Domaine Tour du Pech Pinot Noir 750ml
description: Pinot Noir/ 13.5% ABV / Languedoc-Roussillon, France Another Pays D'oc Pinot Noir (NOT from Burgundy) that has a slightly darker ruby hue and notes of raspberry, red cherry, and a good finish of minerality.

name: George Duboeuf la Madone Fleurie 750ml
description: Gamay /12.5% ABV /Beaujolais, France This wine has a superb red colour with purple tints. On the nose, it develops peach and peony aromas. Very fruity and floral, it is a feminine, full-bodied, noble wine. We recommend tasting this wine at 15 Â°C

name: Lucien Lardy Beaujolais Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay/ 12.5% ABV/ Beaujolais,France When the Chardonnay finds his terroir of predilection in Beaujolais, it is savoury with a nice freshness! Try it with poultry, white meat skewers, grilled fishes, fruit with almonds and cream

name: Domaine Les CÃ´tes de la Roche Saint-Amour 750ml
description: Gamay /13% ABV /Beaujolais,France With good fruit density and notes of black cherries on the nose, this is a well-structured wine from one of Beaujolais' lesser-known villages. It will be a delicious accompaniment to coq au vin.

name: Joseph Drouhin Beaujolais Village 750ml
description: Gamay /12.5% ABV /Beaujolais, France "A truly convivial wine. Owing to the careful blending of various terroirs, the result is a wine of great charm. It has a lovely raspberry colour and a brilliant hue. The nose is both refined and intense, with notes of violet, peony and red fruit syrup. As you drink it, it feels fresh and silky. Both freshness and fruit remain for quite a long time on the palate". - VÃ©ronique Boss-Drouhin

name: Bastine Miraflors Vielles Vignes 750ml
description: Syrah/Grenache /14.5% ABV / Roussillon, France A blend of 74% Syrah and 26% Grenache that was brought in a mix of tank and used barrels, the 2017 Bastide Miraflors has a fabulous minerality as well as terrific kirsch, black raspberry, wild fennel, white pepper, and hints of black licorice aromas and flavors. Pure, medium to full-bodied, silky, and seamless on the palate, it's perfectly balanced, and way over-delivers. Drink it over the coming 2-3 years.

name: Jaszbery Szekszardi Kekfrankos 750ml
description: Kekfrankos /12% ABV / Hungary Clear deep ruby colour; subtle aromas of cherry, soft floral and spice; dry and medium bodied, aromas repeat on the palate, light cherry, spice and soft floral; short finish.

name: Daos Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot /13% ABV / Republic of Moldova Handpicked Merlot grapes grown in the southern Moldova region of Etulia create this deep red coloured wine. Aged 12 months in French oak barrels, it is characterized with a velvety, fruity taste. Saffron and prune notes linger in the bouquet. This is a complex yet fresh, medium bodied wine with an appealing long finish.

name: Salton Paradoxo Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot /13% ABV /Brazil It has a lively burgundy coloring. In its aroma notes of ripe red fruits and balsamic notes, which are highlighted by aromas own passage through oak barrels arise. In the mouth, the acidity is refreshing, its tannins are ripe and unctuous, and gustatory persistence is prolonged.

name: Boutari Cambas Retsina 750ml
description: White /11% ABV /Greece Clear bright gold. Dry and tart flavour. Pine resin dominates the aroma and flavour at first. Hints of white fruit and floral notes.

name: Plantaze Vranac 750ml
description: Red /13.3% ABV / Montenegro The colour of the wine is intense red ruby. On nose, distinct aromas of small, berry fruit, blackberry and blueberry with discreet, dry spices. On palate, the wine is very fruity with prevailing aroma of blackberry with balanced acids and moderate tannin structure.The aftertaste is intense of fruity-spicy character.

name: Gazela Vinho Verde 750ml
description: White Blend, Vinho Verde /9% ABV / Minho, Portugal Like Pinot Grigio? You'll love Gazela. Light fresh and slightly bubbly wine from Portugal. 87 calories per serving. 9% ABV. A well balanced, slightly bubbly wine with notes of refreshing citrus fruit, white peach, green lime and fresh pear.

name: Vicente Faria Animus Douro 750ml
description: Red Blend /13% ABV / Douro, Portugal Great value, classic Portuguese red made from indigenous varieties grown in the prestigious Douro Valley. Expect a dark ruby garnet colour, and complex upfront aromas and flavours of black plum, chocolate and licorice with a note of wild honey. Palate is dry, medium-bodied and rich with ripe tannins and a long finish.

name: Mateus RosÃ© 750ml
description: RosÃ© /11% ABV / Portugal The iconic flask-shaped bottle, has introduced generations to the world of wine with a fresh, lightly sparkling and versatile style. Pale salmon in colour with floral, red currant, lightly yeasty aromas and flavours. Dry, lightly sparkling with a flavourful, soft finish; serve well-chilled with appetizers.

name: JP AzeitÃ£o Red 750ml
description: Red Blend /13% ABV / Portugal From the Palmela region of Portugal's Setubal Peninsula, this is a popular and well-made blend of 40 % syrah, and 60% local red varieties. Flavours of cherry, strawberry and blackberry are supported by a supple tannic structure. Excellent value and an ideal partner for grilled chicken, pork with clams or cured meats. Fruity aroma, dominated by nuances of fruits of the forest and strawberry conserve. In the mouth, we find flavours identical to the aromas, integrated with a smooth tannic structure.

name: Old Vines In Young Hands Tinto 750ml
description: Red Blend /13.5% ABV / Portugal It sources its grapes from 1100 growers across the region, using native Douro grape varieties like malvasia fina for whites and tinta roriz (tempranillo), touriga franca and touriga nacional for the reds. The grapes for the Old Vines in Young Hands wines we buy come from gnarly old vines grown on ancient terraces.

name: Casa de Santa Vitoria VersÃ¡til Tinto 750ml
description: Red Blend /14% ABV / Alentejano, Portugal A Red wine from Alentejano, Portugal. Made from Touriga Nacional, Aragonez, Trincadeira, and Tinta Caiada grapes.

name: Casal Garcia Vinho Verde White 750ml
description: White Blend /9.5% ABV / Minho, Portugal A light wine that is marked by its beautiful citric colours and incredible freshness. Its aromatic splendour is revealed through soft hints of tropical fruits and citric aromas. A very balanced wine that leaves a harmonious and citric after-taste.

name: Periquita Original Red 750ml
description: Red Blend /13% ABV /Portugal 74% Castelao, 14% Trincadeira, 12% Aragones (Tempranillo) Dark ruby red in color, with notes of wild berries, raspberries, mint, strawberries and vanilla. Medium-bodied, fruity, soft, and well balanced with a long, smooth finish. Serve at room temperature. Excellent with red meat, turkey and other white meats, and cheeses.

name: Cabriz Red Reserva Dao 750ml
description: Red Blend /13% ABV / Dao, Portugal Intense red colour; aroma of wildberries, flowers & mineral notes. Excellent balance & well integrated tannins. Spends 9 months in French oak barrels. This wine perfectly accompanies red meats, roast beef & grilled meats.

name: Cabriz Colheita Seleccionada White 750ml
description: White Blend /12.5% ABV / Portugal Citrus color defined with slight greenish tones. Distinctive aromatic intensity, tropical fruits, exotic, citrus blossom and linden. Fruity, fresh, elegant and harmonious flavor Grape Varieties: 40% Encruzado, 20% Bical, 20% Malvasia, 20% Cerceal-Branco

name: Silk & Spice Red Blend 750ml
description: Red Blend /13.5% ABV / Douro, Portugal Silk & Spice represents the exceptional flavors made possible by Portugalâ€™s diverse terroir, indigenous Portuguese grapes, and the exotic spices and aromas discovered on the â€˜Silk and Spiceâ€™ routes to the far east in the 1500â€™s. This is a red blend of deep, rich layers, characterized by aromas of ripe red fruit with hints of vanilla, mocha and spices. The label illustrates a reinterpretation of an original XV century map from the Age of Discovery. It details the Bay of Bengal, the Portuguese coat of arms and a historic caravel of the time, all symbolizing the bravery of the maritime explorers who journeyed into the unknown and shared with the world spices like nutmeg, cinnamon and pepper, and fabrics like silk.

name: Fado Red 750ml
description: Red Blend/ 14% ABV / Alentejo, Portgual Fado Red, is a mix of 25% aragonez, 25% alicante bouschet, 25% touriga nacional and 25% trincadeira - none of these really household name grapes outside of Portugal

name: Lo Tengo Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec /13.5% ABV / Argentina Rich ruby red in colour with purple hints. Fresh fruit, cinnamon and cherry aromas. Very attractive velvety feel on the palate, delicious finish

name: Menage A Trois Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec /13.2% ABV / Argentina Our MÃ©nage Ã  Trois Malbec is a sultry wine that boldly tangos across your palate trailing an irresistible blend of blackberries, blueberries, dark cherries and hints of spice in its wake. With an opulent texture, soft, round tannins, and a long, velvety finish, this wine is passion personified.

name: Michel Torino Cuma Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon /13% ABV / Argentina On the palate you will find this wine to be dry and fresh with medium tannins. It has flavours of cranberry and cassis, as well as a hint of smoke.

name: Michel Torino Cuma Organic Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec /13.5% ABV / Salta, Argentina All organic practices are carried over from vineyard to winery where the wines are carefully handled throughout the entire vinification process. Cuma is produced to be drunk young, therefore little oak is used in the winery; instead the wines are aged at cool temperatures in stainless steel tanks in an effort to showcase theyâ€™re natural complexity and deep fruit flavors.

name: Masi Tupungato Passo Doble Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec /13.5% ABV / Mendoza, Argentina Red wine with unusual aromatic richness, striking for its fruity intensity and light spiciness. This is a modern wine made in an unconventional style from grapes produced on the Masi Tupungato La Arboleda estate at Mendoza in Argentina.

name: Tamari Malbec Reserva 750ml
description: Malbec/ 14% ABV/ Mendoza, Argentina TamarÃ­ means to be passionate in Huarpe, the native language of the people of the Mendoza province in Argentina. Tamari Reserva wines are the best expression of the Argentinean style. The TamarÃ­ Reserva Malbec comes from the Uco Valley and high zones of the Mendoza River in Argentina. The vineyard is at an altitude of 900 to 1100 meters and the soil is stony and fast draining. The climate is well balanced between warm daytime temperatures and cool nighttime temperatures, with good isolation and low rain level - bringing out the finest qualities of the Malbec varietal. Be sure to try this fruity, concentrated wine with fare such as grilled red meats, lamb, ostrich, wild boar, duck, pork and strong cheeses. Enjoy & be passionate!

name: Bodega Septima Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec /14% ABV / Mendoza, Argentina SÃ©ptima Malbec is an Argentine wine made in Bodegas SÃ©ptima. It is the perfect balance between historical heritage, innovation and oenological excellence. Wine made 100% with the Malbec variety is a soft, warm and balanced wine.

name: Norton Reserva Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec /14.1 % ABV / Mendoza, Argentina Specially reserved due to its exceptional features, Reserva wine is characterized by its elegance and complexity.
