It is made from carefully selected grapes from vineyards aged between 30 and 50 years old. The wine is then aged in French oak barrels and then additionally in bottles before release. The harmonious coexistence of fruit and wood over time has made this a great wine, characterized by elegance and complexity. Toasty yet ripe, showing ample mesquite and mocha notes to the raspberry ganache and rich plum fruit. Silky tannins line the dark, cream-tinged finish.

name: Luigi Bosca Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec /14% ABV / Mendoza, Argentina As a tribute to the land and to those who work it, Luigi Bosca have worked more than 110 years to understand the intention of the vine. The passion of four generations of the same family, shown in Bodega Luigi Boscaâ€™s collection, reflects the result of an ambitious effort started many years ago: the wish to express the thorough version of the essence of Argentine wine. This Malbec is a deep ruby red color, with aromas of ripe red fruit, spices and black pepper. The palate intensity is complemented by the softness and sweetness of tannins. Full-bodied and well structured. Pair with grilled or broiled red meat, deer, hard cheese.

name: Bodegas Escorihuela Gascon Circus Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec /13% ABV / Mendoza, Argentina A fetching new label adorns the Circus, and it delivers aromas dominated by spice and blackberry, which are woven with plummy notes, soy sauce, dried herbs, dark chocolate, blueberries and tobacco. It is equally salty and spicy in the mouth; dark mocha, leather and muddled tangy wild berries come together to create a savoury/umami wine, an everyday dinner red, perfect for hearty stews, roasted meats and hard cheeses.

name: 1884 Estate Grown RosÃ© 750ml
description: RosÃ© /13% ABV / Mendoza, Argentina 1884 Estate rose has delicate aromas of red fruits, on the palate it has soft and ripe tannins along with delicate acidity.

name: Clos De Los Siete Blend 750ml
description: Red Blend /14.6% ABV / Argentina Purple, almost purple. Ripe bouquet of black currant, exotic woods, chocolates. Wonderfully sweet fruit in engaging the palate, creamy, ripe blackberries and plums, fine toasty aromas, dark bread, punchy finale.

name: Layer Cake Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec /14.5% ABV / Mendoza, Argentina The 2011 is a classic Malbec, but undoubtedly Layer Cake. Big, brooding, black fruit, then rich earth, truffles and dark cocoa are at the front. The Sea of Stones vineyard is at its core, always evident with the thread of minerality that the deep alluvial cobblestones lend. This wine is so elegant in the mouth with fresh-picked blackberries, simmering chocolate sauce on the stove, and somewhere someone's cooking bacon ? so many layers, so little time.?

name: DoÃ±a Paula Estate Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec /13.5% ABV / Mendoza, Argentina Dona Paula Estate Malbec has an intense violet color. On the nose, aromas of black fruits, violets and spices. Mineral and graphite notes. Great balance and freshness in the mouth, with good concentration and medium structure. Soft tannins and persistent finish.

name: Trapiche Oak Cask Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec /14% ABV / Mendoza, Argentina Vineyards located between 750 and 1100 meters above sea level. Purple-colored, the nose offers up plum and black cherry notes with a touch of black pepper. The palate is soft and round with ripe, saturated berry flavors. Finishes spicy and full with chewy tannins. Ideal to serve with cheeses, red meats, mushrooms, stew and the typical Argentinian â€œasadoâ€.

name: Trapiche Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec /13% ABV / Mendoza, Argentina Trapiche Malbec Single Vineyard is a selection of the three best Malbec wines from each harvest, produced separately in the winery, following the same wine-making process. Trapiche elaborates ultra-premium Malbec wines coming from over 90 vineyards in different areas of Mendoza. Every year, Daniel Pi and his team choose out of this fantastic collection the three best Malbec wines from exceptional vineyards to communicate TrapicheÂ´s foundations: the richness of diversity.

name: Trapiche Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon /13% ABV / Mendoza, Argentina Deep ruby red colour; cassis, plum, raisin and bell pepper aroma; dry, medium-full body and medium intensity fruit flavour, forward tannin in the finish.

name: Fuzion Shiraz Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec /13% ABV / Mendoza, Argentina Intense violet colour with aromas of prunes. Medium-bodied and silky, with good concentration and long finish. Enjoy with barbecued meat, pasta and mature cheeses.

name: Alamos Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay / 13.5 % ABV / Mendoza, Argentina Oak, Tropical, Citrus, Medium-bodied Mendoza, Argentina- The nose offers light tropical fruit aromas with ripe citrus and floral notes. The mouthfeel is full of concentrated apple and pear fruit flavors with tones of vanilla and sweet spice from oak aging.

name: Alamos Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5 % ABV / Mendoza, Argentina Deep and rich, our Alamos Cabernet Sauvignon expresses dark berry characteristics that are complemented nicely by slight herbal notes. Oak aging lent complex layers of brown spice and vanilla and a firm tannic structure to this wine.

name: Alamos Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec / 13.6 % ABV / Mendoza, Argentina Alamos Malbec captures the spirit and terroir of Argentinaâ€™s signature variety. Grown at high-level altitudes, our Malbec offers layers of dark cherry and blackberry with a velvety mouthfeel. This complex red wine pairs beautifully with a wide range of cuisine and is recognized for its pronounced freshness.

name: Finca Los Primos Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec / 14.5% ABV / Argentina This is a rich and full-bodied malbec. There`s loads of ripe cherries and plums together with tobacco aromas and flavours. It has a rounded, supple and fat feel about it givng a deeply warming and satisfying wine.

name: Finca Los Primos Torrontes 750ml
description: Torrontes /13% ABV / Salta, Argentina Shy aromas of green banana, lime and lychee set up a pleasant, lifted palate. Flavors of lime, lychee, honeydew and mango precede a mild, refreshing finish. Drink now.

name: Santa Julia (+) Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec / 13.5 % ABV / Argentina Santa Julia [+] is symbolic of our respect and care for the natural environment of Mendoza, the home of the company since its founding in 1963. The range represents four pillars, which act as the foundation for all of its operations: People, Vineyards, Winery, and Environment. This wine shows typical Malbec aromas of ripe fruits such as figs, plums and blackberries. On the palate their are further complexities of vanilla, tobacco, coffee and chocolate. This medium to full-bodied wine has soft tannins, good structure and a long finish.

name: Los Haroldos Estate Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec / 13.5 % ABV / Mendoza, Argentina Herbal plum aromas are dusted with cinnamon-like spice notes, while this feels punchy on the palate. Generic berry and baking spice flavors are mild on the finish.

name: Alamos Malbec Seleccion 750ml
description: Malbec / 14 % ABV / Mendoza, Argentina Smooth and ripe with dense, smooth texture and lovely, rich style; juicy, lush and balanced with a long, vibrant finish.

name: Escorihuela Gascon 1884 Reservado Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec / 13.7% ABV / Mendoza, Argentina Very coffee, espresso on the nose like some South African pinotages. Full-bodied, smooth with black charred fruit on the palate. Pair with coffee-rubbed steak. Malbec food pairings: barbecued beef, chili con carne, mushroom burgers.

name: Don David Reserve Malbec 750ml
description: Malbec / 13.9 % ABV / Argentina The flagship red varietal of Argentina. This wine shows plum, red fruits, spicy black cherries and cassis with toasted oak notes on the nose and palate. Ripe fruit and linear acidity balance strong but soft, ripe tannins. Displaying expressive plum jam, raisin and pipe tobacco aromas, with toasty vanilla notes, the wine has balanced, spicy dark fruits and cassis, almond and nutty notes on the long finish.

name: Boone's Farm Sangria 750ml
description: Speciality Wine /6 .5 % ABV / California, USA So that whole carbonation thing is tough to wrap ones head around. The sugar is also very elevated. Itâ€™s rather like drinking an orange and grape soda mix with a hint of strawberry. The acid is borderline unpleasant, and overall it doesnâ€™t seem at all like wine.

name: Boone's Sun Peak Peach 750ml
description: Speciality Wine/ 5% ABV / California, USA A refreshing taste of ripe peaches with a hint of sweetness. Serve chilled or blended with ice.

name: Boones Farm Strawberry Hill 750ml
description: Specialty Wine / 7.5% ABV / California, USA A refreshing taste of ripe strawberries with a hint of sweetness. Serve chilled or blended with ice.

name: Boones Snow Creek Berry 750ml
description: Specialty Wine / 3.2% ABV / California, USA Booneâ€™s Farm Snow Creek Berry is a light pink color with bright strawberry and cherry flavors, hints of watermelon shine through on the light and crisp finish.

name: Lolea No.2 White Sangria 750ml
description: White Sangria / 7 % ABV / Spain Lolea is from Zaragoza, Spain and transcends the Sangria category to forge its own path as a "Frizzante Sangria" Made exclusively from natural ingredients, it has no preservatives, no colorants, and no additives. This preserves the characteristics we sense when we drink fresh wine.

name: Lolea No. 1 Red Sangria 750ml
description: Red Sangria / 7 % ABV / Spain Lolea is from Zaragoza, Spain and transcends the Sangria category to forge its own path as a "Frizzante Sangria" Made exclusively from natural ingredients, it has no preservatives, no colorants, and no additives. This preserves the characteristics we sense when we drink fresh wine.

name: Wild Vines Blackberry Merlot 750ml
description: Merlot /6% ABV / California, USA Bright garnet colour; blackberry and raspberry aromas; medium sweet berry flavour with a slight spritz

name: Wild Vines Strawberry White Zinfandel 750ml
description: White Zinfandel /6% ABV / California,USA Salmon pink in colour; fragrant notes of strawberry, watermelon, pear, figs and nuts on the nose; it is effervescent and refreshing on the medium sweet palate.

name: Arbor Mist Sangria Zinfandel 750ml
description: Specialty Wine / 6 % ABV / New York, United States Succulent cherries and zesty citrus fruit flavors mingle with Zinfandel to create a delicious twist on traditional Spanish Sangria.

name: Arbor Mist Peach Chardonnay 750ml
description: Chardonnay /6% ABV / New York, United States Arbor Mist Chardonnay Peach Wine: Light varietal wine With the refreshing taste of natural fruit flavors Perfect for relaxing at home or outdoors with friends and family

name: Arbor Mist Mango Strawberry Moscato 750ml
description: Moscato / 6 % ABV / New York, United States Delightfully sweet, this blend of light-bodied Moscato, juicy mango, and luscious strawberry flavors delivers a smooth and refreshing taste.

name: Arbour Mist Exotic Fruit White Zinfandel 750ml
description: Pink Wine / 14 % ABV / New York, United States Light pink colour, slight spritz; raspberry, strawberry kiwi aromas; sweet berry flavour.

name: Chum Churum Blueberry Soju 360ml
description: Soju / 12% ABV/ South Korea Chum Churum Blueberry Soju is made from a mix of grains and rice. Popular as Korea's national spirit, soju is a well-known drink in Asian countries. It's smooth and carries subtle sweet hints along with aromas of pear and ginger. It features a fruity flavor with jasmine and ginger notes. The finish is subtly sweet, and the drink partners well with spicy Korean dishes. The liquor is made using alkaline water that helps to enhance its flavor. Hint of blueberry flavor added to it.

name: Chum Churum Original Soju 360ml
description: Soju / 17% ABV/ South Korea Chum Churum Original Soju is made from a mix of grains and rice. Popular as Korea's national spirit, soju is a well-known drink in Asian countries. It's smooth and carries subtle sweet hints along with aromas of pear and ginger. It features a fruity flavor with jasmine and ginger notes. The finish is subtly sweet, and the drink partners well with spicy Korean dishes. The liquor is made using alkaline water that helps to enhance its flavor.

name: Kooksoondang Makgeolli 750ml
description: Specialty Wine /6 % ABV / South Korea Makgeolli is an alcoholic drink made and mostly enjoyed in Korea. Made from a mixture of wheat and rice, is it sweet and milky with a clean and smooth taste. Classified and described as a 'sparkling rice wine.' Very traditional! Low alcohol , serve chilled, and gently shake before drinking for better taste and richer flavor.

name: Sho Chiku Bai 750ml
description: Sake / 15 % ABV / Japan The most traditional sake. In order to enjoy its traditional Junmai character in full, serving it warm is recommended. It will pair well with mildly seasoned dishes.

name: Gekkeikan Sake 750ml
description: Sake / 14.6 % ABV / Japan A versatile sake with dry, mellow flavors and natural aromas. Best when served at room temperature or chilled. Gekkeikan Traditional is the worlds most popular Junmai-shu! It embodies the signature Gekkeikan style and represents over 370 years and 14 generations of sake brewing experience.

name: Gekkeikan Plum Japanese Wine 750ml
description: Specialty Wine / 13 % ABV / Japan Plum Gekkeikan is made with the choicest plums from the world-renowned orchard in Wakayama in central Japan. Tender and succulent, the plums are carefully hand-picked at the moment of perfect ripeness. In an aged-old tradition, they are fermented and then aged to ensure a rich, smooth flavor. Rich in mineral, citric acid and polyphenol. Elegant and authentic; a perfect reflection of the fruit.

name: Beach House Chenin Blanc 750ml
description: Chenin Blanc /12.5 % ABV / Western Cape, South Africa A light and refreshing palate teaser, packed with sunny, tropical passion fruit and pineapple, invigorated by a citrus twang and a lively lemon and lime surge on the dry, frisky finish

name: Nederburg Shiraz 750ml
description: Shiraz /13.5% ABV / Western Cape, South Africa Deep violet-ruby colour; floral, smoky, prune, black olive and spice aromas; medium-to-full bodied with rich dark berry flavours and a long finish.

name: Nederberg Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 14.5% ABV / Western Cape, South Africa Made solely from cabernet sauvignon grapes harvested in and around the Western Cape. Aromas of cassis, cedar, leather, jam and spice fill the bouquet. The flavours are structured with black currant, cedar and spice notes, supported by ripe tannins and a lengthy finish.

name: Nederberg Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13.5 % ABV / Western Cape, South Africa Pale straw colour; lifted nutty and herbal aromas with spicy and citrus notes; nuts, herbs and citrus fruit flavours, well balanced with a fresh, clean finish.

name: Obikwa Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.5 % ABV / Stellenbosch, South Africa Obikwa Cabernet Sauvignon is a full-bodied, ruby coloured wine. It'll treat you well after a long day and also goes well with celebrations, too! This red gem is one you'll want to enjoy with poultry, veal and any other red meat dish. Drink it around a dinner table or on a date. It's a wine for all occasions!

name: Obikwa Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 11.8 % ABV / South Africa This is an elegant but crisp wine from South Africa has ripe gooseberry and crisp, green apple flavours on the palate, backed by tropical fruits and a hint of grassiness that lingers long on the aftertaste.

name: Obikwa Shiraz 750ml
description: Syrah / Shiraz / 13.5 % ABV / South Africa Ruby red; aromas of smoke, floral notes, prune and spices; the palate is dry, medium-bodied with flavours of campfire smoke, prune spread, spice and rye bread.

name: Two Oceans Cabernet Sauvignon Merlot 750ml
description: Cabernet Sauvignon / 13.61% ABV / Western Cape, South Africa Deep ruby colour; floral, cassis and herbal aromas with notes of mushrooms and spice; dry, medium bodied, with soft medium tannin, smooth, bright cassis flavours; approachable, easy drinking style.

name: The Grinder Pinotage 750ml
description: Pinotage / 14.5 % ABV / South Africa Originating in South Africa, this award-winning wine pours deep ruby into the glass and has upfront aromas of smoke, prune, rye bread and spice. These reappear on a medium-plus bodied and extra dry palate with silky tannins and a long finish. Pair with coffee-rubbed ribs or grilled portobello burgers.

name: Two Oceans Sauvignon Blanc 1.5L
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13.5 % ABV / Western Cape, South Africa Upfront tropical fruit on the nose with a hint of green fig and fresh-cut grass, it's crisp, fresh and elegant. Pick up juicy, tangy gooseberry on the very thirst-quenching flavor.

name: Two Oceans Sauvignon Blanc 750ml
description: Sauvignon Blanc / 13.5 % ABV / Western Cape, South Africa Upfront tropical fruit on the nose with a hint of green fig and fresh-cut grass, it's crisp, fresh and elegant. Pick up juicy, tangy gooseberry on the very thirst-quenching flavor.

name: Spier Pintotage 750ml
description: Pinotage / 14.5 % ABV / Western Cape, South Africa This classic South African Pinotage offers a generous bouquet of dark cherries, juicy plums and hints of cinnamon with smooth and silky tannins. An every day favourite - drink this wine at home on a winters night, and pair with pulled pork with a fruity barbecue sauce; lamb chops marinated in Muscadel cooked over the coals; or easy homemade burgers and caramelised onions.

name: KWV Roodeberg Red Wine 750ml
description: Red Blend / 12% ABV / South Africa Roodeberg Red is a classic blend of cabernet, shiraz and merlot, oak aged for depth and complexity. Aromas and flavours of smoke, floral note, dark fruit accented by notes of tobacco and spice. Serve with grilled lamb, smoked brisket or firm cheeses.

name: Blouberg White Wine 750ml
description: White Blend / 11.5 % ABV / Stellenbosch, South Africa This White wine is made from a blend of Sauvignon Blanc (60%), SÃ©millon (20%), and Cape Riesling (20%) grapes. It hails from West Cape, South Africa, out of Stellenbosch appellation, from Blouberg winery.
